TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合运动先验的PPO算法（MARLNet），用以提升目标检测中bounding-box的精确度，实验证明其在不同数据集上带来检测率提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统PPO在目标检测边界框微调任务中存在训练不稳定及回归性能瓶颈，尤其是在运动信息未被充分利用时。为此，作者希望通过引入运动先验和动作平滑惩罚，提升训练稳定性和最终检测性能。

Method: MARLNet将常速运动先验引入观测状态，并在奖励函数中加入动作平滑性惩罚。输入由当前提议、运动学预测、前一动作以及256维EfficientNet-B0特征组成，输出5维策略(框坐标调整+二值终止)，采用PPO进行训练。系统在两个实际数据集上进行评测，并通过ablation分析不同奖励设计的影响。

Result: MARLNet在所测试的所有正则化强度下均表现出稳定训练特性，并在VOC与VisDrone两个数据集上达成IoU≥0.5的检测率小幅提升（分别提升0.011和0.007）。动作平滑惩罚取代速度偏移惩罚后解决了奖励干扰导致的early termination问题。分析还揭示了与主检测器共享backbone时特征表达存在上限。

Conclusion: 在高效特征表达受限和奖励设计上，文中提出的MARLNet通过结合物理运动先验与动作平滑惩罚，有效提升了检测框微调的性能和训练稳定性。未来改进可考虑特征表示能力及更优的奖励策略。

Abstract: We present MARLNet (Motion-Aware Reinforcement Learning Network), a PPO-based bounding-box refinement agent that incorporates a constant-velocity motion prior into the observation state and an action smoothness penalty into the reward function. The agent operates on 268-dimensional observations encoding the current proposal, a kinematic prediction, the previous action, and a 256-dimensional EfficientNet-B0 crop feature, and learns a five-dimensional policy controlling coordinate adjustments and a binary termination trigger. Evaluated on Pascal VOC 2012 and VisDrone 2019, MARLNet trains stably across all regularization strengths tested and achieves consistent gains in detection success rate at $\text{IoU} \geq 0.5$: up to $+0.011$ on VOC ($λ_\text{phys}{=}0.10$), where the motion prior prevents the overshooting that causes plain PPO to regress on this metric, and $+0.007$ on VisDrone ($λ_\text{phys}{=}0.70$), where unconstrained PPO achieves a larger gain ($+0.025$) owing to the weaker base detector. Through reward design ablations and training dynamics analysis, we identify a reward interference in which combining a constant-velocity deviation penalty with an absolute IoU term causes trigger collapse, and show that replacing it with the action smoothness penalty resolves this failure. We further characterize a representational ceiling facing crop-feature refinement agents that share a backbone with their base detector, confirmed through a global-plus-local observation ablation. Project page: https://prithviraj97.github.io/marl-net

</details>


### [109] [RAPID: A Reproducible Multi-Agent Pipeline for Interpretable Disaster Damage Assessment from Satellite and Street-View Imagery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21819)
*Yifan Yang,Wenjing Gong,Kaili Zhang,Lei Zou,Zhengzhong Tu,Hao Li,Zongrong Li,Xinyue Ye*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 论文提出了RAPID系统，一种多智能体管道，实现无需特定任务微调的可解释灾害损失评估，能从多模态地理数据来源进行自动分析与报告。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 极端气候事件频发，对智能、可扩展且自动化的灾害损失评估方法需求增长。现有方法面临领域转移、长尾数据和异构数据源下泛化能力弱，且多模态地理信息融合推理能力有限的问题。

Method: 提出RAPID系统，一个可复现的多智能体管道，协同多个专用智能体进行跨视角理解、图像修复、结构化损害识别和地理推理，实现灾害损失评估、类型解读和针对性响应建议，无需特定任务微调，能零样本评估多灾种。

Result: RAPID系统在飓风、洪水、野火、地震等灾害的多视角图像输入下，可实现0.92的多灾种分类准确率和最高0.627的跨视角损害严重度预测水平。

Conclusion: RAPID展现出成为自动化灾害智能基础性框架的潜力，可为早期应急响应提供细粒度、可解释、位置相关的决策支持。

Abstract: Due to the increasing frequency and intensity of extreme climate events, there is a clear demand for intelligent, scalable, and autonomous approaches to disaster damage assessment. Existing methods, largely based on supervised learning and task-specific fine-tuning, struggle to generalize under domain shifts, long-tailed data distributions, and heterogeneous geospatial data sources, especially in disaster scenarios. They also often lack the ability to integrate and reason across multimodal geospatial information, such as satellite images and street-view images. In this paper, we introduce RAPID, a reproducible multi-agent pipeline for interpretable disaster damage assessment, including damage-level assessment, damage-type interpretation, and actionable suggestions for response, remediation, and recovery. RAPID coordinates specialized agents to perform cross-view understanding, image restoration, structured damage recognition, and geographical reasoning across heterogeneous data modalities. Without task-specific fine-tuning, RAPID supports zero-shot damage assessment by jointly using complementary information from remote sensing and ground-level perspectives. The system produces fine-grained, interpretable assessments and automatically generates location-specific, decision-relevant disaster reports to support early-stage emergency response. We evaluate RAPID across hurricanes, floods, wildfires, and earthquakes using multiple cross-view imagery inputs, including pre- and post-disaster street-view images, post-disaster remote sensing imagery, and street-view image pairs. Experiments show that RAPID achieves 0.92 overall accuracy for multi-disaster type classification and up to 0.627 for cross-view damage severity prediction, highlighting its potential as a foundational framework for autonomous disaster intelligence.

</details>


### [110] [Beyond Flat Labels: Level-Restricted Contrastive Learning for Hierarchical Fine-Grained Vision Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21838)
*Zhiyuan Tao,Srikumar Sastry,Matthew J Thompson,Elizabeth G Campolongo,Net Zhang,Ziheng Zhang,Hilmar Lapp,Yu Su,Tanya Berger-Wolf,Nathan Jacobs,Wei-Lun Chao,Jianyang Gu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种改进的多模态对比学习方法，专门解决了分层标签体系下的预测一致性问题，大幅提升了多层次零样本分类的准确率和层次一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 以往多模态对比学习方法在处理具有层次结构的标签空间时，预测往往在不同层级间出现不一致（如细粒度类别与其父类别预测矛盾），主要原因是多层级对比导致的错误负样本。作者旨在解决分层分类下的层级一致性问题。

Method: 方法包括两个核心创新：（1）对比学习时仅在同一层级内进行类别对比，避免跨层级负样本误用；（2）采用分组平衡设计，确保每一层级都有足够的优化，从而提升整体模型在各层级上的表现。

Result: 在TreeOfLife-10M数据集上，基于BioCLIP进行训练，并在多个层次化分类基准（如iNat21）上测试，在欧式和双曲空间都显著提升了层次一致性。在iNat21上，各层级平均准确率提升30.47%，体现出方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 所提方法不仅提升了模型在多层次标签结构下的层次一致性，还显著改善了分类准确率，为解决分层零样本分类问题提供了新的思路和工具。

Abstract: Multimodal contrastive learning has enabled zero-shot visual classification by aligning images with textual categories. However, in hierarchically structured label spaces, existing methods often produce predictions that are inconsistent across taxonomic levels. For example, a model may predict a fine-grained category whose parent category contradicts its simultaneously predicted higher-level label. By analysis, the issue originates from false negative labels when contrastive comparison involves multiple taxonomic levels. To this end, we propose to restrict contrastive comparisons to categories within the same taxonomic level. In addition, we adopt a group-balanced design, ensuring each taxonomic level receives adequate optimization. As a result, the proposed framework improves both hierarchical consistency and classification accuracy from coarse to fine granularity. We train our model with TreeOfLife-10M based on BioCLIP and evaluate it across multiple hierarchical classification benchmarks, where the model demonstrates significantly improved hierarchical consistency in both Euclidean and hyperbolic spaces. Notably, on iNaturalist 2021 (iNat21), our method improves average accuracy across levels by 30.47% over the baseline, highlighting its effectiveness for hierarchical zero-shot classification.

</details>


### [111] [Zero-Shot Vision-Language Models for Classroom Engagement Recognition: A Benchmark Study of Prompt Sensitivity and Cross-Dataset Generalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21861)
*Aman Goyal,Kshama Nitin Shah,Kemmannu Vineet Venkatesh Rao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本论文系统性评估了五种主流视觉-语言模型（VLM）在课堂参与度自动识别任务中的零样本表现，揭示了多个显著短板，并提出了今后模型使用的注意事项和改进方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 课堂参与度的自动化识别对于可扩展学习分析具有重要意义，但目前尚不清楚最新的VLM模型在无需微调的零样本条件下是否适用于此类任务，因此亟需系统性基准评测。

Method: 本文在两个教育数据集（DAiSEE和SCB）上，针对五种主流VLM（CLIP、BLIP-VQA、GPT-4o、LLaVA-1.5-7B、Qwen2.5VL-7B-Instruct），设计并测试了三种提问方式（极简、rubric锚定、链式思维），考察其在学生个体和课堂场景不同层面的参与度识别能力。

Result: 实验发现：1）VLM在识别个体参与度时表现接近随机，Cohen's kappa均不超过0.10；2）预测严重偏向单一类别，85-100%结果集中于一个参与度水平；3）对提示词极其敏感，准确率因提示方式变化可达32个百分点；但在场景级别的SCB数据集上，用行为rubric提示的CLIP和GPT-4o可达约0.60 kappa。此外，GPT-4o的安全过滤机制对涉及学生面部图片的链式思维提示拒绝率高达98%。

Conclusion: 当前主流VLM在零样本条件下难以胜任个体课堂参与度的自动化识别，但针对场景级别的分析有一定潜力。研究还暴露了模型提示敏感性和实际部署中的合规阻碍，为今后教育观测领域VLM设计和应用提供了基线和方向建议。

Abstract: Automated classroom engagement recognition holds substantial promise for scalable learning analytics, yet the suitability of modern Vision-Language Models (VLMs) for this task under zero-shot conditions remains largely unexplored. We present a systematic benchmark that evaluates five widely-used VLMs: CLIP, BLIP-VQA, GPT-4o, LLaVA-1.5-7B, and Qwen2.5VL-7B-Instruct across two complementary educational datasets: DAiSEE, an individual-student video dataset (300 sampled test clips), and the Student Classroom Behaviour dataset (SCB, 1,168 scene-level images). Each model is probed with three prompt variants spanning minimal, rubric-anchored, and chain-of-thought designs. Our experiments reveal three primary failure modes of zero-shot VLMs for engagement recognition: (1) near-random performance on individual students, with Cohen's kappa never exceeding 0.10 on DAiSEE; (2) severe class collapse, where models assign 85-100% of predictions to a single engagement level regardless of visual content; and (3) extreme prompt sensitivity, with accuracy swings of up to 32 percentage points on identical images depending solely on prompt phrasing. Remarkably, scene-level classification on SCB is substantially more tractable: CLIP and GPT-4o achieve kappa approximately 0.60 when prompted with behaviorally-grounded rubrics. We also document a practical barrier for deployment: GPT-4o's safety filters reject 98% of chain-of-thought requests involving individual student faces. Our findings provide a calibrated baseline and surface critical design considerations for the use of VLMs in educational observation systems.

</details>


### [112] [Prompt-Calibrated SAM 3 for Open-Vocabulary Remote Sensing Semantic Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21863)
*Yanghui Song,Nanqing Liu,Haonan Yin,Yingjie Gao,Chengfu Yang,Qi Ming*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了ProC-SAM3，一种面向遥感图像开放词汇语义分割（OVSS）的新方法，通过改进SAM3在多类别提示上的处理方式，提升了分割精度，并在八大基准数据集上取得了当前训练自由方法的最好性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 遥感图像的开放词汇语义分割任务需应对类别多样、分类语义复杂等挑战，而当前SAM3及同类方法存在语义覆盖不充分、文本编码冗余、噪声激活传播等问题，限制了其实际应用效果。

Method: 1）构建离线提示池，利用Category Matcher和扩展约束，将MLLM生成的候选提示按类别归组并精炼；2）预计算文本特征，测试时直接复用，减少冗余计算；3）提出Presence-Guided Residual Fusion和峰值保持类聚合，抑制不可靠解码器输出，提高对小型/稀疏目标的细粒度激活保持。

Result: 在八个遥感图像分割基准上，ProC-SAM3平均mIoU达到56.1%，比此前最优的训练自由方法高3.9个百分点。

Conclusion: ProC-SAM3通过优化提示集构建、编码复用和融合聚合策略，显著提升了遥感开放词汇分割的无训练方法性能，展示出更高的泛化能力和实用价值。

Abstract: Open-vocabulary semantic segmentation (OVSS) in remote sensing images aims to segment categories beyond a fixed label space. Recent SAM 3-based methods provide a promising training-free foundation, yet three key issues remain: (1) a single class-name prompt lacks sufficient semantic coverage for complex remote sensing categories; (2) expanding each category into multiple prompts introduces redundant online text encoding; and (3) directly aggregating multiple prompt responses propagates noisy activations into the final prediction. To address these issues, we propose ProC-SAM3, which calibrates SAM 3's prompt interface for remote sensing OVSS from three complementary aspects. First, we construct an offline prompt pool where a Category Matcher groups MLLM-generated candidates into per-category sets, and Expansion Constraints further refine each set using category-specific prior knowledge. Second, the resulting text embeddings are cached and reused across all test images, eliminating repeated text encoding. Third, we introduce Presence-Guided Residual Fusion to gate unreliable decoder outputs by prompt presence and confidence, followed by peak-preserving class aggregation that retains fine-grained activations for small and sparse objects. Experiments on eight benchmarks show that ProC-SAM3 achieves an average mIoU of 56.1%, outperforming the previous best training-free method by 3.9 percentage points. Code will be available at https://github.com/YanghuiSong/ProC-SAM3.

</details>


### [113] [Fidelity- and Perception-Aware Local Implicit Attention for Arbitrary-Scale Image Super-Resolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21910)
*Yu-Syuan Xu,Hao-Lun Sun,Hao-Wei Chen,Hsien-Kai Kuo,Chun-Yi Lee*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种新的任意尺度超分辨率（ASISR）方法——FPLIA，兼顾感知质量和重建准确性，有效融合了高保真和感知特征，取得了优于现有方法的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有超分方法要么产生过于平滑且缺乏真实细节的图像，要么采用扩散模型后易出现结构性虚假内容。如何在提高细节真实感的同时避免结构性错误，是ASISR领域的难点。

Method: 提出FPLIA框架，核心包含两个模块：（1）FPAM模块，将自注意力和交叉注意力应用于高保真及感知特征；（2）FPSM模块，自适应选择特征进行RGB预测。这种设计平衡了图像重建的准确性和感知质量。

Result: 实验验证了FPLIA各组件的有效性。无论定性还是定量指标，FPLIA都在主流ASISR基准上取得了更好的感知真实感和重建准确性。

Conclusion: FPLIA作为一种新型融合感知和保真注意力机制的扩散网络，有效提升了任意尺度超分任务的图像质量和可靠性。

Abstract: Arbitrary-scale image super-resolution (ASISR) aims to reconstruct high-resolution images from low-resolution inputs over a continuous range of upscaling factors. While traditional pixel-regression approaches often produce overly smooth results that lack realistic details, recent diffusion methods can produce sharper and more realistic textures. However, these diffusion techniques frequently introduce the risk of structural hallucinations. To address these issues, we propose Fidelity- and Perception-Aware Local Implicit Attention (FPLIA), a framework that effectively integrates fidelity-oriented features into a diffusion pipeline to produce realistic and faithful reconstructions for ASISR. We introduce a Fidelity and Perception Attention Module (FPAM), which applies both self-attention and cross-attention to fidelity-oriented and perceptual features to enhance representational capacity. To further exploit their complements, we design a Fidelity and Perception Select Module (FPSM) that adaptively selects the most representative features for RGB values prediction. We conduct extensive experiments to validate the effectiveness of these components. Both qualitative and quantitative results show that FPLIA delivers superior perceptual realism while maintaining reconstruction accuracy on standard ASISR benchmarks. The source code is accessible at the following repository: https://github.com/XUSean0118/FPLIA.

</details>


### [114] [Rethinking the Adaptation of Vision Foundation Models for Efficient Cell Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21913)
*Qing Xu,Xiangjian He,Wenting Duan,Jiebo Luo,Zhen Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了EffiCell-Seg框架，实现了无需重新训练视觉编码器的高效细胞分割，极大降低参数量且超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前细胞分割依赖于对大规模视觉模型的微调，导致计算资源消耗大且需大量标签，阻碍了视觉基础模型在细胞成像领域的充分利用。

Method: 提出EffiCell-Seg框架，核心包括：1）利用冻结的视觉基础模型提取结构先验；2）设计Cell Structure Prompt Encoder（CSP-Encoder），将全局显著性与局部形态结构显式融合；3）提出Synergistic Mask Decoder（SM-Decoder），通过几何距离场和语义图的互导，实现上下文一致性分割。

Result: 在多种细胞成像模态上，EffiCell-Seg以约500万可训练参数显著优于SOTA方法，参数量远低于完全微调的基础模型（降低130倍以上）。

Conclusion: EffiCell-Seg框架无需重新训练重型视觉编码器，既高效又精确地促进了细胞分割，为基础模型在生物医学领域应用提供了有力支持。

Abstract: Cell segmentation is critical for computational pathology and biomedical discovery. While recent Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) have demonstrated remarkable universal feature representations, unlocking their full potential for cellular imaging is currently bottlenecked by resource-intensive adaptation paradigms. Existing methods typically rely on fine-tuning heavy visual encoders, leading to extensive computational overhead and a dependency on large-scale annotations. To address this, we propose the EffiCell-Seg framework for highly efficient cell segmentation without re-training the visual encoder. Our core insight is that pretrained VFMs intrinsically encode complementary structural priors: global saliency for localizing potential cells, and local morphological patterns for delineating cellular structures. To harness these priors, we devise a Cell Structure Prompt Encoder (CSP-Encoder) that synthesizes semantic-aware saliency and principal morphological features from frozen VFM representations into explicit structural prior maps. Moreover, we propose a Synergistic Mask Decoder (SM-Decoder) that enforces contextual consistency by jointly predicting geometric distance fields and semantic maps via mutual cross-guidance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EffiCell-Seg outperforms state-of-the-art methods across diverse cell imaging modalities while requiring only ~5M trainable parameters, over 130x fewer than fully fine-tuned VFM counterparts. The code is available at https://github.com/xq141839/EffiCell-Seg.

</details>


### [115] [GTA-Net: Cooperative Game Theory for Vision-Language Alignment in Chest X-Ray Report Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21915)
*Saif ur Rehman Khan,Imad Ahmed Waqar,Sebastian Vollmer,Muhammad Nabeel Asim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新型的胸部X光影像自动报告生成方法GTA-Net，通过博弈论方法显式对齐图像区域和文本描述，实现更精确的医疗语义对应，显著提升了报告生成的临床一致性和性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的视觉-语言模型在医学报告生成任务中，依赖隐式注意力机制，难以确保图文之间的精确区域-词汇对齐及疾病层面的一致性，影响了报告的临床可靠性。

Method: 作者提出Game-Theoretic Alignment Network (GTA-Net)，将报告生成问题建模为合作型博弈对齐问题。核心方法包括二元博弈对齐器(BinaryGameAligner)，利用相似性收益矩阵和Shapley权重计算关键区域与词汇的配对；以及引入三元疾病感知对齐器(Disease-Aware Ternary Aligner)，进一步融合医学图像、报告文本和结构化疾病概念三者的联合关系。模型构建上采用Swin视觉编码器与LoRA微调的大语言模型结合，统一目标进行生成与对齐任务训练。

Result: 在CheXpertPlus和IU-XRay两个主流医学影像数据集上，该方法在常规报告生成指标和临床一致性方面实现了最优性能。

Conclusion: 显性博弈论对齐有效提升了医学视觉-语言生成任务的临床一致性和整体性能，对推动自动医学报告生成具有重要意义。

Abstract: Automated chest X-ray report generation requires precise cross-modal grounding to ensure clinically reliable descriptions. However, existing vision-language models rely on implicit attention mechanisms that fail to enforce explicit region-word correspondence and disease-level consistency. We propose Game-Theoretic Alignment Network (GTA-Net), a vision-language framework that formulates report generation as a cooperative game-theoretic alignment problem. The model introduces a BinaryGameAligner that models interactions between image regions and text tokens using similarity-based payoff matrices with Shapley-inspired importance weighting. To enforce clinical semantics, we further develop a Disease-Aware Ternary Aligner, which captures joint interactions among images, reports, and structured disease concepts. GTA-Net combines a Swin-based visual encoder with a LoRA-adapted large language model and is trained with a unified objective for generation and alignment. Experiments on CheXpertPlus and IU-XRay demonstrate state-of-the-art performance across standard generation metrics and improved clinical consistency, highlighting the effectiveness of explicit game-theoretic alignment for medical vision-language generation.

</details>


### [116] [CoSA: Correlation-Guided Change Attention with Learnable Residual Gating for Remote Sensing Change Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21932)
*Abdirashid Omar,Jonghyuk Park*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种高效、轻量的变更检测模块CoSA，有效提升了遥感影像双时相变化检测的性能，在多个数据集上均优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 遥感影像变化检测在城市监控、灾害评估等领域非常重要，但实际应用中存在稀疏变化、标签噪声和外观变化带来的精准定位难题。作者旨在提升检测准确性和泛化能力。

Method: 提出了Context Sampling Attention（CoSA）模块，作为轻量级的解码器侧精细化模块，在FC-Siam网络中实现。CoSA通过计算双时相特征解码器在同一位置的归一化相关性，将低相关性处转化为变化门控信号，并通过可学习的残差缩放，在不同尺度的特征上注入门控残差信号。该方法不依赖全局注意力，计算效率高。

Result: 在LEVIR-CD、S2Looking、DSIFN和CLCD四个基准数据集上，CoSA在不显著增加参数量的情况下，使变化类别F1分数提升1.5-2.6%。消融实验表明多尺度设置和可学习门控对性能至关重要。

Conclusion: CoSA模块为提升遥感影像变化检测中时序判别力提供了高效实用的精细化范式，能够广泛应用于Siamese结构的变化检测框架中。

Abstract: Remote sensing change detection (CD) from bi-temporal imagery is critical for applications such as urban monitoring, disaster assessment, and environmental management, yet robust localization remains challenging under sparse changes, noisy labels, and appearance variations. In this paper, we propose Context Sampling Attention (CoSA), a lightweight decoder-side refinement module that explicitly leverages bi-temporal feature correlation as a control signal for adaptive change-aware feature enhancement. This differs from conventional attention mechanisms that rely on implicit feature weighting without explicit temporal control. In the implemented FC-Siam setting, CoSA computes normalized same-location cross-correlation between paired decoder features, converts low correlation into a change gate, and injects the resulting gated residual at native 1/8 and 1/16 feature scales through learnable residual scaling. This design enables effective discrimination between stable and ambiguous regions without relying on computationally expensive global attention. Extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets (LEVIR-CD, S2Looking, DSIFN, and CLCD) demonstrate consistent improvements over strong baselines, achieving 1.5-2.6% gains in changed-class F1 while introducing negligible parameter overhead. Ablation studies confirm that multiscale placement and learnable residual gating are both important for peak performance. These results indicate that CoSA establishes a practical and effective refinement paradigm for enhancing temporal discriminability in Siamese change detection frameworks.

</details>


### [117] [Artic-O: End-to-End Articulated Object Reconstruction via Latent Geometry Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21938)
*Xuyang Wang,Zhenyu Li,Jian Ding,Habib Slim,Peter Wonka,Hongdong Li,Mohamed Elhoseiny*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Artic-O是一种用于从稀疏图片端到端重建关节物体的高效模型，能同时还原完整形态、活动部件和运动参数，且推理速度极快。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法通常分阶段处理几何重建、零件划分与运动估计，这导致形状、活动部分和运动之间缺乏一致性，并带来高昂的推理代价。需要一种统一、高效且各部分信息互通的重建方法。

Method: Artic-O采用端到端、前馈的深度网络，输入为物体在不同状态下的稀疏图像。其创新点包括：1) 输入映射到预训练几何潜空间，利用冻结的解码器作为完整形状先验，提升可见与遮挡结构的恢复能力；2) 通过图像、几何潜向量与逐点解码特征融合进行带图像信息的零件推理和关节预测；3) 采用几何到关节的课程训练以及解耦的双阶段训练平衡整体重建与局部监督。

Result: 在PartNet-Mobility数据集上，Artic-O在形状重建质量上优于LARM等主流方法，显著降低Chamfer距离、提升F-score，并在大多数关节评估指标上达到或超过现有方法。同时，单体推理时间从9分钟降至约0.3秒。

Conclusion: Artic-O显著提升了关节物体重建的一致性与效率，实现了形态、活动部件与运动参数的协同预测，兼顾高质量与极高推理速度。

Abstract: Reconstructing articulated objects from sparse images requires recovering complete geometry, movable parts, and motion parameters. Recent methods typically separate geometry reconstruction, part reasoning, and articulation estimation into different stages. This separation can weaken consistency between shape, active parts, and motion, while also incurring substantial inference cost. We introduce Artic-O, an end-to-end, feed-forward framework for articulated object reconstruction via latent geometry learning. Instead of fitting geometry in image or view space, Artic-O maps sparse multi-state observations into a pretrained latent geometry space, where a frozen flow-matching decoder provides a complete-shape prior for recovering visible and occluded structures. To connect geometry with articulation, Artic-O fuses visual tokens, geometry latents, and point-wise decoder features in an image-grounded part-reasoning module for active-part segmentation and articulation prediction. We further train the model with a geometry-to-articulation curriculum and a decoupled two-pass strategy to balance reconstruction and part-level supervision. On PartNet-Mobility, Artic-O achieves strong reconstruction quality while being substantially more efficient than LARM, a strong prior method. It reduces Chamfer Distance, improves F-score, and achieves comparable or better articulation accuracy across most joint metrics, while reducing inference time from 9 minutes to about 0.3 seconds per object.

</details>


### [118] [ScalePredictor: Instance-aware Scale Learning for Accurate Quantization of Vision Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21947)
*Changjun Li,Runqing Jiang,Lian Xu,Ye Zhang,Qingyong Hu,Yulan Guo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为ScalePredictor的动态量化框架，用于提升Vision Transformer（ViT）在边缘设备上的量化准确性与效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然ViT表现优异，但其高计算需求限制了在边缘设备上的部署。传统的后训练量化（PTQ）虽可减小模型规模，但普遍采用静态量化，未考虑不同输入图像的多样性，导致量化结果次优。作者希望通过动态自适应的方法提升量化性能。

Method: 作者提出了ScalePredictor，首先发现浅层激活分布范围与深层最优量化尺度存在隐性相关。该方法在浅层高效提取分布范围，将这些统计数据输入到基于泰勒多项式的尺度映射模块中，同时生成所有深层的量化尺度，从而实现动态量化，且计算开销微小、无需昂贵的临时校准。

Result: 在ImageNet上进行的大量实验表明，ScalePredictor在精度与效率权衡上显著优于现有PTQ方案，取得更好的模型表现。

Conclusion: ScalePredictor能够动态且高效地预测ViT量化尺度，为边缘设备模型部署提供了更优解决方案，并有望推动深度学习模型在实际场景的广泛应用。

Abstract: Vision Transformers have achieved remarkable success in many fields, yet their deployment on edge devices remains challenging due to their substantial computational demands. Post-Training Quantization (PTQ) offers an attractive solution by compressing models using a small calibration set with minimal training overhead. However, most existing PTQ works adopt a static quantization paradigm that is uniformly applied to all instances. Given the substantial diversity of natural images, the activation distributions vary significantly across samples, making these methods inherently suboptimal. In this paper, we propose ScalePredictor, a dynamic quantization framework for accurate and efficient quantization scale learning of ViTs. We first reveal a hidden correlation between the distribution range of shallow-layer activations and the optimal scales of deeper layers. Based on this, we develop a scale learning mechanism that integrates an efficient range extraction approach to capture robust range statistics at the shallow stage, which are then fed into a Taylor-motivated polynomial scale projection module to generate all quantization scales simultaneously. With the efficiency of polynomial approximation, ScalePredictor introduces insignificant computational overhead while avoiding costly just-in-time calibration. Extensive experiments on ImageNet demonstrate that ScalePredictor consistently outperforms prior PTQ methods, achieving a more favorable accuracy-efficiency trade-off. Code and additional results are shown in the supplementary materials.

</details>


### [119] [CapRiCorn-1K: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Video Captioning and Subject Referential Consistency Across Temporal Scales](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21949)
*Xinlong Chen,Jiafu Tang,Yue Ding,Yizhuo Jia,Bozhou Li,Bohan Zeng,Yang Shi,Shihao Li,Yiyan Ji,Qiang Liu,Weihong Lin,Yuanxing Zhang,Pengfei Wan,Liang Wang,Tieniu Tan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个新的视频字幕基准数据集CapRiCorn-1K，用于全面评测字幕质量和主体指代一致性，有效推动视频字幕模型发展。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 以往视频字幕评测基准难以客观、全面评估字幕的准确性、完整性及主体指代一致性，尤其在长时序和不同类型视频下，严重制约了视频字幕技术的进步。

Method: 作者构建了CapRiCorn-1K数据集，涵盖多领域、长时序视频，设计用于检验字幕的准确性和主体指代一致性，支持视听和纯视觉评测。

Result: 在CapRiCorn-1K上的大量实验显示，现有模型难以在长视频场景下生成准确、全面且主体指代一致的字幕，且视频时长越长，整体字幕质量与指代一致性下降更明显。所提出的评测指标与下游理解和生成任务表现高度相关。

Conclusion: CapRiCorn-1K为评测视频字幕模型提供了更有挑战性和代表性的基准，有助于促进更优的视频字幕生成模型发展。

Abstract: Accurate and comprehensive video captions with consistent subject references are critical for downstream understanding and generation tasks. However, few existing benchmarks can objectively and comprehensively evaluate these properties across diverse durations and scenarios, thereby hindering the advancement of video captioning models. To bridge this gap, we propose CapRiCorn-1K, a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate both video captioning quality and subject referential consistency across long temporal horizons and diverse video domains. To accommodate varied evaluation needs, our benchmark supports both audiovisual and visual-only settings. Extensive experiments on CapRiCorn-1K reveal that current models generally struggle to generate accurate and comprehensive captions while maintaining consistent subject references. Moreover, as video duration increases, both the overall caption quality and subject referential consistency decline. Notably, our evaluation metrics exhibit strong correlations with the performance of downstream understanding and generation tasks conditioned on the generated captions, further validating their effectiveness. The project is available at https://github.com/xlchen0205/CapRiCorn-1K .

</details>


### [120] [Denoising-Enhanced Coarse-to-Fine Infrared Small Target Detection with Attention Prior-Guided Knowledge Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21956)
*Houzhang Fang,Ruixuan Huang,Qiuhuan Chen,Xiaolin Wang,Yi Chang,Luxin Yan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种高效的红外小目标检测框架ECFNet，通过分层检测和注意力引导的知识蒸馏，实现了在复杂背景下对小目标的准确检测，并兼顾了实时处理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 红外小目标检测在无人机监控等实际应用中十分重要，但由于目标尺寸小、特征弱以及动态复杂背景的干扰，当前方法在检测精度和效率上存在瓶颈。现有方法在背景区存在冗余计算，且未能充分利用目标上下文信息，导致性能受限，因此需要更高效且更准确的检测手段。

Method: 作者提出了ECFNet检测框架，分为粗到细两个阶段。在粗检测阶段，设计了基于网格多尺度特征的区域二值分类网络（RBCN），用于快速识别包含目标的区域，同时抑制复杂背景。此外，引入了噪声辅助训练策略，通过对RBCN特征图加入带噪的伪标签，并训练其去噪重建，提高了网络区分目标的能力并加速收敛。在细检测阶段，利用轻量级检测器对粗阶段输出的候选区域进一步检测，实现精准定位。最后，提出注意力先验引导的知识蒸馏策略，通过教师-学生网络的跨注意力机制，引导学生关注关键目标区域，提升小目标表征能力。

Result: 在三个真实红外数据集上进行大量实验，ECFNet在检测精度、效率上均超过了现有的单阶段和双阶段方法，尤其在复杂背景下表现优异，并保持了较高的实时处理速度。

Conclusion: ECFNet有效解决了红外高分辨率图像中小目标检测的常见难题，兼顾了检测准确性与实时性，具有较强的实际应用潜力。

Abstract: Infrared small target detection (IRSTD) in high-resolution images is crucial for many practical applications, such as surveillance of unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) and UAV-based ground monitoring. However, IRSTD remains challenging due to the small size and weak features of targets, as well as significant interference from complex dynamic backgrounds. Existing detection methods often suffer from redundant computations on non-target background regions and insufficient exploitation of target context information, which limits their performance in complex backgrounds. To address these issues, we propose an efficient coarse-to-fine infrared small target detection framework with attention prior-guided knowledge distillation, termed ECFNet. In the coarse stage, we design a region binary classification network (RBCN) on grid-based multi-scale feature maps to efficiently recognize target-containing context region proposals while suppressing complex backgrounds. Moreover, we introduce a novel denoising-assisted training strategy that incorporates noisy ground-truth (GT) masks into the feature maps of RBCN and trains the network to reconstruct the GT masks through a denoising task, thereby enhancing its ability to distinguish target proposals from background regions and accelerating convergence. In the fine stage, we customize a lightweight target detector to the coarse stage's region proposals for balancing accuracy and efficiency. Furthermore, we propose a knowledge distillation strategy guided by the teacher-student cross-attention prior. This mechanism directs the student to focus on critical target regions, thereby enhancing the discriminative feature representation for infrared small targets. Extensive experiments on three real infrared datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms both existing single-stage and two-stage approaches while maintaining high real-time processing efficiency.

</details>


### [121] [Look Before You Zoom: Adaptive Routing for the Resolution-Context Trade-off in Visual RAG](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21968)
*Oanh N. Tran,Thanh Quoc Hung Le,Oscar Chew,Kuan-Hao Huang,Khoa D. Doan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ViRGo是一种为视觉-语言模型（VLM）提出的新框架，通过自适应选择不同的视觉检索方式，权衡全局感知与细节放大，在不同目标尺寸下提升模型在VQA任务中的表现和推理效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLM在处理小目标时表现不佳。虽然有些无需训练的方法通过局部检索和缩放弥补细节丢失，但这会在不同目标尺寸上带来分辨率与上下文的权衡难题。针对这一核心薄弱点，作者提出需要一种自适应选择不同视觉检索方式的机制。

Method: ViRGo框架通过让VLM在推理早期估算出图像中目标的尺度，并结合语义置信度，智能选择三种策略之一：全局感知、基于patch的局部检索或基于注意力的检索。这样既可针对小目标获得细节，又能保持大目标的完整性，避免不必要的放大操作。

Result: 在不同VQA基准任务和多种目标尺寸分组对比实验中，ViRGo能在推理时间几乎无增长的前提下，提高答案准确率。其性能在小目标上与patch检索相当，处理大目标时优于单一检索策略，且判断无需放大时能直接以全局方式快速推理。

Conclusion: ViRGo框架有效缓解了VLM在面对目标尺寸变化时的分辨率-上下文困境，提升了问答准确率和推理效率，是一种具有实际应用价值的轻量化视觉检索适配方案。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) struggle as query-relevant objects become smaller. To address this, recent training-free approaches dynamically retrieve and zoom into local image regions. However, we show that indiscriminately applying retrieval ignores a critical vulnerability: the resolution-context trade-off. Patch-based zooming recovers details for small targets, but can split large objects and destroy global spatial context; attention-based retrieval better preserves large objects, but remains less reliable on tiny details; and global perception is often fastest when retrieval is unnecessary. Motivated by these failure modes, we introduce ViRGo (Visual Retrieval or Global Perception), a lightweight framework that formulates visual retrieval as an adaptive routing problem. ViRGo estimates object scale from the VLM's intrinsic localization heads during the initial forward pass and combines it with semantic token confidence to select between global perception, patch-based retrieval, and attention-based retrieval with minimal additional computation. Experiments across multiple VQA benchmarks and object-size groups show that ViRGo improves the accuracy-efficiency trade-off: it matches patch retrieval on small details, leverages attention-based retrieval for larger objects, and reduces inference time by routing to the global baseline when zooming is unnecessary.

</details>


### [122] [CoDMD: Copula-aware Distribution Matching Distillation for Fast Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21982)
*Wenhu Zhang,Kun Cheng,Changyuan Wang,Shiyao Li,Yuechen Zhang,Wenbo Li,Jiajun Zha,Jingyi Zhang,Kang Zhao,Jiaya Jia*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种新的视频扩散模型蒸馏方法CoDMD，通过引入Copula相关性正则化，在极少步数下提升蒸馏后学生模型的生成质量，实现更快的视频生成速度，且在主流基准测试中优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前视频扩散模型在实际部署场景下对推理效率要求极高，而主流的分布匹配蒸馏（DMD）方法极少步数时易出现生成退化（如布局不稳定、过饱和、运动断裂），作者追溯原因发现DMD缺乏跨样本/帧的关系约束，容易陷入局部最优。

Method: 提出CoDMD方法，引入了一种轻量级Copula正则项，利用教师和学生已算得的分数估计值构建样本间及帧间的两两关系矩阵，通过新的分布目标进行关系匹配，无需增加网络、数据集或采样过程。

Result: 在Wan-2.1-T2V 1.3B和14B两个规模上，将50步教师模型蒸馏为4步学生模型，实现约25倍推理加速，且VBench分数（84.46&84.87）显著超过基于轨迹（rCM 82.81&84.05）和分布蒸馏（DMD 83.38&83.81）等主流方法。

Conclusion: CoDMD能够有效弥补标准DMD在小步数蒸馏下的结构性缺陷，为高效、实用的视频扩散模型提供了新范式，具备较强实际应用价值。

Abstract: Few-step distillation for video diffusion models has attracted significant attention, driven by the urgent demand for efficient deployment in real-world scenarios. However, Distribution Matching Distillation (DMD), a leading paradigm, tends to degrade under limited NFE budgets, manifesting in video generation as layout instability, oversaturation, and broken motion dynamics. We trace this failure to a structural limitation: standard DMD is an intra-sample distribution-matching objective with coordinate-wise gradients, and thus imposes no explicit constraint on the relational geometry across batch elements or temporal frames, leaving the underlying copula largely unregulated. Combined with the mode-seeking tendency of its reverse-KL objective, this absence of relational guidance makes DMD prone to collapsing into local optima in the few-step regime. Motivated by this insight, we propose Copula-aware DMD (CoDMD), a lightweight relational regularizer that reuses score estimates already produced by the frozen teacher and the online fake model to construct pairwise relation matrices across samples and frames. These are matched through a supplementary distributional objective that requires no additional networks, datasets, or sampling trajectories. On the Wan-2.1-T2V model series at 1.3B & 14B scales, CoDMD distills 50-step teachers into 4-step students, achieving an approximate 25$\times$ speed-up while attaining VBench scores of 84.46 & 84.87, outperforming prior trajectory-based (rCM 82.81 & 84.05) and distribution-based (DMD 83.38 & 83.81) methods.

</details>


### [123] [One-Shot Data Selection for Medical Image Classification via Graph Coverage](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22002)
*Zahiriddin Rustamov,Nadia Badawi,Rafat Damseh,Nazar Zaki*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种新颖的、基于图的医学影像有代表性样本一轮选取方法，大幅提升了在标注预算受限情况下的分类效果，且无需反复训练模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前医学图像分类任务中，标注成本高昂，且并非所有样本对提升模型性能贡献均等。主动学习虽可降低成本，但需多轮访问oracle和重新训练模型，开销大。现有一轮几何方法无须训练但无法捕捉数据流形的局部结构。

Method: 方法基于预训练模型生成的特征嵌入，构建全体样本的k近邻图，通过热扩散核设计双项覆盖核，刻画近邻与两跳邻居关系。利用该核进行贪心设施选址集选取得到类别平衡且覆盖充分的子集。整个过程只需稀疏矩阵运算，无需训练模型。

Result: 在五个MedMNIST数据集、10类数据量与类别比例条件下评测，方法在九项上取得最高平衡准确率，尤其在类别极不平衡数据集中显著领先传统方法，充分体现全局图结构对交叉类样本选择的优势。

Conclusion: 该方法在无需训练的前提下显著提升小样本标签选择效率与分类性能，为医学影像领域高效获得标注数据提供可推广的新工具。

Abstract: Training medical image classifiers on entire datasets is wasteful when annotation budgets are limited: not all samples contribute equally, yet acquiring expert labels is expensive. Active learning reduces annotation cost through iterative querying, but assumes repeated access to an oracle and requires multiple rounds of model training. One-shot geometry-based methods such as facility location avoid retraining but operate on pairwise distances that ignore the local structure of the data manifold. We propose a graph-based one-shot selection method that operates entirely on frozen foundation model embeddings. Given embeddings from a pretrained encoder, we construct a k-nearest neighbor graph over all training samples and derive a two-term coverage kernel from the heat diffusion kernel, capturing both direct and two-hop neighborhood relationships. Greedy facility location on this kernel selects class-balanced subsets that maximize coverage of the data manifold. The two-term kernel matches the full spectral heat kernel in selection behavior while reducing computation to sparse matrix operations with a single hyperparameter. We evaluate on five MedMNIST datasets spanning histopathology, radiology, and microscopy, comparing against both training-dynamics and geometry-based baselines. Our method achieves the highest balanced accuracy on nine of ten dataset-ratio conditions, with the largest gains on class-imbalanced datasets where global graph construction captures cross-class structure that per-class methods miss, all without any model training during selection. Code is available at https://github.com/zahiriddin-rustamov/graph-coverage-selection.

</details>


### [124] [Topological summaries of fingerprint ridge patterns carry identity information](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22029)
*Chad M. Topaz,Niny Arcila-Maya,Elizabeth Munch,Zofia Stanley,Lori Ziegelmeier*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出通过拓扑数据分析（TDA）直接分析指纹脊纹整体结构进行身份验证，无需传统细节点检测流程，并展示了其优越的验证性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统指纹验证主要依赖于人工检测的细节点（如脊纹末端和分叉），这一流程复杂且易受图像质量影响。作者希望寻找更健壮、透明的新方法，直接捕捉完整脊纹几何与拓扑信息。

Method: 采用持久性同调（persistent homology）等拓扑工具，对指纹脊纹和谷纹的整体空间分布进行多尺度分析，忽略细节点检测间接流程。对比多种拓扑特征提取与匹配算法，并在FVC2000 DB1标准数据集上评测。还融合了训练型和最优传输型拓扑方法以提升性能。

Result: 即使是最简单的无训练参数拓扑摘要，也显著超过只利用几何信息的基线方法。训练型方法AUC达到0.91；最优传输法在低误识率下效果最佳。两者融合后，在多项指标上都优于单一方法。

Conclusion: 拓扑数据分析能够有效挖掘并表达指纹所蕴含的身份信息，优于像素几何方法，对比基于细节点的方法更加透明、健壮。论文还提供了完整、可组合的开源框架，促进该领域方法的进一步发展。

Abstract: Fingerprints are the most widely deployed biometric. Verifying whether two impressions come from the same finger typically relies on minutiae, small landmarks such as skin ridge endings and bifurcations. These landmarks are extracted through a multi-stage pipeline of image enhancement, skeletonization, minutiae detection, and alignment. We investigate an alternative: using topological data analysis to represent the full pattern of skin ridges and valleys directly, bypassing minutiae detection and the downstream matching pipeline. We apply persistent homology, a topological tool that tracks how loops in the ridge pattern form and fill in across spatial scales, producing multi-scale summaries of ridge geometry. We develop and compare a range of verification methods on a standard benchmark dataset, FVC2000 DB1. Even the simplest topological summaries, with no trained parameters, substantially outperform geometry-only baselines. A trained method achieves an AUC of 0.91, while an optimal-transport method excels at the strictest false-accept thresholds, suggesting they capture different aspects of the ridge pattern. Fusing these two approaches yields the best performance at every low false-accept threshold we examine. Our results establish that these topological summaries capture substantial fingerprint identity information, far more effective for verification than raw pixel-level geometry. Because the entire pipeline is openly specified, it offers a transparent complement to minutiae-based systems, and we provide a modular framework for constructing, evaluating, and combining topological verification methods.

</details>


### [125] [IDAG-Edit: Multi-Object Video Editing via Instance-Decoupled Attention and Guidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22042)
*Yuan-Zhih Lin,Huu-Thang Nguyen,Huu-Phu Do,Hong-Han Shuai,Ching-Chun Huang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了IDAGEdit框架，实现了无需训练的多目标视频精细编辑，并显著提升了时序一致性和多目标可控性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于扩散模型的视频编辑在实现精细、多目标的视频内容控制时面临诸如注意力泄漏、身份漂移和时序动态不稳定等难题，特别是在多物体场景下控制精度有限。

Method: 作者提出了IDAGEdit方法：1）采用布局引导的注意力调节（Layout-guided Attention Modulation）实现多目标的连贯编辑；2）引入实例级遮罩（Instance-level Masks）以保护各目标的身份属性，并使注意力局限于各自区域，实现精细化控制。整个框架无需额外训练。

Result: 通过广泛的定性和定量实验，IDAGEdit在时序稳定性和多目标可控性方面均优于现有主流视频编辑方法。

Conclusion: IDAGEdit框架为多对象视频编辑提供了一种无需训练且具强时序一致性和高度对象控制能力的新方法，推动了多目标视频编辑的研究发展。

Abstract: Diffusion-based video editing has made significant progress; however, achieving precise and temporally consistent object-level control, especially in multi-object scenarios, remains challenging due to attention leakage, identity drift, and unstable temporal dynamics. In this work, we propose IDAGEdit, a training-free framework for fine-grained multi-object video editing with strong temporal consistency. The framework adopts Layout-guided Attention Modulation to facilitate coherent multi-object editing, while Instance-level Masks are introduced to preserve individual object identity and enforce localized attention within each object region, thereby enabling fine-grained, object-level editing. Extensive qualitative and quantitative evaluations demonstrate that our method improves temporal stability and multi-object controllability over state-of-the-art video editing approaches.

</details>


### [126] [A Controlled Study of CLIP-Based Body-Scene Fusion for Emotion Recognition in Context](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22072)
*Zubair Abbas,Muhammad Umair,Muqaddas Hameed*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本论文提出了一种基于图像的双流模型用于自然图像中的情感识别，通过人体流与场景流提取特征，结果显示一些常见的去偏或均衡训练策略并未提升性能，后续应着重解决稀有和细微情感类别识别。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在自然图像中，人物表情信息经常不明显，需结合姿态和场景上下文来识别情感，因此亟需研究如何更有效地从环境中获取情感线索并改进上下文感知的情感识别模型。

Method: 采用一种双流模型，其中ResNet-18负责编码目标人体特征，CLIP ViT-B/16负责编码整张图片的场景语义，融合后用于共同预测26种类别标签及情感连续值。重点比较了基础双流模型和若干去偏、稀有类别增强及因果干预等改进方法的表现差异。

Result: 实验证实，基础双流模型（融合CLIP场景编码）在EMOTIC测试集上mAP达到34.52%，而各种稀有类别增强、因果推理等改进在同一实现框架下均未带来性能提升。

Conclusion: 当前主要难点集中在稀有与细微情感类别的识别，简易的上下文去偏和类别均衡训练已难以带来额外提升，未来应关注标签关系建模及更细致的主体-上下文互动建模。

Abstract: Apparent emotion in natural images is often not visible from the face alone. The face may be small, hidden, or neutral, while posture and scene context carry much of the evidence. This work studies context-aware emotion recognition on EMOTIC with an image-only two-stream model. A ResNet-18 body stream encodes the target-person crop, and a CLIP ViT-B/16 scene stream encodes the full image. The fused feature predicts 26 categorical emotion labels and the continuous valence, arousal, and dominance values. This study examines whether small context-debiasing or rare-class training changes still help after adding a CLIP scene encoder. The clean two-stream model is compared with simplified CCIM-style intervention, CLEF-lite context-bias subtraction, ASL tuning, and class-balanced sampling under the same implementation pipeline. No tested variant improves over the clean two-stream model, which achieves 34.52% mAP on the EMOTIC test split. CLIP gives the model broad scene semantics, but the simplified causal, counterfactual, and rare-class changes do not automatically improve performance. Most remaining errors are in rare and subtle emotion categories, so the next step should focus on label relationships and finer subject-context interaction.

</details>


### [127] [Learning Cross-View Semantic Priors for Single-Reference Unseen Object Pose Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22076)
*Jiahong Chen,Jinghao Wang,Ziwen Wang,Zi Wang,Banglei Guan,Qifeng Yu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新颖的单视角未知物体6D姿态估计方法，通过视图间早期语义交互和多重一致性约束提升未知物体的高鲁棒姿态估计能力，在多组基准测试中表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法常把视觉基础模型（VFM）的特征仅作为单视图描述符，导致在视图间不足以交换丰富的视觉-语义信息，影响严苛场景下的未知物体对应关系推断。作者旨在解决不同视角间语义特征交流不足对未知物体姿态估计鲁棒性的制约。

Method: 核心创新点为引入视图间语义交互（CVSI）机制，使得查询图像与参考图像中的基于VFM的token可以传递和融合密集的语义线索，建立跨视图先验。为保证这一语义先验对3D点云对应关系训练的可靠性，设计了两个损失约束：1）视图内结构保持损失（IVSP），保证交互期间token内在结构不变；2）参考锚定几何一致性损失（RAGC），保持解码后的空间特征表示一致。最终通过加权SVD从特征对应关系中恢复物体6D姿态。

Result: 作者在BOP Challenge数据集（YCB-V和TUD-L）上构建了极具挑战性的视图对协议，评测在困难匹配场景下的方法鲁棒性。在六个基准测试和不同视图组合下，所提方法均取得了当前最优的性能，同时推理速度与同类方法持平。

Conclusion: 文中提出的方法显著提升了单参考图像对未知物体6D姿态估计的通用性和鲁棒性，为相关领域的实际应用提供了新思路。

Abstract: Single-reference unseen object 6D pose estimation reduces object onboarding by estimating poses of arbitrary novel objects from only one reference view. Recent correspondence-based pipelines have achieved robust performance with vision foundation model (VFM) features. However, they typically treat these features as intra-view descriptors, leaving dense visual-semantic cues, including appearance, structure, and context, insufficiently exchanged across views before geometric decoding. Consequently, the decoded point features may lack joint semantic and geometric discriminability, making correspondence estimation still difficult in challenging cases. Instead of processing features independently, we build the correspondence pipeline around an early cross-view semantic prior. Specifically, cross-view semantic interaction (CVSI) enables dense query and reference VFM tokens to exchange semantic context and form a cross-view prior. Nevertheless, direct CVSI may disturb the VFM token structure, while the resulting semantic prior still needs 3D representation consistency for rigid correspondence. To make this CVSI prior reliable for 3D correspondence learning, we introduce two complementary training-time constraints: the intra-view structure preservation (IVSP) loss preserves the original intra-view token affinity structure during interaction, while the reference-anchored geometric consistency (RAGC) loss enforces spatial representation consistency of decoded point features. The final pose is recovered from learned correspondences through weighted SVD. We further construct a challenging view-pair protocol from the BOP Challenge datasets YCB-V and TUD-L to evaluate robustness in difficult matching scenarios. Extensive experiments on six benchmarks under different view-pair settings show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance while maintaining comparable inference speed.

</details>


### [128] [Morphology-Aware Multimodal Representation Learning for Insect Phylogenetic Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22077)
*Zixuan Liu,Kaijie Yu,Chun He,Xiaoxu Cai,Xinhai Ye,Haishuai Wang,Gongyin Ye,Jiajun Bu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本研究提出了一种结合形态学描述和标本图像的多模态对齐框架，用于昆虫系统发育重建，并在Rove-Tree-11数据集上证明其能够提高系统发育树拓扑一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于图像的深度学习方法提取昆虫形态特征时，通常只依赖单一视觉模态，未能显式整合形态学语义，难以充分反映系统发育分析所需的形态信息。因此，亟需一种能融合多源形态信息的自动化方法，以更准确地进行系统发育推断。

Method: 提出一种结合标本图像和人工整理的形态描述的多模态对齐框架：首先基于视觉Transformer，采用参数高效微调和有监督对比学习，将图像和文本在共享潜空间中对齐。随后，将获得的图像嵌入作为连续性状输入Bayesian系统发育重建中，并在公开Rove-Tree-11数据集上进行多种特征提取和适配策略对比、消融实验。

Result: 多模态对齐框架在多个视觉骨干网络和特征适配策略下，均能提升系统发育树与参考谱系的拓扑结构一致性。消融实验也表明形态学语义的融合是性能提升的关键。

Conclusion: 融合了显式形态描述的多模态对齐框架能有效提取形态学相关的视觉特征，为自动化系统发育重建提供新的思路，有望提升昆虫等生物系统发育树的重建准确性。

Abstract: Morphological traits provide important evidence for phylogenetic reconstruction and evolutionary relationship analysis. Recent image-based approaches have introduced deep learning, particularly convolutional models, to derive morphological features from specimen images, but these methods generally rely on single-modality visual representations and do not explicitly incorporate morphological semantics. This study proposes a morphology-aware multimodal alignment framework for insect phylogenetic reconstruction. The framework combines specimen images with curated morphological descriptions by adapting a vision transformer through parameter-efficient fine-tuning and supervised contrastive learning, followed by image-text alignment in a shared latent space. The learned image embeddings are then used as continuous traits for Bayesian phylogenetic reconstruction. On the public Rove-Tree-11 dataset, comparative and ablation experiments across multiple visual backbones and feature adaptation strategies demonstrate that multimodal alignment improves topological agreement with the reference phylogeny. The results indicate that the proposed framework can derive morphology-aware visual traits for computational phylogenetic reconstruction.

</details>


### [129] [BAC-JEPA: Label-Efficient Breast Arterial Calcification Segmentation via Synthetic Mammography-Guided Supervision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22089)
*Scott Chase Waggener,Lakshman Tamil*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种高效分割乳腺动脉钙化（BAC）的方法BAC-JEPA，通过生成合成的动脉钙化并插入真实钼靶背景实现训练，减少了对昂贵的专家标注的依赖。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 乳腺动脉钙化作为心血管风险的新兴生物标志物，其定量应用依赖高质量分割，但获得专家逐像素标注成本高，因此亟需高效且标注经济的分割方法。

Method: 首先挑选低BAC概率的真实乳腺X线片作为背景，然后程序化生成动脉结构和不同疾病程度的钙化，合成包含多种干扰因素的训练图像。将合成的精准分割掩膜与自监督的视觉Transformer编码器和高分辨率卷积解码器结合，用于训练和生成全分辨率分割图。

Result: 在75,472例乳腺X线片中选取背景，利用1万例生成合成训练集，并在人类标注数据集（BacSeg）和合成验证集上进行迁移评估。较大骨干的IoU达0.5325，Dice值0.6357，分割概率图的图像级分类AUROC为0.8719。推理速度也较快，合成一张图像仅需约2.7秒。

Conclusion: 基于BAC的合成监督训练能有效实现无人工像素级标注情况下的有用特征迁移，但实际临床落地前仍需专家审核的真实乳腺图像分割进行验证与标定。

Abstract: Breast arterial calcification (BAC) on screening mammograms is an emerging cardiovascular risk biomarker, but quantitative use requires reproducible segmentation and expert pixel-level labels are costly. We present BAC-JEPA, a label-efficient segmentation framework trained on procedurally generated arterial calcification inserted into real mammographic backgrounds with exact masks. Candidate backgrounds were selected from model-screened mammograms with low predicted BAC response; the generator samples arterial structure, disease burden, radiographic appearance, and hard-negative distractors including nonarterial calcifications and metallic objects. Synthetic masks are paired with mammography self-supervised Vision Transformer encoders and a high-resolution convolutional decoder to produce full-resolution segmentation maps. The study used 75,472 mammography studies from 34,956 patients for background selection and representation learning, trained on synthetic images from 10,000 backgrounds, selected checkpoints with 1,000 development backgrounds, and evaluated transfer on all 1,000 human-labeled BacSeg synthetic 2D mammograms. On held-out synthetic validation data, the larger backbone achieved IoU 0.5325 and Dice 0.6357. On BacSeg, image-level classification from segmentation probability maps reached AUROC 0.8719, with 0.8547 for the smaller backbone. Four-view inference required 110.68--213.63 ms on an RTX 5090 GPU, and severe-preset synthetic image generation averaged 2.7071 s per image on a multicore workstation. These results indicate that BAC-specific synthetic supervision can produce useful image-level transfer without human pixel-level training masks, while expert-reviewed real-mammogram segmentation remains necessary for clinical validation and calibration.

</details>


### [130] [Cross-View Yaw Estimation in Location Uncertainty with Line-Aligning Yaw Scoring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22094)
*Taeho Kang,Nairan Zhang,Yelin Kim,Yujiao Shi,Youngki Lee*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的跨视角定位的偏航角估计方法——LAYS，通过无关位置信息地、径向不变的线共识投票机制，实现了高精度（亚角度级）偏航角估算。方法在多个数据集上表现优异，显著提升了未知偏航情况下的定位性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有地面图像与鸟瞰图（BEV）之间的跨视角定位方法，将偏航角和位置紧密耦合，并依赖高度或投影假设，在偏航不确定性大时准确性会显著下降，亟需一种可在未知偏航下鲁棒估算偏航角的新方法。

Method: 提出LAYS方法，将偏航与位置精度解耦，利用影像到BEV像素径向方向的径向不变特性，通过特征相似性把BEV像素与地面图像列进行匹配，统计它们诱导出的偏航投票，在三维离散空间中形成偏航角的峰值，从而实现精确的偏航角估计，无需准确的位置信息。

Result: LAYS在Mapillary、Ford、KITTI和VIGOR等多个数据集上，在未知偏航角条件下，特别是正常视场（FoV）+未知偏航时，性能提升显著（提升28到45个百分点），同时作为3-自由度（3-DoF）定位中的偏航先验也能带来下游定位性能提升。

Conclusion: LAYS方法能够有效解耦偏航和位置估计，显著提升了跨视角定位在不确定条件下的鲁棒性和精度，是现有偏航估算难题的有力突破。

Abstract: Accurate yaw estimation is a bottleneck in cross-view localization between ground view and Bird's Eye View (BEV). Existing methods couple yaw with translation and rely on height or projection assumptions that degrade under large yaw ambiguity. We disentangle yaw from location accuracy and introduce LAYS, a radially invariant line-consensus voting method. By exploiting the radial invariance of our formulation, we achieve sub-degree yaw precision via 3D voting over all candidate poses, while eliminating the need for accurate location. Our key observation is that a ground-image column matched to BEV pixels induces the same yaw across all camera positions along the radial direction of the pixels. LAYS matches BEV pixels to ground columns using feature similarity and accumulates the induced yaw votes into discrete 3D bins, where correct correspondences along the radial line concentrate into a sharp peak for the correct yaw. Experiments on Mapillary, Ford, KITTI, and VIGOR show significant gains under unknown yaw, particularly for normal FoV with unknown yaw (+28$\sim$45\%p), and using LAYS as a yaw prior improves downstream 3-DoF localization.

</details>


### [131] [Accurate identification and measurement of the precipitate area by two-stage deep neural networks in novel chromium-based alloys](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22112)
*Zeyu Xia,Kan Ma,Sibo Cheng,Thomas Blackburn,Ziling Peng,Kewei Zhu,Weihang Zhang,Dunhui Xiao,Alexander J Knowles,Rossella Arcucci*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本研究提出DT-SegNet，一种结合YOLOv5与SegFormer的端到端深度学习方法，高效且准确地从电子显微镜图像中自动检测与分割铬基高温合金的析出相。该方法大幅优于现有主流分割工具，有助于推进高温合金的微观结构分析与开发。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高温极端环境下先进材料的性能高度依赖于其微观结构，尤其是强化相的大小与分布。目前，铬基高温合金作为新兴候选材料在高温应用（如聚光太阳能）中备受关注。但传统的图像处理方法对背景噪声敏感、泛化能力差且需大量人工操作，严重制约了高通量合金开发。

Method: 提出了一种两阶段深度学习框架DT-SegNet，结合了YOLOv5的高效检测能力和SegFormer视觉Transformer的高精度分割能力，用于电子显微镜图像中的析出相自动检测和分割。通过与Weka和ilastik等主流工具对比，评估该方法的性能。

Result: 实验结果显示，DT-SegNet在准确率、精确率、召回率和F1分数等多个指标上都显著优于Weka和ilastik等现有主流分割工具，大大提升了析出相识别和测量的效率和准确性。

Conclusion: DT-SegNet不仅能够极大提高高温合金开发过程中微结构分析的自动化和高通量能力，还为相关材料研究提供了有效工具，对推动新型合金的开发和研究具有重要意义。

Abstract: The performance of advanced materials for extreme environments is underpinned by their microstructure, including the size and distribution of reinforcing phases. Chromium-based superalloys are a recently proposed alternative to conventional face-centred-cubic superalloys for high-temperature applications, such as Concentrated Solar Power, and their development requires efficient measurement of precipitate volume fraction and size distribution from electron microscopy images. Traditional fixed-threshold image processing is sensitive to background noise, generalises poorly across materials, and requires substantial manual measurement effort. To address these bottlenecks, this study proposes DT-SegNet, an end-to-end two-stage deep learning scheme based on YOLOv5 and SegFormer for object detection and segmentation in electron microscopy images. The approach combines the training efficiency of convolutional neural networks at the detection stage with the segmentation accuracy of a Vision Transformer. Numerical experiments show that DT-SegNet substantially outperforms state-of-the-art segmentation tools offered by Weka and ilastik across metrics including accuracy, precision, recall, and F1-score. The model provides a useful tool for alloy-development microstructure examinations and helps address the large datasets associated with high-throughput alloy development.

</details>


### [132] [Surgical Anatomy Recognition with Context Learning using Foundation Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22124)
*Ronald L. P. D. de Jong,Tim J. M. Jaspers,Raf A. H. Vervoort,Aron F. H. A. Bakker,Yiping Li,Jip L. Tolenaar,Jelle P. Ruurda,Willem M. Brinkman,Josien P. W. Pluim,Marcel Breeuwer,Daan de Geus,Fons van der Sommen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个大规模、专注于微创手术解剖结构识别的数据集（ATLAS-120k）与新的视频语义分割模型（ATLAS），旨在提升手术视场下的自动化解剖结构识别能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有手术计算机视觉方法主要针对自然场景，缺乏专为手术解剖结构设计的方法且高质量标注数据有限，导致微创手术中重要解剖结构识别的研究受限，影响手术安全与效果。

Method: 作者首先构建了一个包含14种手术、100例视频、12万帧标注的大型数据集，采用专家标注、自动扩散、迭代优化和外科医生核验等方式保证数据质量。其次，提出了ATLAS模型，区别于传统方法侧重目标追踪，ATLAS利用基础模型嵌入结合轻量级时序推理，综合手术类型、阶段等上下文，实现时序上一致且准确的解剖结构预测。

Result: ATLAS数据集和模型能实现实时、鲁棒的手术场景理解，提高了解剖结构识别的质量与一致性。所有代码、数据和标注工具均已开源。

Conclusion: 本工作为手术视场下的解剖结构识别提供了新的基础资源和高效方法，有助于开发面向临床、可实用的微创手术导航与辅助系统。

Abstract: Accurate recognition of anatomical structures is essential for safe and effective minimally invasive surgery (MIS), yet it remains underexplored in surgical computer vision due to limited annotated data and methods tailored primarily to natural scenes. In this work, we present a combined dataset and model framework to advance anatomy-aware perception in MIS. First, we introduce ATLAS-120k, a large-scale clip-level semantic segmentation dataset comprising over 120,000 annotated frames from 100 surgical videos spanning 14 procedures and multiple modalities, including laparoscopic and robot-assisted surgery. The dataset captures substantial procedural variability and was created using a scalable annotation pipeline that integrates expert manual labeling, automated propagation, iterative refinement, and surgeon verification to ensure high-quality annotations. Second, we propose ATLAS (Anatomy Recognition with Context Learning using Foundation Representations), a video semantic segmentation model specifically designed for surgical anatomy recognition. Unlike conventional approaches that emphasize object tracking, ATLAS leverages foundation-model embeddings together with lightweight temporal reasoning to incorporate contextual cues such as procedure type, surgical phase, and short-term visual memory. This design enables temporally consistent and accurate predictions while maintaining real-time feasibility. Together, the dataset and model establish a practical foundation for robust surgical scene understanding and support the development of clinically applicable guidance systems for minimally invasive surgery. The models, dataset annotations and annotation platform are publicly available at: https://github.com/TimJaspers0801/ATLAS.

</details>


### [133] [Feed-forward Motion In-betweening for Any 4D](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22131)
*Hiroki Nishizawa,Hubert P. H. Shum,Yoshihiro Fukuhara,Hirokatsu Kataoka,Shigeo Morishima*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种高效、可控的基于关键帧的4D网格动画生成方法，对现有生成速度慢或可控性差的问题进行了改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着对4D动态（时变三维网格）的建模需求增加，目前方法要么推理速度极慢，要么在空间及时间维度上的可控性不佳。此外，长期序列的生成还容易产生累积误差。因缺乏大规模多样4D网格数据，研究受到限制。

Method: 1. 提出基于关键帧的in-betweening框架，适用于任意4D网格。2. 采用逐帧mesh VAE，将每帧编码成基于参考网格的拓扑无关latent tokens，实现关键帧调控。3. 设计基于关键帧调控的rectified flow模型，利用MMDiT骨干网络对非关键帧进行预测、合成。

Result: 该方法在DyMesh16与DyMesh32数据集上实现了较高的生成效果和更强的空间-时间上的可控性，优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 提出的关键帧条件生成框架既快又可控，可推广到任意4D网格动画生成任务，能缓解以往推理慢和误差累积等问题。

Abstract: 4D dynamics (3D geometry evolving over time) is a fundamental representation of the physical world and plays a crucial role in world modeling (e.g., animation and games). Owing to the scarcity of large-scale, long-horizon 4D mesh data with arbitrary shapes, early text-to-4D methods rely on distillation or test-time optimization from video diffusion priors, making inference prohibitively slow. Recent feed-forward generators greatly reduce inference cost but offer limited spatiotemporal controllability, and short-horizon generation often leads to error accumulation in long-horizon sequences. We propose a novel feed-forward in-betweening framework for arbitrary 4D meshes with keyframe conditioning. Building on universal mesh-animation latents, we introduce a frame-wise mesh VAE that encodes each frame into topology-agnostic latent tokens anchored by a reference mesh for keyframe conditioning. We further introduce a keyframe-conditioned rectified flow model with an MMDiT backbone that synthesizes non-keyframe frames conditioned on sparse keyframes. Experiments show strong performance and improved controllability on both DyMesh16 and DyMesh32 benchmarks.

</details>


### [134] [SAGE: An Expert-Annotated South Asian GI Endoscopy Dataset for Multimodal Learning and Hallucination Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22144)
*Niyoj Oli,Sachin Acharya,Sandesh Pokhrel,Sanjay Bhandari,Ramesh Rana,Nikesh Mani Shrestha,Ram Bahadur Gurung,Yash Raj Shrestha,Prashnna K Gyawali,Binod Bhattarai*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本论文提出了面向南亚地区的GI内镜数据集SAGE，旨在解决现有公开数据集地域偏见的问题，并验证了现有模型在针对南亚数据时的性能大幅下降。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 南亚地区胃肠道肿瘤的发病率越来越高，但由于医疗资源匮乏，依赖AI辅助诊断成为趋势。然而，现有公开数据多来自欧洲，缺乏南亚代表性，导致模型可能有地域偏见，影响诊断效果。

Method: 构建了涵盖1,300张南亚GI内镜图片、标注、标签和近1.5万个问答对的SAGE数据集，用于多标签分类、图像字幕生成和视觉问答等任务，并用其对主流多类别分类模型和大规模多模态模型（LMMs）进行了性能基准测试，考察了人口分布变动对模型表现的影响。

Result: 实验表明，当前针对欧洲地区训练的多类别分类模型在该南亚数据集上的性能平均下降高达58%；主流LMMs在解剖标志物检测和异常检测上的GREEN指标也大幅下降，分别为0.308和0.410。

Conclusion: 现有GI影像AI模型存在显著的地域偏见；SAGE数据集的发布有助于开发更具包容性和泛化能力的胃肠道AI诊断工具，并推动该领域在资源匮乏区域的发展。

Abstract: Gastrointestinal cancers represent a growing health burden in the South Asian region, driven largely by rapid changes in socio-economic conditions & lifestyle habits. However, early diagnosis of such malignancies remains a significant challenge, largely due to a lack of modern equipment, lack of financial support, and a scarcity of GI experts. AI-assisted diagnosis & report generation, show great promise in alleviating this problem by providing low-skill manpower the technical expertise to perform diagnosis. However, almost all open-source, publicly available datasets are predominantly collected from the European region, with no representation from the South Asian region. The lack of open-source GI datasets from diverse geographic regions has made it difficult to assess whether population bias is present in existing models, and to develop geographically inclusive AI tools for automated GI diagnosis. To address this gap, we introduce SAGE: An Expert-Annotated South Asian GI Endoscopy dataset for image captioning, multi-label classification, and visual question answering (VQA) tasks. It consists of 1,300 images, their captions along with hallucination tag, 18 labels and 14,726 question-answer pairs making it well-suited for diverse range of tasks including classification, benchmarking, and fine-tuning large multimodal models (LMMs). We further conducted benchmarking of multi-class classifiers on the effect of population shift in GI imaging AI tasks, and contemporary LMMs on their performance. Our study reveals that task-specific models, such as multi-class classification models, suffer the most, with an average performance drop of 58% when evaluated on the South Asian dataset. For contemporary LMMs, benchmarking reveals a substantial drop in the average GREEN score for anatomical landmark detection (0.308) and abnormality detection (0.410).

</details>


### [135] [Improving Reasoning in Vision-Language Models via Perception Verified Self-Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22158)
*Sourabh Sharma,Sonam Gupta,Sadbhawna Thakur*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种感知验证的自训练框架，通过独立验证视觉理解，提高视觉-语言模型（VLMs）的具象推理能力，有效减少视觉幻觉和语言投机问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类级别的视觉-语言推理仍然极具挑战。虽然链式思维（CoT）可以提升模型推理，但数据依赖人工标注或专有模型，成本高且难扩展；而自训练虽然成本低，但现有方法易产生视觉幻觉和语言捷径，原因是训练数据仅基于答案正确性筛选，缺乏视觉验证。

Method: 1）提出感知验证的自训练框架，采用“描述-推理-结论”模板分离感知与推理，可独立验证视觉理解。2）针对缺少人工标注描述（caption）的问题，提出PerceptEval无监督方法，评估图像描述与图像及文本元素的一致性。3）结合描述验证和答案正确性，将样本分为三类（简单/中等/困难），并设计两阶段课程学习方法：先用简单样本训练，再在经验证的描述指导下再生推理并加入中等难度样本，仅保留结论正确的。

Result: 所提方法通过感知验证，有效减少了视觉幻觉和语言捷径现象，提高了视觉-语言模型推理的准确性和可解释性。

Conclusion: 感知验证和课程学习可以显著提升视觉-语言模型的推理质量和视觉扎根，表明自训练配合有效的视觉理解验证机制在大规模推理数据生成和模型提升方面具有巨大潜力。

Abstract: Achieving human-like reasoning in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) remains a long-standing challenge. Recent approaches leverage Chain-of-Thought (CoT) rationales generated by human annotators or proprietary models to improve reasoning, which is costly and difficult to scale. Self-training offers a promising alternative by using models own outputs as supervision. However, existing methods often suffer from visual hallucinations -- where rationales describe non-existent visual content, and language shortcuts -- where predictions rely on textual priors rather than true visual grounding, as rationales are typically filtered only by answer correctness without verifying visual perception. To address this limitation, we propose a perception-verified self-training framework that enforces visually grounded reasoning. First, our method employs a CoT template (caption-reasoning-conclusion) that disentangles perception from reasoning, enabling independent verification of visual understanding. To compensate for the absence of ground-truth captions, we propose PerceptEval, an unsupervised method that evaluates caption quality based on its alignment with visual and textual elements present in the image. Using caption verification together with answer correctness, we partition the data into three subsets: easy (correct caption and conclusion), medium (correct caption but incorrect conclusion), and hard (incorrect caption). Building on this partitioning, we design a two-stage curriculum learning strategy. In Stage 1, the model is trained on easy examples and subsequently in Stage 2, medium samples are incorporated through a caption-guided reasoning enhancement procedure that regenerates reasoning conditioned on verified captions. Only regenerated samples with the correct conclusions are retained.

</details>


### [136] [From Convolution to Transformer: A Comparative Study of U-Net Variants for Brain Tumor and Retinal Vessel Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22168)
*Khoa Pham,Sindhuja Penchala,Jiacheng Li,Andy Perkins,Noorbakhsh Amiri Golilarz*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文比较了五种基于U-Net的医学图像分割模型，在脑肿瘤和视网膜图像分割任务中的表现，发现Swin UNETR（基于transformer结构）取得了最佳性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统U-Net网络由于基于卷积结构，难以捕获长距离依赖和全局上下文信息，限制了其在复杂医学图像分割任务中的表现。

Method: 作者对U-Net 3D、Residual U-Net、Attention U-Net、UNETR和Swin UNETR五种架构进行了对比实验，在BraTS 2023（脑肿瘤）和DRIVE（视网膜血管）两个公开数据集上测试。

Result: Swin UNETR在BraTS 2023和DRIVE数据集上分别取得了0.8965和0.8078的Dice分数，整体性能最好。

Conclusion: 基于transformer的U-Net变体（如Swin UNETR）在需要全局语境建模的分割任务中更有效，而残差学习有助于精细结构分割。结果为医学图像分割模型选型提供了实用参考。

Abstract: Medical image segmentation plays an important role in computer aided diagnosis, treatment planning, and disease monitoring. U-Net has been widely used for biomedical image segmentation because of its encoder decoder structure and skip connections. However, conventional convolution based U-Net models may have limited ability to capture long range dependencies and global contextual information, which can affect performance in complex segmentation tasks. This paper presents a comparative study of five U-Net based architectures: U-Net 3D, Residual U-Net, Attention U-Net, UNETR, and Swin UNETR. The models are evaluated on two benchmark datasets: BraTS 2023 for brain tumor segmentation and DRIVE for retinal vessel segmentation. Experimental results show that Swin UNETR achieves the best overall performance, with Dice scores of 0.8965 on BraTS 2023 and 0.8078 on DRIVE. The results suggest that transformer based U-Net variants are effective for segmentation tasks requiring global contextual modeling, while residual learning remains useful for fine structure segmentation. This study provides practical insights into model selection for medical image segmentation across volumetric MRI and retinal imaging tasks.

</details>


### [137] [Dual-Stream EEG Decoding for 3D Visual Perception](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22182)
*Ninon Lizé Masclef,Taisija Demcenko,Antonella Catanzaro,Nataliya Kosmyna*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本论文提出了一种仿生的双通路大脑解码模型，从脑电信号中同时解读3D物体身份和空间朝向，并能基于神经活动实现三维重建。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大脑解码和3D形状感知一直是神经科学和人工智能领域的难题，尤其是高维信息的分离与解释。本研究受到生物视觉通路机制的启发，旨在提升大脑解码的准确性和可解释性，实现更细致的3D形状感知。

Method: 设计了仿生的双通路架构，分别处理物体身份（腹侧通路）和空间朝向（背侧通路），通过圆形回归预测角度，并提出EEG条件多视角扩散方法用于三维重建。在物体连续旋转下从EEG信号中提取信息。

Result: 模型能够成功解码EEG信号中的物体身份和空间朝向，并实现基于神经活动的3D重建。可解释性分析显示，腹侧、背侧及运动相关通道在解码过程中按时间动态协作，而不是固定腹侧主导。

Conclusion: 该研究突破性地实现了复杂3D形状的脑电解码与重建，对理解大脑视觉通路和人工智能中的大脑解码具有参考价值，并展现了多脑区协作的时序特征。

Abstract: This paper explores a novel brain decoding model for 3D shape perception through a dual pathway architecture mirroring biological vision. Our bio-inspired approach implements separate decoding modules for object identity and spatial orientation, inspired by ventral and dorsal pathways, during continuous rotations. We employ circular regression for angle prediction and develop EEG-conditioned multiview diffusion for 3D reconstruction. Our approach successfully decodes both object identity and spatial orientation from EEG signals and enables 3D reconstruction from neural activity, with interpretability analyses revealing temporally structured involvement of ventral, dorsal, and motor-related channels rather than a static ventral dominance in supporting object and angle decoding.

</details>


### [138] [Resolving Multi-Target Association in OFDM-based ISAC via Vision-aided Multi-Modal Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22195)
*Meng Hua,Chenghong Bian,Deniz Gunduz*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种视觉辅助的OFDM-ISAC系统，通过融合无线与视觉信息解决多目标环境下参数关联与分辨率受限的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在多目标场景下，传统OFDM-ISAC系统通过延迟-多普勒图（DDM）参数提取存在目标峰值无法对应具体目标、同一分辨单元内目标无法区分的问题，亟需新的方法提升定位与目标识别能力。

Method: 提出了将街景图像通过深度联合源信道编码（DeepJSCC）嵌入到OFDM波形与感知信号一同发送，接收端重建图像后用YOLOv5识别检测目标，再利用多模态网络融合视觉与DDM及几何信息。为提升高维分类器训练稳定性，引入了KL损失与三角标签。

Result: 在Blender仿真车载平台上，实现了16厘米的定位均方根误差及10.8纳秒的延迟误差。消融实验显示，移除视觉模块后定位精度下降60倍。

Conclusion: 视觉信息能有效突破ISAC系统单一模态下的数据关联与分辨率瓶颈，提升多目标环境下的感知与定位能力。

Abstract: Orthogonal frequency division multiplexing (OFDM)-based integrated sensing and communication (ISAC) systems commonly extract target parameters by peak-searching a delay-Doppler map (DDM) constructed from reflected pilots. In multi-target scenarios, this results in ambiguity: the DDM does not reveal which physical target produced which peak, and two targets within the same delay-Doppler resolution cell cannot be separated. We propose a vision-assisted OFDM-ISAC framework that resolves both limitations by fusing wireless and visual modalities. The transmitter encodes an onboard street-view image with deep joint source-channel coding (DeepJSCC) and transmits it over the same OFDM waveform used for sensing; the receiver reconstructs the image, runs a fine-tuned YOLOv5 detector and fuses the resulting per-target features (bounding-box coordinates and class labels) with the DDM and transmitter-receiver geometry through a learned multi-modal network. To stabilize training of the high dimensional delay and Doppler classifiers, we introduce a Kullback Leibler loss against triangular soft labels centered on the ground-truth bin. On a Blender-rendered vehicular testbed, the proposed framework achieves a 16 cm localization root mean square error (RMSE) and a 10.8 ns delay RMSE. An ablation study confirms that removing the visual modality causes a 60x degradation in localization. These results highlight the potential of vision to overcome the data-association and resolution limits of single-modality ISAC.

</details>


### [139] [Multi4D: High-Fidelity Dynamic Gaussian Splatting via Multi-Level Competitive Allocation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22197)
*Rui Wang,Quentin Lohmeyer,Siyu Tang,Mirko Meboldt*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Multi4D提出了一种多级竞争分配的高保真动态图高斯Splatting方法，在保持运动一致性的同时捕捉精细动态细节，实现了优异的渲染和4D分割性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有动态图高斯Splatting方法在运动一致性与视觉保真度之间存在矛盾：形变方法易于过度分解运动导致细节损失，而4D原语方法则造成超参数化和存储负担，且影响对象一致性。

Method: 多级结构分配表示能力，包括静态结构、持续动态几何和瞬态外观三个层次，通过共享栅格化和残差驱动优化使各层动态竞争，适应性分配建模资源，无需事先分解。

Result: 该方法以更少动态原语即可实现实时高质量渲染，并显著提高4D分割精度和速度，减少存储和计算成本。

Conclusion: Multi4D有效兼顾动态图场的运动一致性和细节捕捉，在渲染和语义分割任务中均达到了当前最优效果，为高效动态图场建模提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Dynamic 3D Gaussian splatting faces a fundamental tension between motion consistency and visual fidelity. Deformation-based approaches preserve temporal correspondence but suffer from motion over-factorization, oversmoothing high-frequency dynamics. In contrast, 4D-primitive methods capture fine visual details yet incur temporal overparameterization, breaking object identity and leading to severe storage overhead. To resolve this, we introduce Multi4D, a framework for high-fidelity dynamic Gaussian Splatting based on multi-level competitive allocation. Instead of a monolithic representation, we distribute modeling capacity across three structured levels: static structure, persistent dynamic geometry, and transient appearance primitives. Through shared rasterization and residual-driven optimization, these levels dynamically compete to explain photometric error, enabling adaptive specialization without pre-assigned decomposition. This allocation preserves long-term motion consistency while capturing fine dynamic detail, achieving state-of-the-art rendering quality and real-time performance with significantly fewer dynamic primitives. Furthermore, because our representation explicitly tracks compact persistent Gaussians over time, semantic features can be embedded afterward, enabling Multi4D to achieve state-of-the-art 4D segmentation accuracy with an order-of-magnitude speedup. Project page: https://batfacewayne.github.io/Multi4D.io/

</details>


### [140] [MultiMem: Measuring and Mitigating Memorization in Multi-Modal Contrastive Learninga](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22220)
*Wenhao Wang,Franziska Boenisch,Michael Backes,Adam Dziedzic*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出MultiMem指标，首次用于量化多模态对比学习中的记忆现象，并通过方法分析和增强手段，实现了更高性能和更好泛化效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 以往关于记忆现象的研究多集中在视觉领域，对多模态对比学习中的记忆现象缺乏系统性研究。作者旨在填补这一空白，分析并缓解多模态记忆问题。

Method: 提出了MultiMem，这是首个量化多模态对比学习记忆程度的评价指标。利用该指标，系统性分析各模态及其对记忆的影响，并探索跨模态增强方法以降低记忆程度。

Result: 分析发现，语义错位对记忆影响最大，文本主导记忆现象，其次依次是视频、图像和音频。通过对所有模态进行针对性增强，有效降低了模型记忆并提升了整体性能。

Conclusion: 论文建立了多模态对比学习中记忆度的度量与缓解体系，为防止有害数据保留、提升模型泛化性能提供了首个理论与实践框架。

Abstract: Memorization in machine learning models enables high performance on rare in-distribution samples by capturing their atypical patterns. However, it also causes harmful retention of noise and outliers, degrading generalization. While memorization has been extensively studied in both supervised and self-supervised learning in the vision domain, it remains unexplored in multi-modal contrastive learning. We address this gap by introducing MultiMem, the first metric designed to quantify memorization in multi-modal contrastive learning. Through our systematic analysis, we demonstrate that cross-modal semantic misalignment has the strongest influence on memorization, with text being the dominant modality driving memorization, followed by video, image, and audio. We show that targeted augmentations applied across all modalities effectively reduce memorization as measured by our MultiMem metric and improve model performance. Overall, this work establishes the first framework for measuring and mitigating memorization in multi-modal contrastive learning, preventing harmful data retention and contributing to higher-performing models.

</details>


### [141] [Efficient Document Tampering Localization with Multi-Level Discrepancy Features and Unified DCT-Quantization Embedding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22285)
*Mohamed Dhouib,Ye Zhu,Sonia Vanier,Aymen Shabou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了DiffNet，一种融合RGB和DCT的高效文档篡改定位网络，在跨领域与真人篡改检测任务中均显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前文档篡改定位领域主要依赖于与训练分布接近的合成数据集进行评估，对于跨域和真人制造的伪造文档检测效果不佳，同时现存方法较少关注主干网络的改进，亟需设计能提升泛化能力的新模型。

Method: 提出RGB和DCT早期融合架构DiffNet，采用多级差异变换将每一主干阶段输出转化为仅含大小信息的特征，并设计轻量高效、具频率感知的DCT主干网络，联合量化信息进行特征嵌入。

Result: DiffNet在跨域及真人篡改文档定位任务上均获得了最先进的性能，对比上一代方法提升约30%，且推理速度提升高达7倍。

Conclusion: DiffNet通过结构创新有效提升了真实场景下文档篡改定位的准确性与效率，为后续相关领域研究提供了优秀基线。

Abstract: Localizing document tampering is extremely challenging, as manipulations are crafted to appear visually consistent and often leave only subtle traces that are nearly invisible to the human eye. In prior work, evaluation has been largely dominated by synthetic benchmarks that closely match the training distribution, and methods have shown steady progress under this setting. However, these gains often translate poorly to human-made forgeries and to cross-domain evaluation, where both the source documents and the tampering pipeline can change, leading to a distribution shift. In addition, since the introduction of the Frequency Perception Head for the discrete cosine transform (DCT) modality, it has become a standard choice, and subsequent work has largely focused on downstream modules and fusion strategies rather than revisiting the backbone itself. To help close this gap in cross-domain performance and improve the DCT backbone design, we propose \textbf{DiffNet}, a relatively simple yet effective RGB--DCT early-fusion architecture driven by two key design choices. First, to ensure that the decoder aggregates multi-scale inconsistency evidence rather than operating on raw, content-heavy activations, we apply a lightweight multi-level discrepancy transformation at the output of each backbone stage, replacing features with magnitude-only responses to learned zero-sum filters. Second, we design an efficient DCT-domain backbone that relies on a lightweight frequency-index-aware DCT--quantization joint embedding. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on cross-domain and human-made document tampering localization, outperforming prior methods by around 30\%, with up to $7\times$ higher throughput than the previous best model.

</details>


### [142] [Towards Accurate and Robust Surveillance Roadside IVD via Trackletized Audio-Visual Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22299)
*Xiwen Li,Xiaoya Tang,Bodong Zhang,Tolga Tasdizen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了TAVR-IVD，一个用于静止车辆检测的多模态音视频框架，通过多目标跟踪引导提升检测稳定性与泛化能力，并在跨天和跨地点的数据集上验证了其鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的基于整帧融合的方法容易过拟合于特定场景背景，时序判断不稳定，且缺乏显式的空间对齐机制，导致在域迁移和数据使用效率上表现不佳。因此需要一种更稳健、高效且能适应多样场景的新方法。

Method: TAVR-IVD方法首先检测车辆、利用检测结果生成跟踪轨迹（tracklets），再基于每辆车的tracklet进行空转状态分类。方法通过tracklet提升信噪比和判别稳定性，同时使用显式的空间先验对车辆与麦克风进行对齐。此外，系统无需强依赖检测器，并能以有限的标注适应新环境。在实验部分，扩展了两个数据集（AVIVD-LT和AVIVD-M），分别覆盖跨天和跨地点的域迁移测试。

Result: 与全帧融合方法相比，TAVR-IVD在域迁移、数据利用率和判别稳定性等方面表现更佳。实验表明其能在仅有限标注条件下实现更强的泛化和部署鲁棒性。

Conclusion: TAVR-IVD方法通过引入多目标跟踪和显式空间对齐，大幅改善了静止车辆检测在跨域场景下的鲁棒性和效率，为相关多模态融合任务提供了新的思路。

Abstract: Idling Vehicle Detection (IVD) seeks to determine, at the final frame of a video clip, whether any vehicle is idling, meaning the vehicle is stationary with its engine running, using synchronized video from a remote surveillance camera and multichannel audio captured by spatially distributed wireless microphones along the roadside. Prior full-image, clip-level fusion approaches tend to overfit scene background and full-frame context, produce unstable temporal decisions, and lack an explicit spatial prior to align vehicles with microphones, which makes them brittle under domain shift and data inefficient. Instead, we introduce TAVR-IVD, an audio-visual framework guided by multi-object tracking. Our method detects vehicles, links detections into tracklets, and classifies each vehicle by operating on its tracklet. This design raises the effective signal-to-noise ratio, stabilizes temporal decisions through tracklets, enforces an explicit spatial prior to align vehicles with microphones, and adapts across domains with limited calibration annotations while remaining detector agnostic and efficient. To evaluate deployment robustness, we further curate two evaluation extensions, AVIVD-LT and AVIVD-M, covering inter-day and cross-site shifts.

</details>


### [143] [T-IMPACT: A Severity-Aware Benchmark for Contextual Image-Text Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22339)
*Gagandeep Singh,Aaditya Yadav,Priyanka Singh*

Main category: cs.CV
