In this work, we focused on the allocation of real-robot measurement time between system identification and domain randomization. We studied this tradeoff in a controlled sim-to-sim pendulum setting, where a hidden-parameter model stands in for the physical robot, and the experiment sweeps identification rollouts against the width of the randomization distribution. Across the reality gaps and noise levels we tested, the measurement budget did most of the work. A small number of identification rollouts closed most of the transfer gap, and once any real data was available, policies performed best when trained at the estimated parameters rather than over a widened randomization band. Broad randomization that contained the true system still did not substitute for measurement. These results hold in a benign regime where the dynamics are identifiable and only two parameters are unknown, so structural model mismatch remains the setting where randomization breadth may become more valuable. Overall, our results suggest that sim-to-real pipelines should first measure the parameters they can and reserve randomization for the uncertainty that remains.

</details>


### [512] [Dynamics, stability, and energy efficiency of an energy-recycling rimless wheel with spring-clutch legs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22073)
*Tongchen Lin,Yanqiu Zheng,Chuhan Zhang,Ruigang Chen,Yizhar Or,Mingyi Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种带有弹簧-离合腿的能量回收无轮辐轮结构，通过储存步态中冲击引发的弹性能量并在下一步循环重新利用以提升行走效率。数值仿真和原型实验均证明了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统无轮辐轮或依赖阻尼装置的结构在足部着地时产生的弹性能未被充分利用，导致能效较低，亟需新机制回收并利用这部分能量以减少能耗。

Method: 设计了一种可锁定离合的弹簧腿机构，开发其混合动力学模型，并通过数值仿真分析其动态特性、本地周期步态稳定性及运输能耗（CoT），随后进行原型实物实验加以验证。

Result: 仿真表明，所提机构最大可使CoT降低16.13%（相较于基准结构）和超过50%（相较于刚性结构）；原型实验结果在1°坡道上实现了CoT约为0.02的无驱动步行，验证了实际可行性。

Conclusion: 所提带弹簧-离合的能量回收结构可有效提升步行能效，并在原型中实现了被动步行，展示出实际应用价值。

Abstract: This paper proposes an energy-recycling rimless wheel with spring-clutch legs. The proposed mechanism uses a lockable clutch to store part of the impact-induced elastic energy after foot contact and reinject it in the next gait cycle. First, we develop a hybrid dynamic model of the energy-recycling rimless wheel. Second, numerical simulations are used to examine the dynamics, local stability of periodic gaits, and the Cost of Transport (CoT) of the proposed mechanism. The simulation results show that the proposed mechanism reduces the CoT by up to 16.13% compared with a benchmark viscoelastic-legged rimless wheel with telescopic spring-damper legs. Compared with the rigid rimless wheel, the viscoelastic-legged and energy-recycling models reduce the CoT by more than 50%. The energy-recycling model also maintains locally stable periodic gaits over the tested slope and stiffness ranges. Finally, prototype experiments on an inclined plane are conducted to examine the feasibility of the proposed mechanism. The experimental results show that the proposed rimless wheel achieves passive walking on a shallow 1° slope, corresponding to a CoT of approximately 0.02. These results suggest that the proposed spring-clutch mechanism can improve the simulated walking efficiency of the energy-recycling rimless wheel, while the prototype experiments support the feasibility of passive walking with the mechanism.

</details>


### [513] [ACEsplat: Accelerated 3D Gaussian Scene Regression via RGB and Poses Only](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22091)
*Mingkai Liu,Haohua Que,Dikai Fan,Haojia Gao,Tianle Zhu,Handong Yao,Qian Zhang,Ruopeng Zhang,Xianliang Huang,Fei Qiao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为ACEsplat的方法，实现仅利用RGB图像和相机位姿、无需外部3D先验即可快速重建3D高斯表示，适用于机器人与AR等场景的高保真渲染。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于每场景的3D高斯渲染（3DGS）方法虽能获得高质量渲染效果，但通常依赖外部几何初始化（如SfM点云、深度估计），这在实际部署时存在流程慢且易失败的问题，限制了在机器人与增强现实中的实用性。

Method: ACEsplat方法包括两阶段流程：(1) 首先通过自监督的场景坐标回归（SCR）模块，在4-5分钟内构建高效的内部几何先验；(2) 然后融合SCR特征及坐标先验，通过轻量初始化模块快速生成高斯分布，最后进行每场景的3DGS优化。全流程只需RGB图像和相机位姿作为输入。

Result: ACEsplat在Wayspots数据集（实时SLAM位姿）上获得29.11dB PSNR，在Cambridge Landmarks数据集（SfM优化后位姿）上达到33.20dB PSNR。在RealEstate10K的2视角新视图合成场景下，也取得有竞争力的图像质量。整套流程可在单张GPU上15-25分钟完成每场景重建。

Conclusion: ACEsplat无需外部3D几何信息，仅用RGB和相机位姿就能高效获取高质量的场景几何和渲染效果，具备快速、实用的优势，适合机器人和混合现实应用中的现场场景重建与渲染。

Abstract: Per-scene 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enables high-fidelity rendering, but practical robotic and AR scene capture pipelines often depend on external geometric initialization (e.g., SfM point clouds or depth estimates), which can be slow and brittle in on-site deployment. We present ACEsplat, a fast per-scene optimization framework that reconstructs 3D Gaussian representations from RGB images and camera poses only, without requiring external 3D priors (e.g., precomputed SfM models or supervised depth maps). ACEsplat uses a two-stage pipeline: (1) a self-supervised scene coordinate regression (SCR) module builds an internal geometry prior within 4--5 minutes; (2) SCR features and coordinate priors are fused by a lightweight Gaussian initialization head, followed by per-scene 3DGS optimization. On static-view rendering, ACEsplat achieves 29.11 dB PSNR on Wayspots with real-time SLAM poses and 33.20 dB on Cambridge Landmarks with SfM-refined poses. On RealEstate10K sparse-view novel view synthesis, it achieves competitive image fidelity under a challenging 2-view setting. ACEsplat completes scene-specific SCR mapping and 3DGS reconstruction within 15--25 minutes on a single GPU, making it a practical RGB+pose-only solution for rapid scene setup in robotics and mixed-reality applications.

</details>


### [514] [KITE: Decoupling Kinematics and Interaction for Zero-Shot Cross-Embodiment Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22113)
*Qianxu Wang,Kuan Fang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了KITE方法，实现了机械臂在不同形态间的零样本操作策略迁移，无需额外演示数据，显著提升了迁移表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有操控策略强烈依赖于特定的机器人结构，导致在结构不同的机器人间，操作策略迁移困难。作者希望解决在无人机、双指夹持器、灵巧手等多种形态机器人之间零样本迁移的问题，提升跨硬件适应能力。

Method: 作者提出KITE方法，将操作分解为两个部分：与机器人形态无关的任务推理，以及与形态相关的运动控制。两部分通过基于接触模式的潜在意图表示衔接。共享策略模型通过演示预测意图，各个具体机械体仅需学习自身的运动解码器，无需重复收集操作演示。

Result: KITE方法在三个包含平行夹持器、灵巧手和组合体的操作任务上评估，能够实现完全未见过形态的零样本迁移，且在迁移成功率和适用机器人种类等方面均超越现有最新方法。

Conclusion: KITE实现了高效、泛化能力强的跨机器人形态操作策略迁移，大大降低了在新硬件上应用的学习成本，为实现通用机器人操控体系迈出了关键一步。

Abstract: Generalizing manipulation policies across robot embodiments remains difficult because standard policies entangle task reasoning with embodiment-specific motor control. We study zero-shot cross-embodiment manipulation, where a policy trained on source embodiments must be deployed on a structurally different target embodiment without additional task demonstrations. We introduce Kinematic Interaction Transfer across Embodiments (KITE), which decouples manipulation into embodiment-agnostic task reasoning and embodiment-specific motor control, connected through a learned latent representation of interaction intent based on contact patterns. Task reasoning is performed by a shared policy that predicts latent intents from source demonstrations, while motor control is performed by an intent-conditioned action decoder learned from each embodiment's kinematic model. With KITE, adaptation to a new embodiment requires only training a new action decoder using its kinematic model, without recollecting demonstration data. We evaluate KITE on three manipulation tasks spanning transfer between parallel grippers, dexterous hands, and composite embodiments. KITE consistently achieves zero-shot transfer to structurally different target embodiments, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines in transfer success and task-embodiment scope.

</details>


### [515] [DeformX: A Versatile Co-Simulation Framework for Deformable Linear Objects](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22116)
*Yi Yang,Xiang Fei,Lehong Wang,Chenhao Li,Zilin Dai,Henry Kou,Lu Li,Howie Choset*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出DeformX，一个将专用Cosserat杆物理引擎与NVIDIA Isaac Sim集成的共仿真框架，实现了可变形线性物体（如电线、绳索）的物理精确且视觉真实的仿真。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前DLO仿真在视觉真实感与物理精度之间难以兼顾。现有视觉仿真多依赖简单几何方法，缺乏物理基础，物理仿真又常简化为刚性链结构或通用软体，不能准确表现细长弹性结构的复杂力学行为（如弯曲、扭转和剪切），限制了机器人在实际任务中的学习和迁移。

Method: 该方法提出DeformX，将专用Cosserat杆物理引擎集成至NVIDIA Isaac Sim，实现对DLO动力学、自碰撞和与任意自由曲面网格的接触交互仿真。为获得高保真度视觉效果，利用网格蒙皮技术将离散杆变形映射到CAD模型上，兼容机器人学习流程。

Result: DeformX能够生成兼具视觉与物理真实性的数据，被用于合成数据生成与DLO操作策略学习。实验中用其生成的数据对SAM3模型微调，实现在真实电线分割任务中mAP@75提升10.2%，用其纯虚拟训练出的机械臂绳摆操作策略，在真实环境中平均目标误差仅6.6 cm，显示出很好的仿真到现实迁移能力。

Conclusion: DeformX首次集成真实视觉、原则性物理和机器人学习兼容的DLO仿真框架，能有效支持合成数据生成、策略学习并具有优异的仿真到现实迁移性能，将推动机器人操作可变形线性物体的研究与应用。

Abstract: Deformable linear objects (DLOs) such as wires, cables, and ropes are common in robotic manipulation tasks, yet simulating them with both visual realism and physical accuracy remains challenging. Existing visual simulation methods typically rely on procedural geometric primitives that lack physically grounded deformation behavior, while physics-based approaches with robot learning support often approximate DLOs as rigid-link chains or generic soft bodies, failing to accurately capture the bending, twisting, and shear mechanics of slender elastic structures. In this work, we introduce DeformX, a co-simulation framework that integrates a dedicated Cosserat rod physics engine with NVIDIA Isaac Sim, enabling DLO simulations that are both physically faithful and visually realistic. Our Cosserat rod engine simulates the dynamics and self-collisions of DLOs, and contact interactions with arbitrary free-form meshes. To achieve high-fidelity visualization, we employ mesh skinning to map discrete rod deformations onto imported CAD models. To the best of our knowledge, DeformX is the one of the first frameworks for DLO simulation that unifies realistic visualization, principled physics, and compatibility with robot learning pipelines. We demonstrate its versatility across synthetic data generation and policy learning for DLO manipulation, and validate visual and physical fidelity through comparisons against real-world experiments. Notably, fine-tuning Segment Anything Model 3 (SAM3) on DeformX-generated data yields a 10.2% mAP@75 improvement in real-image wire segmentation, and a rope-swinging policy trained entirely in DeformX achieves a mean target-hitting error of 6.6 cm on a UR5e manipulator in real-world trials, highlighting its strong sim-to-real transfer capability.

</details>


### [516] [Durability-Aware Multi-Objective Optimization of the Jansen Linkage: Trading Gait Quality Against Joint Wear](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22129)
*Jichao Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文在Jansen单自由度腿型机构的设计中引入了耐久性（关节滑动磨损）目标，采用多目标优化较原设计大幅提升耐用性且保证步态表现，为腿型机构延长寿命提供了新方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 原Jansen机构设计仅优化步态轨迹，未考虑关节磨损与耐久性，导致实际应用中寿命有限，亟需兼顾步态和耐用性的综合优化方法。

Method: 建立正向运动学、逆动力学与Archard磨损模型，耦合分析任意杆长下的步态和关节滑动磨损，采用NSGA-II算法在步态误差与关节总磨损之间进行多目标优化与灵敏度分析，并通过蒙特卡洛法分析制造公差对性能的影响。

Result: 与Jansen原设计相比，优化后可在步态平顺性的同时，将总关节磨损降低约56%；磨损控制在制造误差和不同运行工况下也较为稳健，并识别出主导磨损的关键杆长。

Conclusion: 本方法可显著提升类Jansen腿型机构的耐用性，为后续更系统化的耐磨—间隙—冲击耦合设计提供了理论基础和实际途径。

Abstract: The Jansen linkage is a single-degree-of-freedom planar leg mechanism whose eleven "holy numbers" were evolved by Theo Jansen to optimize the foot-path gait alone, with no regard for the wear of its revolute joints. This paper introduces a durability objective into the design of the Jansen leg. A parametric forward-kinematic model (two-circle-intersection solver), an inverse-dynamic model (constraint-Jacobian / Lagrange-multiplier formulation of a seven-body, ten-joint system, independently cross-verified by a reduced-DOF energy method), and an Archard wear model are coupled to evaluate, for any set of link lengths, both gait quality and the per-cycle sliding wear at every pin. Because the wear is computed on ideal, clearance-free revolute joints, the resulting wear figures are a relative comparative ranking rather than an absolute life prediction. A bi-objective problem -- composite gait error versus total joint wear, subject to step-length, ground-clearance, duty-factor and assembly constraints -- is solved with NSGA-II. Under the adopted gait metric the classical Jansen design is Pareto-dominated: for a representative design, link-length adjustments within +/-29% simultaneously flatten the stance (-28%), smooth the stance velocity (-58%) and reduce total joint wear by ~56%. A sensitivity study shows the wear advantage is robust across a crank-speed x payload envelope (48%-56%) and identifies the link lengths that most strongly govern wear. A variance-based global (Sobol) analysis confirms that two link lengths dominate the wear variance, and a Monte-Carlo manufacturing-tolerance study shows the wear advantage degrades gracefully under realistic fabrication error. The framework provides a practical route to longer-lived walking linkages and a baseline for future wear-clearance-impact coupled studies.

</details>


### [517] [Wh0: Generative World Models as Scalable Sources of Egocentric Human Hand Manipulation Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22136)
*Yangtao Chen,Zixuan Chen,Peiyang Wang,Yong-Lu Li,Jing Huo,Jieqi Shi,Yang Gao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出Wh0框架，通过生成式视频世界模型大规模生成高一致性的第一人称手部操作视频，用于提升灵巧操作任务的泛化能力，在零样本任务中取得大幅提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的灵巧操作数据面临“规模”和“场景/结构一致性”的权衡，难以同时获得大规模且高度适用于机器人部署的训练数据，限制了机器人在多变场景与任务上的泛化和实用性。

Method: Wh0框架利用生成式世界模型，根据自然语言、物体和场景条件生成5万集第一人称人手操作视频（WM-H数据集），并通过手部动作重建和视频编辑转换为机器人可用的监督信号。结合少量真实机器人数据共同训练，实现模型向机器人任务部署的适配。

Result: 在18项真实灵巧操作任务中，Wh0将预训练模型在未知任务上的零样本成功率由8.3%提升到38.9%。消融实验显示，数据生成的可扩展性和与机器人执行的一致性是性能提升的关键因素。

Conclusion: Wh0利用生成式世界模型为灵巧操作提供海量高一致性训练数据，显著提升了机器手在多任务、多场景下的泛化能力，是大规模灵巧操作部署的有力方法。

Abstract: Scaling dexterous manipulation requires generalization across objects, scenes, and tasks, yet existing data sources face a trade-off between scale and scene/embodiment alignment: teleoperation data is well aligned with robot deployment but expensive to collect; simulation is scalable but limited by the sim-to-real gap; and real egocentric videos scale effectively but remain misaligned with robot deployment. We propose Wh0, a framework that uses generative video world models as scalable and controllable sources of egocentric human-hand manipulation data to unlock the manipulation capabilities of pretrained dexterous VLA models. Conditioned on language, objects, and scenes, Wh0 uses a generative world model to produce WM-H, a 50k-episode dataset of egocentric human-object interaction videos. Wh0 then converts the generated videos into robot-trainable supervision through hand motion reconstruction and visual editing. Co-trained with a limited amount of real robot data, WM-H adapts pretrained VLA models to dexterous manipulation deployment. Across 18 real-world dexterous manipulation tasks, compared with a model post-trained only on robot data, Wh0 improves zero-shot success on unseen tasks from 8.3% to 38.9%. Ablation studies further show that scalable generation and scene/embodiment alignment are key drivers of performance gains. Videos and open-source code can be found on our project website: https://chenyt31.github.io/wh0.github.io/.

</details>


### [518] [RoboLineage: Agent-Native Data Lifecycle Governance Across Robot Policy Iterations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22142)
*Qian Luo,Wentao Guo,Zhennan Qin,Nanchun Guo,Yunhan Zhao,Yi Ma,Yanchao Yang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: RoboLineage是一套面向机器人的数据生命周期管理系统，使机器人策略迭代流程更加高效和可追踪。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人策略的改进依赖于不断的数据采集、评审、训练和评估等步骤，但这些步骤之间的数据和证据分散，缺乏系统性管理，降低了重复利用和可追溯性。

Method: RoboLineage通过将机器人数据生命周期各环节（如rollout、数据集决策、训练、评估、部署建议等）以类型化溯源工件的方式显式记录，实现全面追踪。系统中，智能体能够解释采集证据，维护数据健康，并在各轮策略迭代间进行状态总结，保障数据在明确定义的边界内流转。

Result: 在真实机器人操作流程中，RoboLineage加快了策略迭代速度，提升了可审计性，同时保持了决策策略的性能表现。

Conclusion: RoboLineage作为一个轻量级生命周期中间层，适用于多种机器人形态和训练方式，对提升机器人策略开发的效率和可追溯性有明显作用，并已开源。

Abstract: We present RoboLineage, an agent-native data lifecycle governance system for robot policy iteration. Modern robot policies improve through repeated data collection, review, retraining, evaluation, and release decisions, but the evidence connecting these steps is often scattered across local tools, scripts, and expert memory. RoboLineage makes this lifecycle explicit by representing rollouts, reviews, dataset decisions, training runs, policy metadata, evaluations, deployment recommendations, and next-collection plans as typed lineage artifacts. Agents interpret embodied rollout evidence, adapt accepted data to existing training stacks, maintain data health, and summarize cross-iteration state under explicit artifact boundaries. In real-robot manipulation workflows, RoboLineage makes routine policy iteration faster and more auditable while maintaining downstream policy performance. We open source RoboLineage as a lightweight lifecycle layer for different robot embodiments and training families. Project page: https://robolineage.github.io/

</details>


### [519] [Physics-Informed Eikonal Caging for Whole-Arm Manipulation Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22143)
*Yan Zhang,Yiming Li,Yifei Dong,Florian T. Pokorny,Sylvain Calinon*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于几何包络的全臂操控规划新方法，通过物体逃离时间度量包络质量，并利用物理知识神经网络实现优化，以提升操控鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 全臂操控涉及复杂接触动力学，模型难以精确，因而需要不依赖高精度接触模型的规划原则。几何包络（caging）具有对建模不准确的鲁棒性，但难以直接用于连续优化中的操控规划。

Method: 将几何包络问题转化为物体最短时间逃离机器人包络的问题，形成连续的“逃离时间场”，并证明其满足Eikonal方程。利用物理知识神经网络对该时间场进行近似，获得可微分的场，集成到操控规划中，优化目标变为最大化包络质量、抵抗物体逃离。允许基于简化接触模型进行规划。

Result: 仿真和真实机器人实验中，与基线方法相比，该方法表现出在外部干扰和接触建模误差下更好的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 几何包络指标可作为全臂操作中的实用鲁棒性基元，有助于提升操控任务在接触建模不确定性下的表现。

Abstract: Planning contact-rich whole-arm manipulation is challenging because interactions that involve extended robot geometry give rise to complex contact dynamics that are difficult to model accurately. This creates a need for planning principles that do not rely heavily on precise contact models. Caging offers one such geometric notion of robustness to modeling inaccuracy by restricting object escape through geometrically enclosing the object. However, existing caging formulations are difficult to incorporate into continuous optimization-based manipulation planning. We reformulate caging as a minimum-time escape problem in which the object seeks to leave an enclosing robot geometry in the shortest time. This yields a continuous escape-time field that measures the robot's enclosure quality and we show it satisfies an eikonal equation. We therefore can approximate this field using a physics-informed neural network, producing a smooth differentiable representation that can be embedded directly into manipulation planning. The resulting objective supports whole-arm manipulation planning to favor robot configurations resisting object escape. This improves the manipulation robustness to contact model mismatch, thus enabling planning with simplified contact models, including quasi-dynamic approximations and simplified object geometry. Across simulation and real-world experiments, we show improved robustness to disturbances and contact-model mismatch relative to baselines. These results suggest that geometric enclosure can serve as a practical robustness primitive for whole-arm manipulation. A supplementary video, which includes an intuitive overview of our method and experiment video results, is available on our project webpage.

</details>


### [520] [Zero-shot Transfer of Reinforcement Learning Control Policies for the Swing-Up and Stabilization of a Cart-Pole System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22145)
*Nikki Xu,Hien Tran*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文实现了基于RL的控制策略从仿真到硬件的零样本迁移，主要用于倒立摆系统的摆起和稳定问题。通过多种方法改进，成功实现了高性能与硬件安全性的统一。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代控制需求更加高效和自适应，强化学习（RL）为控制器设计带来新可能。实际部署中，RL的仿真到硬件迁移面临性能衰减和安全风险。因此，研究如何零样本迁移RL策略，确保硬件表现与仿真一致且不损害设备，意义重大。

Method: 分别独立训练倒立摆的摆起和稳定RL策略，并通过Simulink的逻辑切换实现两者衔接。为避免高频振荡损坏硬件，引入一阶动作平滑滤波器。结合带宽感知的滤波、灵敏度引导的域随机化（DR）和简单的线性课程学习（CL）策略，实现迁移过程中的性能提升与鲁棒性增强。

Result: 实验中，摆起策略总能使系统获得足够能量切换到稳定区间，且稳定策略能在扰动范围内维持平衡。若遇更大扰动，摆起策略可重新介入将摆恢复到倒立状态。多项改进确保策略在真实硬件上的有效、鲁棒与安全表现。

Conclusion: 结合动作平滑、域随机化和课程学习的RL控制策略，可实现倒立摆的高性能零样本迁移控制。该方法有较强的硬件适应性、扰动拒抗能力和安全保障，对RL现实部署具有参考价值。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) is a powerful and convenient tool to modernize controller design. In this work, we study the zero-shot transfer of RL-based control policies from simulation to hardware for cart-pole swing-up and stabilization. The two policies are trained independently, and the handoff is implemented in Simulink via switching logic. We apply a first-order action smoothing filter to prevent hardware damage from high-frequency oscillatory actuation. Pairing this bandwidth-aware filtering with sensitivity-guided domain randomization (DR) and a simple linear curriculum learning (CL) schedule, we obtain a swing-up policy that in all of our experiments injects sufficient energy for handoff into the stabilizer's region of attraction. The stabilization policy rejects disturbances within the tested range, and the swing-up policy can re-engage after larger perturbations and restores the pendulum to the inverted position.

</details>


### [521] [Full Nonlinear Nonholonomic Dynamics and Motion Analysis of a 3-DoF Underactuated Spherical Rolling Robot](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22169)
*Lakshmesha Krishnapa,Ahnaf Sharaar Mazahar,Seyed Amir Tafrishi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了MonoRollBot的完整非线性受约束动力学建模和运动分析。MonoRollBot是一种单电机驱动、内部弹簧耦合质量块的新型3自由度球形机器人。模型与实验结果一致，并为后续状态估计与控制器设计提供理论基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的球形机器人多采用多电机或多自由度驱动，难以实现结构简化和成本降低。MonoRollBot利用单电机及内部移动质量构成高度欠驱动系统，丰富运动能力但建模控制难度高。缺乏对此类单驱动、多约束球形机器人的完整非线性动力学建模与解析。

Method: 采用Lagrange--d'Alembert方法建立不滚动滑动（非完整约束）下的动力学模型，将丝杠传动用完整约束表示，滚动条件以Pfaffian形式施加；保留包括外壳位置姿态、丝杠行程与质量块径向运动等广义坐标，进行动力学推导。通过数值仿真和原型运动分析验证模型与实际表现的一致性。

Result: 所建立的模型能准确捕捉重力、弹性和惯性对运动能力的协同影响。仿真结果与原型实验定性一致，展现了高度欠驱动球形机器人复杂的运动特性。

Conclusion: 本研究建立了首个MonoRollBot完整非线性动力学模型，为该类高度欠驱动球形机器人的状态估计与混合控制器设计提供力学基础，对后续智能运动控制研究具有指导意义。

Abstract: This paper presents a full nonlinear constrained dynamic model of MonoRollBot, a novel 3-DoF spherical rolling robot driven by a single motor, a lead-screw transmission, and a spring-coupled internal moving mass, together with motion analysis of its behavior. To the best of our knowledge, this is one of the first full nonlinear nonholonomic models reported for a mono-actuated, super-underactuated spherical rolling robot of this kind. Because rolling without slipping is nonholonomic, the dynamics are derived using the Lagrange--d'Alembert formulation, with the lead-screw relation imposed as a holonomic constraint and the rolling condition imposed in Pfaffian form. The formulation retains the complete generalized coordinates of shell translation, shell attitude, screw travel, nut rotation, and radial mass motion. Simulations and representative motion studies show qualitative agreement with prototype behavior and reveal how gravity, compliance, and inertia jointly shape the locomotion and motion capabilities of this strongly underactuated robot. The resulting model also provides a mechanically consistent basis for future state estimation and hybrid controller design for this nonholonomic mono-actuated rolling robot.

</details>


### [522] [OpenHLM: An Empirical Recipe for Whole-Body Humanoid Loco-Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22174)
*Yingdong Hu,Haodong Zhu,Boyuan Zheng,Yihang Hu,Tong Zhang,Zunhao Chen,Junming Zhao,Ruiqian Nai,Yang Gao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出OpenHLM框架，实现了端到端的类人机器人视觉-语言-动作(VLA)模型，直接将视觉和语言输入映射到机械体的全部自由度，显著提升了全身任务的表现，且优于现有方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有类人机器人常将上、下半身控制解耦，导致全身协调及原生全身任务能力受限，只能做类似于双臂轮式平台的有限动作。需要一种将整个身体所有自由度联合、协调的解决方案。

Method: 文章系统性地围绕全身遥操作、VLA模型设计和异构协同训练三阶段进行一变量路线研究。通过大量实验分析，验证全身遥操作界面、VLA的迁移能力，以及无新增全身演示下通过HuMI多样化目标和指令扩展策略。最终提出OpenHLM流程和代码。

Result: 发现：(1)基于关节全身遥操作效果显著优于部分自由度遥操作；(2)VLA模型能很好迁移至类人机器人全自由度空间；(3)与HuMI协同训练可扩展新目标和指令。实验证明其在长时序、高动态全身任务中优于两个主流SOTA基线，且所需人工示范时间减少一半以上。

Conclusion: 提出的OpenHLM是面向全身类人机器人原生VLA任务的有效方案，通过端到端联合学习，实现更高效、自然的全身机械体感知—语言—动作映射，促进了类人机器人全身本体能力的提升。

Abstract: Whole-body humanoid loco-manipulation requires coordinating the robot's entire kinematic chain. However, most existing systems typically decouple the upper and lower bodies into separate controllers, limiting such coordination and yielding behaviors similar to those of a wheeled dual-arm platform. In this paper, we ask what it takes to build a whole-body native vision-language-action (VLA) model that maps language and pixels directly to all of the humanoid's degrees of freedom. We conduct a systematic empirical study organized as a roadmap of one-variable-at-a-time experiments across three phases: whole-body teleoperation, VLA model design, and heterogeneous co-training. Our study yields several intriguing findings: a joint-based whole-body teleoperation interface outperforms alternatives that only partially expose the humanoid's degrees of freedom; a VLA pretrained on static and wheeled dual-arm platforms transfers surprisingly well to a humanoid's full action space; and co-training with HuMI, the humanoid analog of UMI, extends the policy to new objects and instructions without additional whole-body teleoperation on those targets. Following this roadmap yields OpenHLM, an open-source recipe for whole-body humanoid loco-manipulation. In a challenging long-horizon task that spans a wide vertical range of the humanoid, OpenHLM outperforms two state-of-the-art humanoid VLA baselines (GR00T N1.6 and $Ψ_0$) using less than half the total demonstration time. Our code, training data, and model checkpoints are available at [https://openhlm-project.github.io/].

</details>


### [523] [Geometric Reconstruction of Extrinsic Contact Trajectories using Tactile Sensing and Proprioception for Tool Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22251)
*Seojung Min,Yoonjin Kim,Jeong-Jung Kim,Jung Kim*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本论文提出通过机械手本体感觉和触觉传感，重建远离传感器的工具尖端与环境的接触轨迹。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 面对工具与环境接触点远离触觉传感器、且在交互中可能发生运动，传统触觉传感难以直接感知接触。这妨碍了抓取、操作等任务的精确执行，因此需要一种方法推断远端接触轨迹。

Method: 将工具尖端轨迹重建建模为几何推断问题，假设为单点接触。方法包括（1）通过校准段估算全球工具尖端接触初始位置，（2）结合触觉标记观测与本体感觉，逐步拼接推算出完整轨迹，能够适应工具、抓取姿态等变化。

Result: 在51组不同轨迹、工具、手腕姿势与抓握配置的实验中，该方法实现了8.59±2.41mm的轨迹RMSE和5.96±1.16mm的形状RMSE，并能以14±4.11Hz速度在线运行。

Conclusion: 即使在工具类型、手腕姿势与抓握配置变化下，系统能稳定且一致地通过抓取级触觉感知恢复出外部工具尖端的接触轨迹几何形状。

Abstract: Tactile sensing enables robots to perceive rich contact information at the grasp, supporting tasks such as object recognition, in-hand pose estimation, and slip detection. However, in many tool-mediated manipulation tasks, the interaction that determines task success occurs at the tool tip, away from the tactile sensor, making direct sensing of tool-environment contact difficult, particularly when the contact moves during interaction. In this work, we reconstruct the trajectory of extrinsic tool-tip contact using tactile sensing and robot proprioception. We formulate tool-tip trajectory reconstruction as a geometric inference problem under a single-point contact assumption. Our method first estimates the global tool-tip contact location from a calibration segment designed to approximate fixed-point behavior, and then reconstructs the full trajectory by composing relative tool motion estimated from tactile marker observations under continuous contact. Across n=51 trials with multiple trajectories, tools, wrist poses, and grasp configurations, the proposed pipeline achieves a trajectory RMSE of 8.59 +/- 2.41 mm in the world frame and a shape RMSE of 5.96 +/- 1.16 mm, while operating online at 14.00 +/- 4.11 Hz. Overall, the results show that extrinsic tool-tip trajectory geometry can be recovered consistently from grasp-level tactile sensing, with trajectory shape remaining stable across variations in tools, wrist poses, and grasp configurations.

</details>


### [524] [Any-Body Guard: Universal Safeguarding for Manipulation Policies via Action Masking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22278)
*Alex Beaudin,Hanna Krasowski,Kartik Nagpal,Sanjit A. Seshia,Murat Arcak,Negar Mehr*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本论文提出了X-Safe通用安全保障方法，能为不同类型和任务的机器人操作提供概率性碰撞规避安全保证，并展示了其领先的任务表现和通用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人安全保障方法依赖于大量人工工程设计（如回退控制器或复杂不变性评估），导致过于保守、计算资源消耗大、泛化能力差，不适应多样化机器人和任务需求。

Method: 提出X-Safe，在机器人关节配置空间直接推理，通过形式化概率方法实现碰撞规避，仅依赖于物体级静态场景表示和机械臂正向运动学模型，无需额外数据和工程定制，即可适用于不同机器人和场景。

Result: 在多种机器人平台和策略下（包括仿真和真实硬件），X-Safe表现出优于现有安全保障方法的任务完成率，真正硬件无碰撞发生，且有效验证了其概率性安全保证。

Conclusion: X-Safe方法为多样化机器人和任务提供了无需大量人工设计、可迁移并具形式化概率保证的安全机制，是机器人安全保障领域的显著进展。

Abstract: Ensuring safety of learning-enabled robotic manipulation across diverse embodiments and tasks still requires significant manual engineering. Existing approaches typically rely on heuristically designed fallback controllers or complex forward invariance assessments. These methods are often too conservative for task success, too computationally expensive for real-time execution, too heuristic to provide useful safety guarantees, or too engineering-heavy to transfer between setups. In this paper, we propose a universal safeguarding approach, X-Safe, which reasons directly in the robot's configuration space to provide formal probabilistic guarantees for collision avoidance. By operating in the configuration space, our method transfers across embodiments while relying solely on an object-based, quasi-static scene representation and a forward kinematics model of the robotic manipulator. Thus, X-Safe provides useful formal safety guarantees without requiring additional data, or engineering effort for different embodiments or scenes. We demonstrate X-Safe for diverse embodiments and policies, both in simulation and on hardware. We observe less degradation in task performance compared to state-of-the-art safeguarding, no collisions on hardware experiments, and empirically corroborate our formal guarantees.

</details>


### [525] [FlowDPG: Deterministic Policy Gradient on Flow Matching Policies for Real-World Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22303)
*Kexin Shi,Junyao Shi,Poorvi Hebbar,Zhuolun Zhao,Tarun Amarnath,Yifan Su,Shikhar Bahl,Deepak Pathak*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了FlowDPG，一种无需反向传播穿越时间（BPTT）的机器人操作强化学习方法，显著提升了多步ODE流匹配策略在复杂装配任务中的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实中的机器人操作强化学习任务非常复杂，尤其是流匹配策略因需要通过多步ODE反向传播，计算代价高且数值不稳定，因此亟需一种高效、稳定的训练方法。

Method: 作者提出FlowDPG，将DDPG的思想引入流匹配策略。训练时将critic的梯度信息蒸馏到速度场中，从而跳过了BPTT。该算法结合了演示驱动的速度（保证动作可行）与critic梯度的修正（优化价值），形成稳定有效的更新。

Result: FlowDPG在长时序、多阶段、双臂AirPods装配实际任务中取得了92%的端到端成功率，明显优于其它近期强化学习方法。

Conclusion: FlowDPG提供了一种对流匹配政策有效、无需BPTT的强化学习训练框架，为复杂机器人操作任务带来更高效和更可靠的解法。

Abstract: Real-world reinforcement learning for robotic manipulation remains challenging, and this difficulty is amplified for flow matching policies: applying policy gradient methods to these policies is fundamentally limited by the need to backpropagate through time(BPTT) along the multi-step ODE that maps noise to actions, which is computationally prohibitive and numerically fragile. We propose FlowDPG, a DDPG-style method specifically designed for flow matching policies that distills the critic gradient into the velocity field at training time, bypassing BPTT entirely. Intuitively, FlowDPG combines two complementary vectors: the demonstration-driven velocity that keeps the action feasible, and the critic-driven correction that steers it toward higher value. Our contributions are threefold: (1) a BPTT-free distillation framework that enables stable DDPG-style policy improvement on flow matching policies, (2) a formal connection between the FlowDPG update direction and vanilla Deterministic Policy Gradient via three explicit approximations, and (3) real-world validation on a long-horizon, multi-stage, dual-arm AirPods assembly task, where FlowDPG attains a 92% end-to-end success rate, substantially outperforming recent RL methods spanning value-conditioning, auxiliary-module adaptation, and adjoint-based critic-gradient approaches. Videos and more results are provided on the project page https://flowdpg.github.io.

</details>


### [526] [EmbodiedUS-FS: Fast Slow Intelligence for Ultrasound Robotics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22319)
*Fangzhuo Zhang,Xinyu Wang,Xiao Yang,Jinchang Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种分层的机器人超声系统，通过结合高层次意图解析与低层次闭环执行，实现安全、可解释的医疗超声扫描，并有效提升了任务成功率与安全性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实际临床环境中的机器人超声操作面临复杂的流程逻辑、隐含的医学目标、高安全要求，以及病人体动等问题，传统自动化方法难以同时兼顾理解、执行和安全。

Method: 提出“快－慢大脑”分层架构：慢大脑负责解析医生自然语言指令、计划分解和任务图生成，并利用API和手册知识增强规划；快大脑融合多种反馈（超声图像、位姿、力、病人体动等），实现实时动作精细调整和基于图像质量的恢复机制。同时引入安全防护模块和层级响应策略以约束风险操作、动态重规划或请求人工确认。

Result: 通过规划评测、动态扰动下的闭环执行和安全机制验证等实验，表明该分层设计显著提高了超声任务的完成率，并减少了安全违规事件。

Conclusion: 所提方法可为机器人超声在实际临床环境中的安全、有效应用奠定基础，具备良好解释性和实用性，对复杂医疗场景下的自动化有积极推动作用。

Abstract: Robotic ultrasound scanning in real clinical environments requires both high-level clinical workflow reasoning and low-level closed-loop execution. Physicians natural-language instructions often contain implicit anatomical targets, procedural logic, image-quality requirements, and safety constraints, while execution is affected by patient motion, contact variations, and target drift. We propose a fast and slow hierarchical embodied ultrasound system for safe and interpretable robotic ultrasound assistance. The Slow Brain performs intent parsing and stage-wise task planning with knowledge augmentation from an API and handbook corpus, and generates executable plans through task-graph construction and structured plan verification. The Fast Brain fuses multimodal feedback, including ultrasound images, robot pose and force states, and patient-motion information, to refine local actions and perform image-quality-guided recovery behaviors. The system further integrates a Safety Shield and a hierarchical escalation policy to constrain risky actions and trigger replanning or human confirmation under persistent failures or safety-bound violations. Experiments on planning evaluation, closed-loop execution under dynamic perturbations, and safety-mechanism validation demonstrate that the proposed hierarchical design improves task success rates while reducing safety violations.

</details>


### [527] [Tactile Genesis: Exploring Tactile Sensors at Scale for Learning Dexterous Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22332)
*Trinity Chung,Kashu Yamazaki,Dhruv Patel,Alexis Duburcq,Yiling Qiao,Katerina Fragkiadaki,Aran Nayebi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了Tactile Genesis，一个GPU并行的触觉传感器仿真平台，统一了多种触觉数据类型和硬件配置，支持大规模并行仿真，并在高级灵巧操作任务中实验了传感器不同的类型、布局和精度对机器人操作性能的影响，为未来硬件设计和策略设计提供了明确指导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 触觉对于复杂物体操控至关重要，但目前缺乏跨传感器统一平台来系统对比触觉数据的不同抽象对学习控制任务的作用。由于每种传感器组合都相当于‘新机器人’，实际对比实验难以实现，亟需仿真平台协助硬件与策略设计。

Method: 作者开发了Tactile Genesis仿真平台，支持多种触觉模态（包括二值触碰、接触深度、逐taxel力/扭矩、弹性体位移、几何相关接近、声音和体素温度场），可灵活配置分辨率、布局及现实噪声模型。平台支持超过2万环境和1千taxel的高并发，并在三项灵巧操作任务中，大规模对比不同传感器参数（类型、位置、分辨率、噪声）对策略学习与迁移的影响。

Result: 通过消融实验，发现仅依靠本体感受信息在所有灵巧任务中都不足够；传感器的布局（覆盖范围）对策略性能作用远大于传感器类型；指尖覆盖大幅落后于全手覆盖，而增加手掌与近端指节的传感器能大幅缩小与理想策略的差距；分辨率影响有限，200个taxel于全手分布已能覆盖大部分任务需求；力/扭矩型传感器在各场景中表现最优。

Conclusion: Tactile Genesis为触觉传感器设计与策略开发提供了强有力的研究基础。文章给出了明确的设计建议：传感器应追求覆盖范围优先于细度，力/扭矩类型的重要性高于其他模态，这对未来机器手硬件与控制策略的优化均有重要参考价值。

Abstract: Tactile sensing is critical for contact-rich dexterous manipulation, yet it remains unclear which tactile abstractions a policy needs and when richer tactile fields justify their hardware cost. This is hard to study empirically: each sensor effectively defines a new robot, and no lab can replicate the same learning experiment across all of them. We present Tactile Genesis, a GPU-parallel tactile sensor simulation platform that exposes binary contact, contact depth, per-taxel kinematic force/torque, elastomer marker displacement, geometry-aware proximity, contact audio, and a voxelized temperature field (the first of its kind in robot learning physics simulation platforms) under a common interface, with configurable placement, resolution, and a realistic noise model (drift, hysteresis, dead taxels, crosstalk). It scales past 20,000 parallel environments and 1,000 taxels on a single GPU, improving throughput by 3 to 20 times over previous tactile simulators. We train teacher-student policies on three dexterous tasks, ablating sensor type, placement, resolution, and noise, and verify transfer to the real XHand1. Proprioception alone is insufficient on every task. Sensor placement dominates sensor type: fingertip-only coverage trails whole-hand coverage by a wide margin, while adding the palm and proximal phalanges closes most of the gap to the privileged teacher. Resolution matters far less than coverage: placing 200 taxels across the whole hand suffices across tasks. We find that force/torque per taxel is consistently the most useful sensor type. These results give concrete guidance for both future tactile hardware design for improving robot hands and policy-side observation choice in dexterous manipulation. https://neuroagents-lab.github.io/2026-tactile-genesis/

</details>


### [528] [Multi-AUV Marine Life Tracking with Single Hydrophone Payloads via a Hidden Markov Model Equipped Particle Filter](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22335)
*Christopher Herrera,Kehlani Fay,Christopher Clark,Alberto Soto,Christopher Lowe,Mario Espinoza*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种利用多台AUV（自主水下航行器）搭载单一小型水听器，通过粒子滤波与隐马尔可夫模型（HMM）融合定位水生动物声发射器的新方法，其定位精度优于传统随机运动模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的水生动物声发射器定位方式（如固定水听器）因动物频繁活动易导致数据丢失；而已有多水听器AUV系统因体积和阻力等问题难以高效跟踪高速动物。

Method: 本研究采用多台搭载单一水听器的AUV，通过粒子滤波器与HMM运动行为模型融合各AUV观测，来实时估算动物声发射器的位置。

Result: 实测数据显示，在短期部署下，定位均方根误差约10米；大范围长期仿真下误差约15米。历史行为HMM模型的定位性能优于通用速度模型和随机游走模型。

Conclusion: 该方法在提高水生动物声学定位分辨率和精度方面具有显著优势，为水下移动动物行为研究提供了更高效、低阻力的技术途径。

Abstract: Researchers tag and track marine animals to study migration patterns, human impacts on behavior, and behavioral shifts due to climate change. Accurate data collection often requires tagging individual animals to collect spatio-temporal state estimates of the animal's geo-position and depth. Acoustic transmitters are prominent due to their continuous communication without requiring retrieval or surfacing to collect data. These transmitters emit underwater acoustic pulses that can be detected by hydrophones. However, the frequent movement of aquatic animals results in high data loss when the animal moves out of the detection range of a stationary hydrophone. Autonomous underwater vehicle (AUV) systems offer a solution for localizing transmitters with higher resolution over longer periods of time. Such systems previously deployed have often required multiple hydrophones mounted on a large frame carried by the AUV. This increases drag, limiting the speed at which the AUV can track highly mobile animals. This work provides an alternative by equipping multiple AUVs with a single compact hydrophone payload. A particle filter algorithm equipped with a hidden Markov model (HMM) behavioral motion model fuses measurements from multiple AUVs to estimate the transmitter's position. Real-world data shows a root mean square error (RMSE) of approximately 10 meters for short-term deployments, and a larger simulated dataset shows an RMSE of approximately 15 meters for longer deployments over a larger area. The HMM fit to historical animal movement data outperforms a generic velocity motion model, and both outperform a baseline random walk motion model.

</details>


### [529] [Benchmarking Robot Memory Under Interference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22338)
*Soumil Rathi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了RoboMME-Interference基准，以评估机器人在包含干扰的长时序上下文中的记忆能力，结果显示现有方法在长期干扰下表现不佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人记忆基准主要侧重于单场景或短期记忆，实际应用中机器人需要长期跨多场景、应对干扰的记忆能力。因此，作者希望通过更具挑战性的基准，反映真实部署时机器人的记忆需求。

Method: 作者在RoboMME基准基础上构建了RoboMME-Interference，将与查询任务相关的历史演示与若干无关会话混合提供给机器人系统，测试其能否在干扰下正确回忆所需信息，并通过准确率衡量表现。采用未改动的RoboMME记忆增强模型进行评测。

Result: 在没有干扰的情况下，感知类记忆模型表现较好，但随着无关历史会话的增加，模型性能显著下降，记忆干扰严重影响记忆准确性。

Conclusion: 当前主流机器人记忆系统在长时序和高干扰环境下难以维持性能，未来亟需提升对长上下文记忆及抗干扰能力的记忆系统。

Abstract: Robots deployed in realistic settings will accumulate experience across many sessions and tasks over their deployment. The robot's tasks may often require it to remember information from multiple sessions ago, making long-context robot memory important for real-world deployments. However, most robot-memory benchmarks today are based on single episodes or a short context. To measure how current robot memory systems perform on longer sessions with more distractions, we introduce RoboMME-Interference, a cross-session benchmark built on RoboMME. For each query episode, we construct a session history using the query's relevant prior demonstration followed by a controlled number of unrelated sessions, which we provide to the VLA as memory and measure accuracy. Running RoboMME's released memory-augmented $π_{0.5}$ variants unmodified through this benchmark, we find that while perceptual memory variants improve success when given the history without any distractors, they decay strongly and steadily as unrelated sessions accumulate. With this release, we emphasize the importance of long-context memory and robustness to interference and show that current systems largely fail on such capabilities. The project page, videos, code, and data are at https://robotmemorybench.com.

</details>


### [530] [A Taxonomy of Conceptual Alignment in Human-Robot Dialogue](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22360)
*Shengchen Zhang,Xiaohua Sun,Weiwei Guo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出人机对话中达成概念一致的新视角和工具，包括对话分类法和对话行为模式，有助于分析和设计更良好的人机协作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在有效的人机交互中，双方需要在概念的意义上达成一致。现有关于'conceptual alignment'的研究存在定义不统一、关注单一方向等问题，导致难以理解其达成过程。作者希望澄清该概念并提供更具结构性和实用性的分析工具。

Method: 作者提出了一种关注于设计的人机概念一致性分析方法，包含：1）定义一套分类方法，描述对话中概念一致性达成的触发机制和所涉及的理解层级；2）提出对话行为模式，用于具体刻画对话中实现一致性的交互动作。

Result: 提出了用于描述和分析概念一致性对话的分类学和对话行为模式。这些理论工具可以系统地分析和比较不同场景下人机之间概念达成的一致性过程。

Conclusion: 这些结构化工具与新视角为人机对话中的概念一致性分析奠定了理论基础，同时指引了未来更有效的人机交互系统的设计。

Abstract: Successful conversations require speakers to align on the meaning of concepts, a challenging but crucial task for human-robot interaction. Understanding the process of establishing such alignment is hindered by competing interpretations of the term and isolated, unidirectional investigations of its design space. This paper argues for a design-centric understanding of conceptual alignment as a bidirectional and co-constructive process. We introduce a taxonomy that characterizes conceptual alignment dialogues along what triggers its initiation and what level(s) of conceptual understanding it concerns. We further present a dialogue act schema as an operational tool that captures the interactional moves through which alignment is achieved. Together, these contributions provide a structured foundation for analyzing, comparing, and designing conceptual alignment in human-robot interaction.

</details>


### [531] [Do Rigid-Body Simulators Dream of Soft Robots? Learning Contact-Rich Manipulation for Tendon-Driven Continuum Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22397)
*Chengnan Shentu,Nicholas Baldassini,Tongjia Zheng,Priyanka Rao,Jessica Burgner-Kahrs*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种能在MuJoCo物理引擎中原生模拟软体机器人的方法，实现了腱驱动连续体机器人的接触丰富操作学习，首次实现了连续体机器人的接触丰富操作从仿真到实机的迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前，软体机器人的接触丰富操作学习缺乏类似刚体机器人领域那样高效的仿真环境。现有软体机器人模拟器虽物理真实但支持有限；刚体近似模拟则牺牲了物理精准性。因此，迫切需要统一物理真实性和仿真实用性的模拟工具。

Method: 作者基于连续体力学，为腱驱动连续体机器人（TDCR）推导出适用于MuJoCo的离散化建模方法，使软体机器人能在MuJoCo中有效模拟，并统一了腱力、接触和动力学。对比Cosserat杆理论模型（静态与动态）及真实硬件验证了模拟器的准确性。随后，通过遥操作进行状态模仿学习，并将所得策略直接部署到实际机器人上。

Result: 提出的模拟工具能够准确模拟TDCR的接触、腱驱动和动力学，与理论与实机测试结果吻合。在仿真中学习到的操作策略无需微调即可迁移到实际的3段腱驱动连续体机器人，完成了2项接触丰富的操作任务。

Conclusion: 这是第一次实现连续体软体机器人在接触丰富操作中的仿真到实机无缝迁移，说明所提方法能推动软体机器人在复杂环境中的感知与交互能力，为后续学习与部署铺平了道路。

Abstract: Learning contact-rich, whole-body manipulation for soft continuum robots is held back by the lack of simulation infrastructure that has accelerated rigid-robot manipulation. Existing soft robot simulators are physically grounded but lack the contact handling, actuation support, or learning integration needed for contact-rich manipulation; rigid-body approximations offer these capabilities but sacrifice physical grounding. We bridge this gap for tendon-driven continuum robots (TDCRs) by deriving a continuum-mechanics-informed discretization that places the soft robot natively inside MuJoCo, unifying tendon forces, body contact, and dynamics in a single physics pipeline. We validate the simulator against a Cosserat rod reference (static and dynamic) and real TDCR hardware. We then train state-based imitation learning policies via teleoperation in simulation and deploy them zero-shot to a physical 3-segment TDCR on a 7-DoF Franka arm across two contact-rich manipulation tasks. To our knowledge, this is the first demonstration of sim-to-real transfer for contact-rich manipulation with continuum robots.

</details>


### [532] [SPiralRoll: A Novel Adjustable-Stiffness Underactuated 3-DoF Joint with Torsion Springs for Rolling Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22443)
*Louis Keith,George Ripper,and Seyed Amir Tafrishi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新型基于扭转弹簧的柔顺机构SPiralRoll，适用于滚动机器人和柔顺致动，并进行了实验验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统刚性机构难以兼顾适应性、安全性及节能，而柔顺机构可提升机器人性能并降低硬件复杂度。本文旨在开发适用于滚动机器人的高效、低成本柔顺致动机构。

Method: 设计了一种利用分布式弹性元件和双电机输入的扭转弹簧结构，能产生旋转、径向伸缩和轴向自旋三种运动。开发了全弧和单弧两种结构，并通过实验对比验证性能。

Result: 全弧结构具备更好的支撑和变形流畅性，单弧结构变形幅度大、惯性激励强，更适合摆动驱动的滚动运动。实验证明该机构可实现前进与转向。

Conclusion: SPiralRoll是一种结构紧凑、低成本、可3D打印的柔顺致动和滚动机器人解决方案，展示了良好的适应性与实用性。

Abstract: Compliant mechanisms are important in robotics because they can improve adaptability, safety, and energy efficiency while reducing hardware complexity. This paper presents SPiralRoll, a novel torsion-spring-based underactuated compliant mechanism for rolling robots and compliant robotic actuation. The mechanism uses arc-distributed elastic members and two motor inputs to realize three physically observable output motions: rotational motion, radial expansion/contraction, and axial spin induced by nonlinear compliant deformation. Two configurations, namely full-arc and single-arc designs, are developed and experimentally evaluated. Beyond benchtop validation, the mechanism is integrated into a spherical rolling robot, where proof-of-concept experiments demonstrate forward rolling and turning. The results show that the full-arc design provides better structural support and smoother deformation, whereas the single-arc design yields larger deformation and stronger inertial excitation, making it more suitable for pendulum-driven rolling locomotion. Overall, SPiralRoll provides a low-cost, compact, and fully 3D-printable solution for underactuated compliant rolling robots and adaptive robotic joints.

</details>


### [533] [BLENDS: Bayesian Learning-Enhanced Deep Smoothing for GNSS-Denied Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22456)
*Nadav Cohen,Itzik Klein*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的深度平滑框架BLENDS，通过学习协方差自适应和状态校正来增强导航系统在GNSS失效时的定位准确性。实验结果显示，BLENDS在GNSS中断情况下，导航误差可显著降低，同时能够修正GNSS与RTK基准之间的系统性偏差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在低成本惯性传感器依赖的自主系统中，GNSS信号中断时导航准确性大幅下降，传统平滑方法受限于GNSS自身精度，难以显著提升导航表现，因此需要更精准、更鲁棒的导航算法。

Method: 提出BLENDS框架，在贝叶斯平滑的统计基础上，引入Transformer神经网络，通过数据驱动方法学习协方差调整和状态修正策略，提升模型适应能力和导航精度。

Result: 在四轴飞行器数据集与GNSS中断场景下，BLENDS相对传统模型平滑器，位置均方根误差降低高达25.6%，且不确定性显著减小。此外还能有效补偿GNSS与RTK基准的系统性偏差。

Conclusion: BLENDS结合贝叶斯与深度学习的优势，有效提升了GNSS受挑战环境下的自主导航鲁棒性和准确率，显示了学习增强型贝叶斯平滑器的应用前景。

Abstract: Maintaining accurate navigation during GNSS outages remains a significant challenge for autonomous systems relying on low-cost inertial sensors. While classical smoothing methods, such as the two-filter smoother and Rauch-Tung-Striebel smoother, exploit measurements collected before and after an outage, their performance remains limited by the accuracy of conventional GNSS measurements. This paper presents Bayesian learning-enhanced navigation with deep smoothing (BLENDS), a transformer-based framework that augments Bayesian smoothing with learned covariance adaptation and state correction. The proposed method preserves the statistical foundations of Bayesian estimation while leveraging data-driven learning to improve navigation accuracy. Evaluations on the quadrotor dataset with GNSS outages demonstrate that BLENDS consistently outperforms both model-based smoothers, achieving up to 25.6% improvement in the position root mean square error while also reducing estimation uncertainty. Furthermore, BLENDS learns to compensate for the systematic bias between conventional GNSS positioning and RTK ground truth, enabling accuracy beyond that achievable with conventional GNSS measurements alone. The results demonstrate the potential of learning-enhanced Bayesian smoothing for resilient and high-accuracy navigation in GNSS-challenged environments.

</details>


### [534] [Scalable Multi-Task Data Generation via Reinforcement Learning for Language-Conditioned Bimanual Dexterous Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22471)
*Zechu Li,Yufeng Jin,Puze Liu,Jan Peters,Georgia Chalvatzaki*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种系统化的强化学习（RL）数据生成流程，用于生成高质量、丰富多样的双臂灵巧操作数据集，从而提升语言条件下的多任务策略学习与泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有双臂灵巧操作通用政策训练受限于高质量大规模数据集的缺乏，且人工示范数据采集存在物理不匹配、缺乏动作等问题。此外，目前基于人类远程操作的方法缺乏任务多样性，强化学习则受限于手工设计奖励的可扩展性。

Method: 提出结合通用奖励设计、有效的域随机化以及基于语言的任务注释的RL数据生成管线，在仿真中高效合成多样化任务的高质量操控数据。

Result: 实验表明，该生成的数据集显著提升了三个代表性操控任务中的泛化能力。

Conclusion: 系统化的RL数据生成流程能够推动双臂灵巧操作多任务策略和语言条件泛化的进展，是构建通用型机器人的重要途径。

Abstract: A key bottleneck in training generalist policies for bimanual dexterous manipulation is the lack of large-scale, high-quality datasets. Synthetic data generation in simulation provides a scalable alternative to human video demonstrations by overcoming challenges such as morphology mismatch, missing physical interactions, and the generation of robot actions. However, existing approaches based on human teleoperation offer limited task diversity, as object-centric trajectory matching often neglects the feasibility of robot execution. Reinforcement learning (RL) enables broader scalability but is often constrained by handcrafted, task-specific rewards. In this work, we propose a systematic RL-based data generation pipeline that integrates generalizable reward design, effective domain randomization, and language-conditioned task annotations. This pipeline synthesizes diverse, high-quality datasets for dexterous bimanual manipulation and enables training of language-conditioned multi-task policies. Our experiments show that the generated data significantly improves generalization across three representative manipulation tasks.

</details>


### [535] [ARP: Enhancing Quantized Skill Abstractions via Visual Alignment and Iterative Refinement for Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22480)
*Yuntian Wang,Zesheng Jia,Yuhui Duan,Qibing Wang,Yang Liu,Song Wang,Siao Liu,Jin Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对长期操控任务的视觉运动策略学习方法（Aligned Refinement Policy, ARP），在多个基准测试和真实机器人实验中均取得了优异效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 以往通过离散技能方式进行模仿学习能提升复杂任务的学习，但主要关注于动作轨迹编码，导致视觉-语义联系薄弱，影响通过视觉选择技能的能力，并且离散化会损失连续控制的精度。

Method: 提出ARP框架，包括两个核心创新：(1)设计视觉-动作对齐目标，将视觉嵌入与预先量化的动作表示在共享潜在空间中对齐，同时保持独立状态的技能解码器；(2)引入轻量级的迭代残差头模块（IRH），通过两步细化补偿离散化带来的精度损失，提升精细控制能力。

Result: 在LIBERO和Meta-World等标准基准任务上，ARP获得了当前最优的表现。在Kuavo 4 Pro人形机器人上的实际操作实验中，ARP在两个具挑战的操控任务上也显著超越了多个现有方法。

Conclusion: ARP方法有效地提升了视觉-语义关联和动作精度，验证了在长期操控任务中的优越性和实用性，推进了基于视觉的模仿学习在实际机器人系统中的落地。

Abstract: Learning visuomotor policies for long-horizon manipulation remains a fundamental challenge. Recent skill-based imitation learning methods based on discrete quantization have shown promising results by representing complex behaviors as temporally extended skills. However, most existing approaches primarily encode action trajectories into latent skills, yielding weak visual-semantic grounding and limiting the ability to leverage visual observations for skill selection. Moreover, discrete tokenization inevitably incurs precision errors during continuous action generation. To alleviate these issues, we propose Aligned Refinement Policy (ARP), a discrete-skill framework that couples semantic grounding with execution-level refinement. Specifically, ARP introduces (i) a visual--action alignment objective that contrastively aligns visual embeddings with pre-quantized action representations in a shared latent space while preserving a state-independent skill decoder, and (ii) a lightweight Iterative Residual Head (IRH) that performs a two-step refinement to recover fine-grained control for precise execution. Extensive experiments show that ARP achieves state-of-the-art performance on the LIBERO and Meta-World benchmarks. Moreover, real-robot experiments on the Kuavo 4 Pro humanoid platform further validate its effectiveness, yielding consistent performance gains over several baselines on two challenging manipulation tasks.

</details>


### [536] [PenduMorph: Development and Motion Analysis of Pendulum-Actuated Rolling Reconfigurable Spherical Robot with Magnetic-Coupling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22491)
*Aung Myat,Peter Noyce,May Forgan,Qing Yu,Seyed Amir Tafrishi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出一款新型无线可重构滚动球形机器人“PenduMorph”，具备模块化设计、内部摆锤驱动、磁性对接等特性，能够在复杂环境中实现保护性移动与模块间交互。实验表明该平台表现稳定，具备多种协同运动能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的滚动球形机器人多缺乏可变形、可靠运动和复杂环境下的模块互操作能力。本文旨在设计一种兼具独立滚动与模块可重构性的机器人平台，提升模块球形机器人在实际复杂接触环境中的适用性。

Method: 作者提出基于内部2自由度摆锤驱动的全封闭球形机器人架构，并集成无线控制、电池供能及磁性对接机制。通过理论分析磁性耦合机制和实验验证单体及模块间的滚动、耦合与协同运动。

Result: 实验证明该系统具备稳定的无线独立及模块协作运动能力，磁性对接保持力可满足实际需要，能执行多样的滚动与重构行为。

Conclusion: “PenduMorph”平台为模块化球形机器人稳定无线运行和复杂环境下的多样协作运动提供了可靠基础，对未来类似机器人设计具有一定参考价值。

Abstract: This paper presents "PenduMorph", a wireless reconfigurable rolling spherical robot designed as a modular platform for enclosed locomotion and inter-module interaction in challenging environments. The proposed robot extends our previous pendulum-actuated rolling disk concept to a fully enclosed spherical architecture integrating a 2-DoF internal pendulum, onboard control, battery-powered operation, and magnetic docking. The design aims to combine independent rolling mobility with protected hardware and reliable reconfigurability. We first present the robot design and an analytical study of the magnetic coupling mechanism to evaluate retention and interaction between coupled modules. We then experimentally investigate key motion behaviors at both the single-module and dual-module levels, including independent rolling, magnetic coupling, and coordinated coupled motion. The results show that the proposed platform enables stable wireless operation and a set of distinctive reconfigurable rolling behaviors, providing a useful foundation for future modular spherical robots operating in contact-rich and demanding environments.

</details>


### [537] [Semantic-Aware Autonomous Exploration for UAVs in Unknown Indoor Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22670)
*Duc-Thien Nguyen,Ngoc Minh Do,Xiem HoangVan,Thanh Nguyen Canh*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种将语义信息引入路线图基础无人机自主探索的方法，相较传统仅依赖几何信息的方法，大大提升了环境理解与探索效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有无人机探索方法多依赖几何信息，缺乏对环境语义的理解，导致探索效率低、环境认识有限。为提高无人机对有价值区域的关注度和整体探索效率，亟需引入语义感知能力。

Method: 基于动态探索规划器（DEP），该方法在不断生成的概率路线图（PRM）中叠加语义层，并设计语义奖励函数，使无人机优先探索含有重要对象和结构的区域。使用RGB-D传感器同步获取几何和语义信息，并在探索过程中实时更新路线图以优化路径规划。

Result: 在多个仿真环境实验中，该方法实现了90%-94%的探索覆盖率，同时在探索时间和路径距离上均优于传统基于几何信息的方法。

Conclusion: 引入语义信息显著提升了无人机自主探索的效率和环境理解能力，并有效减少了探索所需的时间与路径长度，有望应用于更多复杂自主探索任务。

Abstract: Autonomous exploration in unknown environments requires unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) to efficiently generate informative trajectories while simultaneously constructing accurate maps. Although many existing exploration methods rely on geometric information, they often lack semantic awareness, resulting in suboptimal exploration efficiency and limited environmental understanding. To address this limitation, this paper proposes a semantic-aware exploration framework that adds semantic information to a roadmap-based exploration strategy. The proposed method builds on the Dynamic Exploration Planner (DEP), which incrementally constructs a Probabilistic Roadmap (PRM), and augments this roadmap with a semantic layer. A semantic reward function is introduced to prioritize regions containing meaningful objects and structures, enabling the UAV to focus on areas with higher information value. Furthermore, the roadmap is continuously updated to support efficient frontier selection and path planning during exploration. The proposed framework is implemented in ROS Noetic and Gazebo using an RGB-D sensor for simultaneous acquisition of geometric and semantic information. Experimental results in multiple simulated environments demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves exploration coverage rates between 90% and 94% while reducing exploration time and travel distance compared with conventional geometry-based exploration methods.

</details>


### [538] [Efficient Continuous Semantic Mapping based on Spatio-Temporal Awareness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22672)
*My Le Pham,Dinh Trieu Duong,Xiem HoangVan,Thanh Nguyen Canh*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合时空推理的连续语义建图方法，显著提升了自主机器人对复杂环境的理解精度和效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的连续语义建图方法通常对空间整体进行处理，把体素视作独立单元，且无法保证语义标签的时序一致性，导致计算成本高和动态环境中的鲁棒性降低。

Method: 该方法将空间与时间关系引入语义推理，对局部的不确定区域动态调整推理范围，并对语义标签进行时序融合，以提升地图的稳定性和计算效率。

Result: 在SemanticKITTI数据集上，该方法相比单纯空间推理的语义建图，mIoU提升了13.18个百分点，达到54.92%，映射准确率约提升了12%。

Conclusion: 时空推理能极大地提升连续语义建图的准确性和稳定性，对自主机器人系统在复杂环境中的应用有显著效果。

Abstract: Continuous semantic mapping allows autonomous robots to understand both the spatial structure and the semantic content of complex environments. However, most existing methods process the entire space, treat voxels as independent units, and do not keep the semantic labels consistent over time. This leads to high computational cost and reduced robustness in dynamic scenes. This paper proposes a semantic mapping method that brings spatial and temporal relationships into the semantic inference process. The method adjusts the inference range according to the local semantic uncertainty and fuses labels over time to improve map stability and computational efficiency. Experiments on the SemanticKITTI dataset show that the proposed method improves mapping accuracy by about 12% and reaches an mIoU of 54.92%, which is 13.18 percentage points higher than spatial-only mapping. These results show that spatiotemporal reasoning is effective for continuous semantic mapping in autonomous robotic systems.

</details>


### [539] [Integrated cloud-based architecture for robot-robot and human-robot collaboration using ROS 2--MQTT in Mediterranean Greenhouses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22682)
*F. Cañadas-Aránega,M. Muñoz,J. C. Moreno,J. L. Blanco-Claraco*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种创新的云边混合架构，利用MQTT和FIWARE平台桥接ROS 2与决策支持系统，实现多机器人在地中海温室内高效可靠的通信与协作，并通过仿真与实地测试验证方案有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决传统机器人框架在复杂温室环境中因狭窄通道、密集生物质和金属干扰导致的通信不畅、实时协调困难等问题，提升可持续农业的自动化水平。

Method: 设计了一个基于云端与边缘计算的混合架构，以ROS 2作为边缘平台，iVeg作为决策支持系统，通过MQTT协议和FIWARE平台建立双向通信，支持多机器人之间关键数据的同步与互通，并在高保真仿真和真实温室中进行验证。

Result: 实验结果显示，该架构在恶劣网络条件下，仍能保持持久的连接和数据完整性。集成MQTT有效消除了信息孤岛，支持多机器人任务的分布式本地执行，具备良好的可扩展性。

Conclusion: 该研究为“温室模型即服务”（GMaaS）理念奠定方法基础，有效衔接了底层机器人控制与高层云端决策，为复杂农业机器人系统的实地部署提供了创新的可扩展解决方案。

Abstract: The imperative to develop more sustainable agriculture demands a transition from isolated automation toward the deployment of multi-robot systems (MRS) in agrifood environments. However, Mediterranean greenhouse settings-characterized by narrow corridors, dense biomass, and structural metallic interference-pose significant challenges for robust and scalable communication between agents. Traditional robotic frameworks, such as ROS 2, frequently encounter node discovery issues and latency spikes due to dynamic obstacles, dense foliage, and other characteristic greenhouse elements, creating a critical bottleneck for real-time coordination. This paper proposes an innovative cloud-based hybrid architecture that establishes a two-way communication bridge between ROS 2, acting as an edge computing platform, and iVeg as a Decision Support System (DSS), using MQTT and the European FIWARE platform. The proposed framework enables seamless interoperability between fleets of multiple robots in environments with communication constraints, facilitating the synchronised exchange of high-level telemetry, point cloud data and farmer identification for collaboration, amongst other critical data. The architecture was validated in a high-fidelity simulation environment and subsequently tested in a real-world greenhouse scenario, demonstrating its ability to maintain persistent connectivity and data integrity under adverse network conditions. The results indicate that the integration of MQTT effectively eliminates information silos, providing a scalable and decentralised solution for managing complex robotic missions, which are executed locally via Edge Computing. This work sets a new methodological precedent for the concept of Greenhouse Models as a Service (GMaaS), bridging the gap between low-level robotic control and high-level, cloud-based IoT decision-making.

</details>


### [540] [Temporal Logic Guidance for Action-Only Diffusion Policies with World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22729)
*Moritz Zoellner,Anastasios Manganaris,Rohan Paleja*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出一种新颖的方法，用于通过注入信号时序逻辑（STL）的梯度指导仅行动的扩散策略，实现机器人行为的多模态控制，并在不重新训练模型的情况下显著提升约束遵循性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的扩散策略虽然能够实现多模态机器人行为，但在推理时很难灵活选择和控制行为模式，这在实际人机交互任务中是一大障碍。先前使用STL表达意图引导扩散策略的方法，要联合生成未来动作与状态，导致复杂性和运行时间均大幅增加。该工作旨在解决复杂性高和推理时控制力差的问题。

Method: 作者提出一种面向行动的扩散策略引导方法：利用单独训练的世界模型，通过可微分方式对STL鲁棒性评分，并将其梯度注入扩散推理过程，从而优化行为使之满足约束，无需重新训练整个策略。

Result: 在Robomimic平台的Can Transport任务上，该方法维持了100%的任务成功率，并将违反约束的比例从基线方法的80%+降至4%。

Conclusion: 本文方法大幅提升了机器人的约束遵循性，并保留了任务表现，无需重新训练。作者还探讨了对鲁棒性及复杂约束进一步扩展的方向，表明方法的可推广性和实用价值。

Abstract: Diffusion policies enable multimodal robot behavior but offer limited ability to choose among behavior modes at inference time, even though such control is desirable in human-robot settings. Prior solutions to this lack of control have utilized Signal Temporal Logic (STL) to express human intentions and provide corresponding guidance for diffusion policy inference. However, these approaches can only guide diffusion policies that jointly generate future actions and states, increasing both complexity and runtime. We propose a novel guidance method for action-only diffusion policies that uses a separate learned world model to enable differentiable evaluation of STL robustness, with its gradient then injected into the diffusion process. This steers behavior toward constraint satisfaction without retraining, improving constraint adherence while preserving task performance. On the Can Transport task from Robomimic, our method maintains 100% task success while reducing constraint violations from over 80% for baseline methods to 4%. We also discuss extensions toward improved robustness and more complex constraints.

</details>


### [541] [HERCULES: An Open-Source Simulation Framework for Heterogeneous Multi-Robot SLAM, Collaborative Perception, and Exploration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22756)
*Sandilya Sai Garimella,Daniel Chase Butterfield,Sean Wilson,Lu Gan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本论文介绍了HERCULES——一个基于Unreal Engine 5的开放源代码异构多机器人仿真与数据采集平台，支持多类机器人（无人机与无人车）在真实感动态环境中的协同任务，并公开相关代码与数据，为多机器人自治研究提供强大工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多机器人仿真平台存在架构局限，无法支持大规模、异构（空地结合）机器人的高保真场景仿真与数据采集，缺少统一的控制接口、动态环境互动及多模态数据支持，限制了自治系统研究的发展。

Method: HERCULES基于AirSim和Cosys-AirSim，解决前代框架并发、多模态感知等问题，集成UAV和UGV共用的导航与控制模块，拓展传感器（如物理建模LWIR红外与夜视），提供轻量级API、ROS2支持与高精度时间同步。环境内融入行人、交通、野生动物等智能体及动态自然现象，实现高仿真大规模测试，支持数据回放和在线闭环自主两种模式。

Result: 平台可生成高质量大规模多机器人多模态数据集；支持复杂异构机器人SLAM、协同感知、探索等实验，实验证明该平台有效推动异构多机器人自治的相关研究。论文也随附代码、数据与文档，涵盖无人机和无人车在沙漠、森林、城市等多场景数据。

Conclusion: HERCULES极大拓展了异构多机器人仿真的能力，为该领域算法开发、实证和基准测试提供了公开、强大的支持平台，将促进多机器人自治系统的研究与应用发展。

Abstract: We present HERCULES, an open-source simulator and data-collection pipeline for heterogeneous multi-robot autonomy. Built upon the Unreal Engine 5 (UE5)-based simulators AirSim and Cosys-AirSim, HERCULES resolves key architectural limitations of prior frameworks to enable concurrent unmanned aerial and ground vehicle (UAV-UGV) operation in large-scale, photorealistic, dynamic environments. It introduces a new waypoint-tracking UGV controller that mirrors existing UAV control interfaces, and provides a shared navigation stack for mapping, traversability analysis, planning, and control across heterogeneous platforms. Expanding inherited sensor suites, it adds physics-based long-wave infrared (LWIR) cameras and configurable night-vision modes for degraded visual environments. HERCULES provides lightweight APIs, ROS 2 wrappers, and rigorous time synchronization across sensors and platforms, and brings state-of-the-art game-engine capabilities into robotics simulation, integrating intelligent agents such as pedestrians, traffic, and wildlife with high-fidelity dynamic phenomena, including fire, flooding, and crop disease spread. HERCULES runs in two modes: passively, replaying offline-designed trajectories to generate reproducible multi-modal datasets, and actively, running an online planner in closed loop from live observations. Our experiments in heterogeneous multi-robot SLAM, collaborative perception, and exploration, using both HERCULES-generated data and active closed-loop execution, demonstrate its utility for advancing heterogeneous multi-robot autonomy. We publicly release our source code, experiment code, documentation, and datasets, including a heterogeneous multi-robot SLAM benchmark collected with two UAVs and two UGVs across kilometer-scale desert, forest, and city environments, at https://lunarlab-gatech.github.io/HERCULES-website.

</details>


### [542] [Cooperative-ORCA*: Real-Time Proactive Deadlock Avoidance for Continuous-Space Multi-Agent Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22757)
*Junfeng Wu,Jiaqi Chen,Hongkun Lyu,Kevin Zheng,Andy Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了C-ORCA*及其扩展C-ORCA*-MAPF，能在连续空间中更好地防止多智能体路径规划（MAPF）问题中的死锁，比以往方法在求解率、运行时间和总耗时上有显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的实时多智能体路径规划（如ORCA*）因只能做本地决策，易产生死锁，事后修正（如ORCA*-MAPF的fallback机制）又会带来较高的时间成本。需要主动、提前防止死锁的方法。

Method: 提出C-ORCA*及C-ORCA*-MAPF算法，能综合考虑每个智能体的完整空间轨迹及空间间的依赖关系，从而在路径规划阶段主动避免可能产生的死锁。算法在连续空间下运行。

Result: C-ORCA*系列算法在多个评测指标上（包括求解率、运行时间和总流动时间）都显著优于以往的先进方法。

Conclusion: 通过引入完整轨迹和空间依赖建模，可以在连续空间下主动防止死锁现象，显著提升MAPF的效率和效果。C-ORCA*类算法在实际多机器人系统中有很大应用潜力。

Abstract: Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF) is a problem that requires computing collision-free paths for a set of agents from their start locations to designated goal locations. The problem has broad applications in domains where teams of robots must operate in a coordinated manner. ORCA* is a real time MAPF solver that assigns for each timestep a velocity for each agent. Due to its real time nature, it is myopic to future deadlocks that result from current decisions. ORCA*-MAPF attempts to remedy this limitation by introducing fallback mechanisms when deadlocks are detected. However, post hoc interventions often introduce significant flowtime overhead. In this paper, we introduce C-ORCA* and C-ORCA*-MAPF, continuous space MAPF algorithms that incorporate agents' entire spatial trajectory and their spatial dependencies to proactively prevent deadlocks from occurring, thus avoiding the high flowtime overhead associated with post hoc corrections in ORCA*-MAPF. The C-ORCA* family of algorithms significantly outperform previous state-of-the-art in terms of solve rate, runtime, and flowtime.

</details>


### [543] [UniFS: Unified Fast-to-Slow Hierarchical Architecture for Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22794)
*Lin Sun,Zhiwei Guan,Conglin Wang,Zihong Chen,Jianhai Yu,Zongsheng Li,Boyong He,Tao Sun,Jiale Cao,Lige Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出UniFS模型，融合快速与慢速处理机制，通过多层级、快慢结合的架构，实现高效且精确的视觉-语言-动作推理，显著提高了任务成功率并大幅降低了延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 主流的快慢分离视觉-语言-动作模型在效率和信息表达之间存在频率困境：频率差大导致语义漂移，太小则失去效率优势，而且模型仅用VLM最后一层特征，忽略了丰富的中间信息，限制了精度和信息耦合能力。

Method: UniFS通过三个关键设计解决上述问题：（1）将视觉-语言模型分层，不同层按不同频率更新，浅层适应快动态，深层稳记录语境；（2）采用潜在向量反演机制，把多尺度特征与动作专家关联，细粒度特征用于精细动作，粗粒度特征用于整体规划；（3）分层监督策略，引导跨时序层次的粗到细学习。

Result: 在LIBERO数据集上，UniFS取得98.3%的平均成功率，比VLA-Adapter基线高2.5%；推理延迟降低一半以上（从36.5 ms降至17.8 ms，提升2.1倍）。在Franka机器人上的实验证明其实际可用性。

Conclusion: UniFS融合多频时序处理和跨层信息流，实现了高效、精确和泛化的视觉-语言-动作协同，兼顾推理速度和语义一致性，适合实际机器人任务。

Abstract: Mainstream Fast-Slow dual system vision-language-action models decouple a high-frequency action expert from a low-frequency vision-language model for efficiency, yet they face a fundamental frequency dilemma: large update gaps cause semantic drift from stale context, while small gaps erode the intended computational savings. Moreover, because the action expert receives only the VLM's final-layer representation at a single fixed frequency, rich intermediate features are discarded, limiting both information coupling and manipulation precision. Inspired by multi-timescale neural processing in the human brain, we introduce UniFS, a unified fast-to-slow architecture that resolves these challenges through three key designs. First, we stratify the VLM layers into groups with progressively decreasing update frequencies, enabling shallow layers to capture fast-changing dynamics while deeper layers cache stable semantic context. Second, a latent vector inversion mechanism re-routes the interaction order between multi-scale VLM features and the action expert, aligning fast-varying representations with fine-grained action decoding and slow-varying ones with coarse planning. Third, a multi-level supervision strategy enforces a coarse-to-fine learning hierarchy across temporal scales. Together, these designs enable richer cross-frequency information transfer within a single backbone, while the low-frequency pathways additionally preserve temporal context across steps. Experiments on LIBERO show that UniFS achieves state-of-the-art performance (98.3\% average success rate, a 2.5\% gain over VLA-Adapter baseline) while reducing average inference latency from 36.5~ms to 17.8~ms (2.1$\times$ speedup). Real-robot experiments on a Franka platform further validate its practical applicability. Code is opensourced at https://github.com/linsun449/UniFS.

</details>


### [544] [Cloak: Zero-Shot Cross-Embodiment Manipulation by Masking the End-Effector from the VLA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22836)
*Michael Piseno,Guy Tevet,C. Karen Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Cloak的训练方法，通过在机器人腕部摄像头图像中遮蔽末端执行器，实现视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型的零样本跨形态迁移能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VLA模型在机器人换用新的末端执行器（如不同类型的手指或机械臂）后，通常需要重新收集和标注数据，迁移性和通用性较差。如何让已有数据和模型适应新的硬件形态，是提升机器人应用效率的重要挑战。

Method: Cloak方法利用机器人已知的末端执行器几何信息在仿真中实时生成遮蔽掩码，无需额外的分割或生成模型。训练时通过数据增强（变化掩码）让模型能对未见过的末端执行器泛化，实现形态无关的视觉推理。

Result: 以Cloak-VLA为例，团队在仅用单一夹爪数据训练的情况下，模型无需新数据即可零样本迁移到不同形态（包括新夹爪、不同机械臂及五指手），同时保持原形态的性能。

Conclusion: Cloak通过从视觉输入中“去除自身形态”，实现了数据与硬件解耦，使已有数据可以适应未来各种不同的机器人外形，提高了模型的可迁移性与实用性。

Abstract: We present Cloak, a training recipe that endows a Vision-Language-Action (VLA) model with zero-shot cross-embodiment transfer by cloaking the end-effector from its own wrist camera. The end-effector occupies a large and consistent region of the wrist view and masking it allows for embodiment-agnostic visual reasoning. Cloak renders a mask in simulation from the robot's known geometry, accurately and in real time, with no segmentation or generative models. During training, we augment the mask so the model generalizes to embodiments unseen at training time. We demonstrate the recipe with Cloak-VLA, a VLA trained with Cloak on a single parallel-jaw gripper dataset. No data of new embodiments is ever collected. Cloak-VLA transfers zero-shot to various unseen embodiments, including another gripper, another arm, and a five-fingered hand, while preserving the source embodiment's performance. By decoupling the wrist view from its own embodiment, Cloak allows data to outlive the hardware it was collected on.

</details>


### [545] [FPAS: Frontier-Based Path Planning with Adaptive Sampling for Large-Scale Unknown Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22838)
*Jinwoo Choi,Yeonkyu Lee,Jung-Taak Kim,Jisung Bae,Seung-Woo Seo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的路径规划方法FPAS，提升了大规模未知环境下的目标导航效率，兼顾了计算量与路径质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有路径规划方法在面对大规模未知环境时，容易因计算量大或路径低效而表现不佳。因此，亟需一种能够在保证导航效率的同时，减少计算资源消耗的新方法。

Method: FPAS方法结合前沿（frontier）概念与自适应采样机制：通过前沿引导机器人向未观测区域进发，并在遇到死胡同时选择合适的子目标进行回溯。同时，根据前沿推导的开放度指标，自适应地调节图中节点的分布：在宽阔区域采用稀疏采样降低计算压力，在狭窄通道保持高密度采样保证连通性。

Result: 实验结果表明，FPAS方法相比现有基线方法大幅提升了计算效率，同时在到达目标性能上保持高度竞争力。

Conclusion: FPAS通过创新的前沿引导与自适应采样机制，有效兼顾了路径规划的效率与质量，适用于大规模未知环境下的目标导航任务。

Abstract: In this work, we propose Frontier-based Path Planning with Adaptive Sampling (FPAS), a novel framework designed for efficient goal-reaching in large-scale, unknown environments. While existing planners often struggle with computational bottlenecks or inefficient paths during long-range navigation, FPAS overcomes these challenges by reinterpreting the frontier concept for goal-directed tasks. Specifically, our method leverages frontiers to effectively guide forward progression into unobserved regions and to select promising subgoals for backtracking from dead-ends or inefficient paths. Furthermore, FPAS introduces an adaptive sampling mechanism based on a frontier-derived openness metric. This mechanism dynamically adjusts the global graph's density by employing sparse nodes in open areas to alleviate computational burdens, while preserving denser sampling in narrow passages to ensure connectivity. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that FPAS substantially improves computational efficiency over baseline methods while maintaining highly competitive goal-reaching performance.

</details>


### [546] [HiL-ResRL: A Model-Agnostic Finetuning Adapter via Human-in-the-loop Residual Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22860)
*Jingyi Liu,Zhaohong Mai,ShunSen He,Hang Ren,Chao Wang,Shunbo Zhou,XiaoDong Wu,Heng Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的可直接应用于工业机器人领域的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型微调方案，仅需1.5小时在线训练，成功率即可超过95%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生成式模仿学习模型主要依赖行为克隆（BC），但其容易导致误差累积和分布转移，限制了在实际工业环境中的应用效果。

Method: 提出了一种模型无关的微调流程：将VLA模型的输出作为统一接口，训练残差策略校正次优动作并纠正分布转移，同时引入人工干预确保探索安全和高效训练。该方法适用于多种VLA模型。

Result: 在真实机器人环境中测试，仅用1.5小时在线强化学习训练，平均成功率超过95%。

Conclusion: 本工作为行为克隆模型在工业场景中的实际部署提供了可行且高效的解决方案。

Abstract: Recent advancements in generative imitation learning have significantly propelled the field of robotic manipulation. However, the majority of existing models rely heavily on Behavior Cloning (BC), a paradigm that suffers from compounding errors and distributional shift. Consequently, the efficacy of these models in practical industrial deployments remains limited. To address these challenges, we introduce a novel, plug-and-play fine-tuning pipeline designed to facilitate the robust deployment of Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models in real-world environments. In contrast to contemporary reinforcement learning (RL) fine-tuning strategies, which are often constrained by specific model architectures, our proposed framework is model-agnostic and adaptable to a diverse range of VLA models. We conceptualize VLA-generated actions as a unified interface, upon which we train a residual policy. This policy is designed to rectify suboptimal actions and address the distributional shift inherent in imitation learning. Additionally, we incorporate human-in-the-loop guidance to ensure safe exploration and maximize training efficiency. We conduct experiments directly in real-world robotic settings. The results demonstrate that within only 1.5 hour of real-world online RL training, the average success rate exceeds 95% on real robots. Our work presents a practical solution for deploying behavior cloning models in industrial scenarios.

</details>


### [547] [A Vendor-Agnostic LiDAR Data Conversion System with Multi-Signal Detection and Multi-Format Output](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22881)
*Param Patel,Jay Dave,Pratyush Chakraborty*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种通用的LiDAR PCAP文件解析与格式转换管线，支持市面主流四大厂商（Ouster、Velodyne、Hesai、Livox），实现了自动厂商识别及多格式输出。测试结果显示C++解析通道具有极佳性能，Python解析则受限于处理速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前不同厂家LiDAR的PCAP文件格式、协议与解析方式各异，亟需统一的数据管线解决繁琐的多SDK环境配置与兼容性问题。本文旨在提供一个通用、自动识别、可高效转换多种输出格式的工具。

Method: 管线自动评估PCAP文件六项特征，通过加权多信号方法判断厂商。对于Ouster与Velodyne采用C++ SDK解析，Hesai和Livox则基于Python dpkt手工包解析。最终支持五种行业标准格式输出。

Result: 使用实际环境中的PCAP文件测试，Ouster和Velodyne的C++解析每秒点数分别为2.08M和1.47M；Hesai和Livox采用Python解析，每秒点数为110K和150K。C++与Python解析之间存在8-10倍性能差距。所有测试均在普通i3/8GB环境下、无需特殊配置完成。

Conclusion: 本工作极大简化了异构LiDAR数据处理流程，提升了环境部署效率，并为行业标准化转换工具提供了高效、易用的解决方案。

Abstract: LiDAR (Light Detection and Ranging) sensors capture the surrounding environment as dense 3D point clouds by measuring the time-of-flight of emitted laser pulses, making them foundational across autonomous vehicles, robotics, and large-scale mapping. PCAP (Packet Capture) files from these sensors are the starting point of most 3D perception pipelines, yet internal packet structures, UDP (User Datagram Protocol) port conventions and encoding schemes differ enough across manufacturers that no single tool reads them all. Ouster, Velodyne, Hesai, and Livox each require their own SDK (Software Development Kit), their own environment setup, and their own conversion workflow. Supporting all four means maintaining four disconnected pipelines with no shared infrastructure. The pipeline described here takes a raw PCAP as input and handles vendor identification automatically, scoring six independent file characteristics through a weighted multi-signal approach to determine the source sensor. C++ SDKs handle Ouster and Velodyne, while Hesai and Livox rely on Python-based dpkt parsing where no open source SDK exists. From there, a single command writes output to any of five industry-standard formats. We tested on real outdoor captures. Ouster peaks at 2.08M points per second, Velodyne at 1.47M, both running through native C++ packet decoding. Hesai and Livox land at 110K and 150K respectively, where Python-layer parsing introduces overhead that compounds under sustained load. The 8-10x gap held consistently across runs. Tested on a consumer-grade i3 with 8GB RAM, no vendor configuration required

</details>


### [548] [Improving Robotic Imitation Learning via Trajectory Standardization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22907)
*Licheng Yang,Lingfeng Qian,Fei Zheng,Yonghao He,Wei Sui,Shuangshuang Li,Hu Su*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的轨迹重采样预处理方法ISR，能有效提高机器人模仿学习的数据质量和训练效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前机器人模仿学习依赖大量人为演示的数据，但此类数据常因操作员速度和动作密度不一致而产生噪声和冗余，传统的时间均匀下采样策略难以有效过滤这些问题，影响学习效果。

Method: 提出Information-Standardized Trajectory Resampling（ISR）方法，将轨迹映射到信息调制的黎曼流形上，通过地质等距参数化，基于速度和加速度构造信息强度场，实现按信息均匀间隔采样。速度项用于去除小幅度冗余，保持加速度项以保留精细操作阶段。

Result: 在三个真实世界的操作任务和主流模仿学习方法上，这一方法在减少数据集规模和训练成本的同时，将任务成功率提升约25%，并在不同操作者收集的数据集上均保持鲁棒性。

Conclusion: ISR方法能更有效地优化演示数据，提升机器人模仿学习的表现，有望广泛应用于实际机器人操作场景。

Abstract: Imitation learning for robotic manipulation relies on large sets of human demonstration trajectories, which are often noisy and temporally irregular due to variable operator speed, intermittent pauses, and inconsistent action density. A common preprocessing strategy is time-uniform downsampling to shorten sequences, but it cannot effectively remove speed-induced non-uniformity or redundant pauses. This mismatch degrades data quality and hinders policy learning.
