To address this issue, we propose Information-Standardized Trajectory Resampling (ISR), an offline preprocessing method for effective imitation learning. ISR resamples each trajectory by enforcing approximately equal information distance between adjacent points. Specifically, we map trajectories onto an information-modulated Riemannian manifold and perform geodesic-equidistant parameterization. We construct an information-intensity field from velocity and acceleration norms: the velocity term removes small-motion redundancy, while the acceleration term preserves high-curvature and fine-manipulation phases. We evaluate ISR on three real-world manipulation tasks with mainstream imitation learning policies. Compared with the baseline time-uniform 3x downsampling, ISR improves task success rates by about 25%, remains robust across datasets collected from different operators, and reduces both dataset size and training cost. The code and videos are publicly available at https://d-robotics-ai-lab.github.io/isr.page.

</details>


### [549] [PanoVine: Whole-Body Visuomotor Control for Soft Growing Vine Robot](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22923)
*Yimeng Qin,Xiaomeng Xu,William Heap,Aditi Oak,Shuran Song,Allison Okamura*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合全身视觉反馈的自主藤蔓机器人系统，通过机体上的19个相机实现闭环视觉运动控制，实现复杂环境下的鲁棒自主导航与操作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 藤蔓机器人因其灵活生长和顺应性适合在狭小复杂的环境中移动，但传统建模和控制困难，限制了其实用性。本文希望通过数据驱动的方法克服这些问题，实现真正自主的藤蔓机器人。

Method: 研究团队在藤蔓机器人本体沿线分布19个相机，获取关于机器人状态和环境的全面视觉信息，并通过示范学习训练端到端的视觉运动策略，实现闭环自主控制。该方法能整合分布式感知数据，并对状态与执行误差具有鲁棒性。

Result: 实验显示，学习得到的策略可以让藤蔓机器人在分叉结构、斜坡、无支撑地形、目标精确到达、狭窄空间与障碍穿越等多种复杂场景下实现稳定、高效的自主导航和操作。

Conclusion: 数据驱动+多相机分布式视觉反馈极大提升了藤蔓机器人在复杂狭窄环境下的自主性和鲁棒性，为软体机器人自主导航和操作提供新思路。

Abstract: Vine robots, a class of soft, growing robots, are suitable for navigating complex and confined environments due to their compliant bodies and self-supporting growth mechanism. However, hysteresis, tether interactions, and deformations make them difficult to predict and model, which in turn limits the effectiveness of conventional planning and control approaches. In this work, we present a data-driven, vision-based control framework for the first autonomous vine robot system. Our system integrates 19 cameras distributed along the robot's body to provide comprehensive feedback of both the robot state and the surrounding environment. Using this rich whole-body vision feedback, we train an end-to-end visuomotor policy from demonstrations for closed-loop autonomous control in complex environments. The policy efficiently aggregates information from distributed sensing while maintaining robustness to inaccurate robot states and actuation. Experimental results demonstrate that the learned policy enables robust navigation and manipulation in challenging scenarios, including steering through branched structures, climbing up slopes, traversing unsupported terrain, reaching objects precisely, and maneuvering through confined spaces and obstacles. Project website https://panovine-bot.github.io

</details>


### [550] [Humanoid-OmniOcc: Stereo-Based Full-View Occupancy Dataset for Embodied AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22971)
*Xianda Guo,Bohao Zhang,Chenwei Huang,Shiyuan Chen,Ruilin Wang,Yiqun Duan,Cong Yang,Qin Zou,Wei Sui*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了Humanoid-OmniOcc数据集和模型，用于提升仿人机器人在复杂环境中的体素级占据预测能力，并通过真实与仿真闭环流程显著提高泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前主流占据预测数据集多为自动驾驶场景，偏向于车辆感知（前视相机、远场、静态道路），无法覆盖仿人机器人在多样室内环境中的实际需求。缺乏面向仿人机器人、覆盖全景、支持真实闭环学习的数据集和方法。

Method: 1. 构建了Humanoid-OmniOcc大规模全景立体视觉占据数据集，涵盖15个模拟室内场景和5个真实环境，共超过15.5万样本，支持Sim2Real闭环评测。
2. 设计了Humanoid-OmniOcc全景立体视觉占据预测模型，结合深度先验实现2D到3D空间占据恢复。
3. 全流程围绕真实传感器驱动精准仿真，模型在仿真中训练后直接在真实采集数据上评估，支持Sim2Real迭代优化。

Result: 实验表明，所提出的数据集和模型在占据预测任务上显著优于单目基线方法，且在未知模拟场景和真实环境中均表现出良好泛化能力，验证了Real2Sim2Real设计的有效性。

Conclusion: Humanoid-OmniOcc为仿人机器人提供了高质量的全景立体视觉占据预测数据集与方法，突破了传统车辆感知数据集的局限，并通过Real2Sim2Real闭环优化方案，推动了相关领域的研究发展。

Abstract: Occupancy prediction at voxel-level granularity is essential for safe robotic navigation and interaction in complex environments. Existing occupancy datasets, however, are predominantly designed for autonomous driving with vehicle-centric biases -- forward-facing cameras, far-field geometry, and static road priors -- limiting their applicability to embodied humanoid perception. We present Humanoid-OmniOcc, a large-scale panoramic stereo-based occupancy dataset tailored for humanoid robots. The dataset encompasses 15 diverse simulated indoor scenes and 5 real-world environments, yielding over 155K samples with broad scene and style diversity. Importantly, the dataset is designed around a Real2Sim2Real closed-loop paradigm: real sensor specifications drive physically accurate simulation, simulation produces large-scale annotated training data, and models trained in simulation are directly evaluated on real-world captures -- enabling iterative refinement of the sim-to-real pipeline. We further propose \textbf{H}umanoid \textbf{S}urround \textbf{S}tereo-guided \textbf{Occ}upancy model (Humanoid-OmniOcc) that exploits robust depth priors for accurate 2D-to-3D lifting. Extensive experiments show that Humanoid-OmniOcc consistently outperforms monocular baselines and generalizes well to both unseen simulated test scenes and real-world environments, validating the effectiveness of the Real2Sim2Real design. Code and data will be available upon acceptance at https://d-robotics-ai-lab.github.io/humanoid-omniocc.

</details>


### [551] [Distilling Collaborative Dynamics into Latent Space for Implicit Coordination in Decentralized Multi-Agent Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22982)
*Chanyoung Park,Minsung Yoon,Andrew Jeong,Sung-eui Yoon*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出CLS-DP框架，实现了多臂操作任务下的隐式协调，解决了传统集中式方法在多智能体规模扩展差的问题。通过局部观测和共享任务指令推断协作潜变量，在不同任务中均显著优于集中式和去协作潜变量的基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多臂协作任务需要精确的时空协调，但传统的集中式方案在智能体数量增大时扩展性差。因此，亟需能够在部分可观测条件下实现高效隐式协调且计算负担不随数量增加的分布式方法。

Method: 提出CLS-DP框架，采用集中训练-分布式执行（CTDE）范式。通过蒸馏多智能体动态特征到潜空间，每个智能体根据自身的本地RGB观测和共享任务指令推断协作潜变量，并在扩散去噪过程中利用此潜变量实现隐式协作。整个流程无需全局状态信息或智能体间通信。

Result: 在六个RoboFactory基准任务（包含2~4个智能体）上，CLS-DP平均成功率38%，优于最优集中式基线的20%和无协作潜变量的分布式方法的9%；同时在参数效率方面也表现更优。归因图显示，智能体在推断协作潜变量后，会关注本地和队友的关键部件，有效编码协作动态。

Conclusion: CLS-DP实现了在部分可观测环境下无通信、高扩展性的多智能体隐式协作，在多个基准任务上大幅优于现有方法，展现了良好的实用前景和推广能力。

Abstract: Multi-arm manipulation demands precise spatiotemporal coordination, yet many centralized approaches scale poorly as team size increases. To address this, we propose CLS-DP, a decentralized multi-agent framework that enables implicit coordination under partial observability without shared global views, explicit state information, or inter-agent communication. Under the centralized training and decentralized execution (CTDE) paradigm, CLS-DP distills privileged multi-agent dynamics into a latent space. At deployment, each agent infers a collaborative latent from its local RGB observation and a shared task instruction; it then conditions the diffusion denoising process on this latent. This design enables implicit coordination with a per-agent cost independent of team size. Across six RoboFactory benchmark tasks spanning two to four agents, CLS-DP achieves a 38% mean success rate, outperforming the best centralized baseline (20%) and a decentralized ablation without the collaborative latent (9%). It also maintains superior parameter efficiency across all agent configurations. Attribution maps show that an agent conditioned on the collaborative latent places high attribution on the joints and grippers of both itself and its teammates throughout execution. This suggests that the learned latent efficiently encodes collaborative dynamics from local observation, which facilitates implicit coordination in realistic settings characterized by partial observability.

</details>


### [552] [TEXEDO : Test Time Scaling for Controller-aware Language-conditioned Humanoid Motion Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22998)
*Jianuo Cao,Yuxin Chen,Yuzhen Song,Masayoshi Tomizuka,Chenran Li,Thomas Tian*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本论文提出了一种名为TEXEDO的测试时刻缩放框架，通过多样采样和运动可行性、语义一致性双重验证，实现更高质量、更可执行的文本驱动机器人全身运动生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于文本的运动生成通常依赖于人类运动数据，这类数据虽有丰富语义与运动先验，但在仿真或现实中常出现机器人难以平衡、动力学不符合、实际不可执行的问题。作者希望增强生成运动的物理可行性和语义相关性，提升实际可用性。

Method: TEXEDO方法在测试时，对输入文本采样多个预训练生成器输出的候选动作。通过训练得到的奖励模型：动态可行性验证器（判断动作能否物理执行）与语义对齐验证器（判断动作与文本是否匹配），首先筛除物理不可行的动作，再在剩余集合中选取与文本最匹配的方案。可行性验证是硬约束，语义对齐为目标。

Result: 通过大规模仿真实验和现实Unitree G1机器人实测，TEXEDO能显著提升生成动作的物理跟踪质量和文本语义一致性。

Conclusion: 基于物理可行性验证的采样—筛选机制，是提升文本驱动人形机器人运动生成实际应用性的有效方法。

Abstract: Text-conditioned motion generation is a promising interface for programming humanoid robots, yet current generators are often trained on human motion datasets retargeted to robot morphologies. Although such data provides rich semantic and kinematic priors, it fails to capture the nuances of whole-body tracking controllers, including balance, contact dynamics, actuation limits, and controller-specific failure modes. As a result, generated motions can be semantically plausible but difficult or impossible for the robot to execute. We introduce TEXEDO, a test-time scaling framework for humanoid motion generation that improves motion quality without requiring a stronger underlying generator. Given a text prompt, TEXEDO samples multiple candidate motions from a pretrained text-conditioned generator and selects the best motion that is both executable and task-aligned. The reward model combines a dynamic feasibility verifier, distilled from whole-body tracking rollouts to predict physical executability, with a semantic alignment verifier that measures text-motion alignment in a learned co-embedding space. Our pipeline treats dynamic feasibility as a hard constraint and semantic alignment as the selection objective within the feasible set. Through large-scale simulation studies and real-world deployment on a Unitree G1 humanoid robot, we show that TEXEDO consistently improves both tracking fidelity and text alignment. These results demonstrate that grounded verification is an effective path toward deployable language-guided humanoid motion generation. Project website: https://jianuocao.github.io/TEXEDO/

</details>


### [553] [ISOPoT: Imaging Sonar Odometry by Point Tracking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23006)
*Jaša Samec,Vid Rijavec,Marko Peljhan,Aleksander Grm,Andrej Androjna,Danijel Skočaj,Matej Dobrevski*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对成像声呐数据的里程计方法ISOPoT，通过多帧点跟踪提升水下定位的准确性与鲁棒性，在公开与实测数据集上表现优于现有技术。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 水下环境导航困难，传统视觉方法在声呐图像上效果差，亟需针对声呐特点的高效、可靠位姿估算方案。

Method: 提出名为ISOPoT的成像声呐里程计方法，核心为基于多帧点跟踪建立关键点对应关系，并辅以轻量级优化算法，加强系统鲁棒性。

Result: 在Aracati 2017公开数据集和内部实际采集的水下声呐数据集上进行实验，ISOPoT在声呐独立或多传感器融合场景下均超越当前主流方法。

Conclusion: ISOPoT有效提升了水下声呐环境中的定位准确性和鲁棒性，对海洋机器人导航有重要意义。

Abstract: Reliable navigation in underwater environments remains a key challenge in marine robotics. In such scenarios, forward-looking sonars are a natural choice for long-range perception, offering wide coverage even in turbid, low-visibility conditions. However, sonar images are inherently noisy, contain artifacts, and lack rich semantic structure, causing standard computer vision methods for keypoint detection and matching to perform poorly. In this paper, we introduce ISOPoT, an imaging sonar odometry method based on modern point tracking techniques. We propose a sonar odometry pipeline that uses multi-frame point tracks as its primary correspondence representation, augmented with lightweight optimizations to improve robustness. We evaluated the proposed method on the Aracati 2017 dataset, as well as on an internal sonar dataset collected in real-world underwater environments. Our results show that ISOPoT outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods consistently in both sonar-only scenarios and in multi-sensor settings.

</details>


### [554] [AdaReP:Adaptive Re-Planning under Model Mismatch for Neural World-Model Predictive Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23079)
*Yutian Cheng,Xiaojian Ma,Xianhao Wang,Min Yang,Rongpeng Su,Hangxin Liu,Xi Chen,Shuai Li,Qing Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对神经世界模型与MPC融合的高效重规划方法，可显著降低计算开销，同时维持任务性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经世界模型结合模型预测控制（MPC）在每一步都需要重新规划以控制预测误差，但这样计算负担太重。虽然重用已有的缓存规划能减轻负担，但如何在保证性能的同时最大化重用效果成为关键问题。

Method: 作者通过扰动为基础的动态后悔框架分析了缓存规划的权衡关系，得出过期计划的代价与重用容忍度、累计误差和局部动力学敏感度有关。基于此，提出AdaReP——一个可在线自适应规划容忍度的训练外包裹器，通过当前偏离和局部敏感度估计调节重规划频率，无需修改原有世界模型和规划器。

Result: 于多种环境下（包括图像空间规划、潜空间控制和真实机器人操作实验），AdaReP在大幅减少规划器计算（如实体机器人实测减少80%查询数）的同时可保持接近原有的任务完成表现。

Conclusion: AdaReP无需额外训练，即可通过在线适应性能表现和敏感度，有效提升了神经世界模型与MPC结合下的计算效率，为实际应用带来了显著工程价值。

Abstract: Neural world models coupled with model predictive control (MPC) replan at every environment step to bound accumulated prediction error, but this incurs substantial computational overhead. Reusing a cached plan reduces this overhead, yet its effectiveness depends on how prediction mismatch propagates through the local dynamics. We analyze this trade-off with a perturbation-based dynamic-regret framework and show that stale-plan penalties scale with the reuse tolerance, the accumulated mismatch since the last replanning step, and the local dynamics sensitivity. Based on this structure, we propose AdaReP, a training-free wrapper that adapts the replanning tolerance online using the current deviation from the cached rollout and a local sensitivity estimate, without modifying the learned world model or planner. Across image-space planning, latent-space control, and real-world robotic manipulation, AdaReP substantially reduces planner-side computation while maintaining comparable task performance, including over 80% fewer queries on a 50-trial physical robot study.

</details>


### [555] [Foresight: Failure Detection for Long-Horizon Robotic Manipulation with Action-Conditioned World Model Latents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23085)
*Haoran Zhang,Yifu Lu,Boyang Wang,Xuhui Kang,Yen-Ling Kuo,Zezhou Cheng,Mengdi Wang,Odest Chadwicke Jenkins*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对长时间任务的机器人失败检测框架Foresight，只需使用任务级的成功/失败标签，通过动作条件的世界模型潜在表征与自适应阈值校准，有效提升了长时序操纵任务中的失败检测能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在实际机器人应用中，长时序任务常常面临失败检测困难，主要由于失败发生时机不明确且缺乏密集标注。因此，开发无需密集标注、泛化能力强的失败检测方法成为亟需解决的问题。

Method: 提出Foresight框架，利用动作条件的世界模型——从机器人动作轨迹中提取潜在嵌入，通过只需最终任务成败标签进行训练。应用功能共形预测(FCP)来自适应校准检测阈值，使检测方法能够统一适配不同策略和场景。

Result: 在LIBERO-Long、ManiSkill-Long和BEHAVIOR-1K等仿真环境中，与当前最先进的失败检测方法进行了对比。并在两种真实机械臂（ReactorX-200与Franka）上进行了真实验证，Foresight显示出更为准确和鲁棒的失败监测性能。

Conclusion: 动作条件的世界模型嵌入为长时序操纵中的失败检测提供了可扩展且可靠的表征，Foresight框架可望促进机器人任务在实际场景下的可靠部署。

Abstract: Long-horizon tasks are common in real-world robotic deployments, yet failure detection for such tasks remains underexplored. Detecting failures in long-horizon robotic tasks is particularly challenging because failure onset is often ambiguous and dense temporal annotations are typically unavailable. We present Foresight, a failure detection framework that monitors manipulation trajectories using latent representations from an action-conditioned world model. Foresight is trained using only final task-level success or failure labels. By leveraging predictive world-model embeddings, our method provides a unified framework for failure detection across different policies. We further use functional conformal prediction (FCP) to calibrate detection thresholds adaptively. We evaluate Foresight with state-of-the-art vision-language-action policies in simulation on LIBERO-Long, ManiSkill-Long, and BEHAVIOR-1K, compare it against state-of-the-artfailure detection methods, and validate it on real robots with three long-horizon tasks on a ReactorX-200 arm and one task on a Franka arm. Our results suggest that action-conditioned world-model embeddings provide a scalable representation for reliable failure monitoring in long-horizon manipulation.

</details>


### [556] [Flow as Flow: Modeling Robot Velocity Fields as Probability Velocity Fields for Flow-Based Object Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23090)
*Koki Seno,Daichi Yashima,Yusuke Takagi,Kento Tokura,Komei Sugiura*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的机器人操作表示方法——Flow as Flow，利用概率流建模机器人速度场，实现高效、高质量的通用机器人运动生成，并在多个任务和基准上取得领先性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有跨机器人平台（cross-embodiment）的数据在机器人基础模型训练中价值日益凸显，但主流方法多以稀疏关键点位移表示机器人动作，难以充分捕捉动作的连续性及运动细节，因此需发展更能反映实际运动流的表示方式。

Method: 作者提出“Flow as Flow”框架，首次将机器人流（velocity fields）作为概率流进行建模，采用flow matching理论实现连续、密集的速度场表示和生成，并改进运动生成流程以提升效率与质量。

Result: 在标准基准测试中，该方法在多项指标上优于代表性基线方法，生成速度约提升33倍。同时在真实机器人实验（9方法、13任务、每法260次实验）中，平均任务成功率也显著领先。

Conclusion: Flow as Flow方法在表达能力、生成速度及任务成功率方面均超越现有技术，为构建通用、高效的机器人运动基础模型提供了更优方案。

Abstract: Cross-embodiment data have become central to training robotic foundation models. To leverage such heterogeneous data, we focus on flow-based object manipulation, where robot flows (robot velocity fields) serve as embodiment-agnostic motion representations. Previous studies do not formulate robot flows as dense velocity fields, but as displacements of sparse keypoints, while such velocity fields better match the continuous-time nature of motions. We propose Flow as Flow, a framework that models robot flows as probability flows based on a flow matching formulation. By naturally modeling such velocity fields within this formulation, our method achieves efficient and high-quality robot flow generation. Across standard benchmarks, our method outperforms representative baseline methods on standard metrics, while achieving approximately 33$\times$ faster generation. Furthermore, through real-world experiments evaluating 9 methods with 260 trials per method across 13 manipulation tasks, we show that our method achieves a higher average success rate than the baseline methods. Our project page is available at https://flow-as-flow-u0n5y.kinsta.page.

</details>


### [557] [Assistron: Bayesian Shared Autonomy with Off-the-shelf Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23147)
*Pinhao Song,Ze Fu,Yutong Hu,Renaud Detry*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了Assistron，一种结合视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型实现的共享自主系统，可在日常活动中辅助用户。Assistron结合自主宏观动作和关键时点的人工干预，显著提升自动化操作成功率并降低用户负担。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人辅助操作方法要么全自动且易于在复杂互动中失效，要么需人工长期干预，用户负担大。为兼顾高效与安全，提高辅助机器人在多任务场景下的适用性和易用性，提出本方法。

Method: Assistron以用户语言指令为驱动，利用VLA模型自动完成宏观运动。在VLA易失效的动态接触阶段，系统基于相位感知机制检测互动状态并请求用户接管。用户干预后，通过流匹配方法引导VLA动作调整，实现人机协作。且无需对VLA进行微调，避免算法遗忘特性、保持泛化能力。

Result: 在包含多种日常操作技能的多任务场景评测中，Assistron相较纯自动和传统远程操作基线，显著提高成功率并降低用户的身体和认知负担。

Conclusion: Assistron实现了更高效、可扩展且顺滑的人机协作辅助操作新范式，兼具高自主性和低用户负担，具有广泛实际应用前景。

Abstract: We propose Assistron, a shared autonomy model that leverages Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models to assist the user in daily activities. Our approach is grounded in two core principles: (1)~minimizing human cognitive and physical effort by leveraging VLA-driven autonomy for macro-movements, and (2)~prioritizing human intervention specifically at critical failure points. Driven by the user's verbal language commands, Assistron utilizes the VLA to autonomously execute macro-reaching trajectories, saving users' effort. In contact-rich interactions where VLAs tend to fail, Assistron employs a phase-aware interaction detection mechanism and solicits the user to intervene, in turn adjusting the VLA's action generation via flow matching guidance. Critically, our formulation eliminates the need for VLA fine-tuning, protecting its broad behavioral priors from catastrophic forgetting and ensuring the model does not become a narrow specialist. We validate our approach on a comprehensive multi-task scene recovery benchmark encompassing diverse daily manipulation skills. Empirical results demonstrate that Assistron significantly improves task success rates over pure autonomous baselines while significantly reducing human cognitive and physical workload compared to traditional teleoperation, offering a scalable, smooth, and effortless paradigm for assistive manipulation. The code is available in https://github.com/mousecpn/Assistron.git.

</details>


### [558] [ShotcreteDepth: A Bi-modal Dataset for Robust Robotic Depth Perception in Shotcrete Construction Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23152)
*Jakub Gregorek,Lars Arnold Dethlefsen,Patrick Schmidt,Mads Essenbæk,Jonas Flink Bentzen,Lazaros Nalpantidis*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了ShotcreteDepth，一个面向施工场景、包含双模态数据（立体RGB图像和激光点云）的数据集，专注于应对恶劣环境下的视觉感知挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动施工和场景感知系统在高浑浊、光照差等恶劣环境下面临巨大感知难题，现有数据集难以真实反映实际挑战，因此需要专门采集和整理此类数据以推动研究进展。

Method: 采集了施工过程中及一般施工环境下的立体RGB影像和激光雷达点云数据，共计11,252组同步样本，并开发了高效标注工具，用于部分点云数据的人工标注。

Result: ShotcreteDepth数据集涵盖了真实施工环境中的多种感知难题，包含220个已标注点云数据，可用于深度估计、深度补全和立体匹配等研究。

Conclusion: ShotcreteDepth为工业环境下的感知研究提供了高质量、具备复杂环境适应性的公开数据集，有助于推动相关算法在现实复杂工况中的发展和评估。

Abstract: We introduce ShotcreteDepth, a bi-modal dataset from the construction domain that captures both an active shotcreting process and general construction environments. The dataset comprises stereo RGB imagery and LiDAR point clouds acquired under harsh real-world conditions, including high turbidity and poor illumination. Such conditions adversely affect sensor measurements, leading to incomplete and noisy observations that pose significant challenges for perception systems in autonomous applications. Alongside the dataset, we release a lightweight annotation tool designed for time-efficient labeling of LiDAR point clouds. ShotcreteDepth consists of 11,252 temporally synchronized data samples, of which 220 are annotated for evaluation purposes. The dataset supports research in stereo matching, depth completion, and depth estimation under conditions that closely reflect the operational complexities found in industrial settings. Project repository: https://github.com/dtu-pas/shotcrete-depth

</details>


### [559] [Asymmetric physics enables efficient learning in quadrupedal robot swarms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23153)
*Yuang Zhang,Yunlong Song,Zhihao He,Zelin Ni,Kangyu Wang,Tianchi Liu,Yu Hu,Feng Yu,Danping Zou,Weiyao Lin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本论文提出了一种基于异构物理引擎的端到端强化学习方法，实现了四足机器人群体在复杂环境中的高效自主协作导航。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 动物集群能够在复杂环境中通过局部协同实现高效导航，而机器人群体难以复现这一能力，尤其是当涉及视觉感知、密集交互和丰富接触运动时，现有的强化学习方法效率低下。

Method: 提出了在训练阶段分离物理模拟与可微分代理模型的“异构物理”方法：高保真非可微模拟器用于产生真实的运动与接触动力学数据，而可微模型则为导航和运动策略提供梯度，有效提升了大规模四足机器人群体的端到端学习效率。每台机器人仅依靠单个前向深度摄像头进行去中心化感知与决策，无需通信或全局地图。

Result: 最多支持512台机器人群体在障碍密集环境下实现高效协同导航。所学策略具备较强的泛化能力，在多种真实场景中，小规模的物理机器人无须额外训练即可实现群体导航、避障、右侧通行、瓶颈区暂停等待和贴墙移动等群体智能行为。

Conclusion: 异构物理方法极大提升了大规模、去中心化四足机器人群体的高效协作策略训练能力，对于现实中群体机器人在复杂环境下的自主导航具有重要推动意义。

Abstract: Animal collectives navigate cluttered environments through local coordination, yet robot swarms still struggle to reproduce this capability in the physical world. End-to-end learning offers a route to such coordination, but scaling it to embodied swarms remains difficult: standard sampling-based reinforcement learning becomes inefficient when visual perception, dense robot-robot interaction, and contact-rich locomotion must be learned together. Here we show that asymmetric physics enables efficient end-to-end learning of vision-based, decentralized control in large swarms of quadrupedal robots. During training, quadrupeds interact in shared environments, where a high-fidelity, non-differentiable simulator generates realistic motion and contact dynamics, and differentiable surrogate models provide gradients for navigation and locomotion policies. This separation enables up to 512 quadrupeds to learn coordinated navigation policies in obstacle-rich environments. At deployment, each robot acts from a single forward-facing depth camera, without explicit communication, centralized planning, or global maps. The policies generalize across forests, bridges, enclosures, narrow passages, and mazes, and zero-shot transfer to six physical quadrupeds across five real-world scenarios. The resulting swarms exhibit predictive avoidance, right-side yielding, pausing before bottlenecks, and wall following, showing that asymmetric physics enables efficient training of scalable decentralized control policies for quadrupedal robot swarms.

</details>


### [560] [Bridging Semantics and Kinematics: A Modular Framework for Zero-Shot Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23157)
*Ali Alabbas,Dipshikha Das,Camillo Murgia,Sainul Ansary,Alaa Elkamash,Philip Long*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种无需训练、模块化的零样本语言引导机器人操作框架，实现了在半结构化环境下的复杂任务操作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的视觉语言模型在机器人操作任务中存在空间歧义和语义幻觉等问题，并且难以兼顾高层语义推理和低层动作控制，因此需要一种能够桥接两者的可靠方法。

Method: 本文将视觉-动作流水线分为视觉感知、语义解释和任务执行三阶段。采用FastSAM与SoM提示结合生成视觉锚点，高层则用大语言模型作为语义路由，实现不受限的自然指令解析，最后由任务编排器自动生成机器人动作路径。整个方案无需领域内训练或手动坐标标注。

Result: 在无先验和复杂空间关系推理的两种零样本实验中，该系统获得了62%的端到端任务成功率，展现了强大的零样本复杂物理操作能力。

Conclusion: 该方法能够可靠地将自然语言指令转化为实际物理操作，为无需训练的通用机器人控制提供了有效路径。

Abstract: This paper presents a modular training-free framework for zero-shot, language-guided robotic manipulation in semi-structured environments. The architecture bridges the gap between high-level reasoning and low-level kinematics by decomposing the vision-action pipeline into three stages: visual perception, semantic interpretation, and task execution. To overcome the spatial ambiguity and semantic hallucinations inherent in standard Vision-Language Models (VLMs), the perception module employs FastSAM and Set-of-Mark (SoM) prompting to dynamically generate grounded, alphanumeric visual anchors. The same foundation model then operates purely as a Large Language Model (LLM) to act as a semantic router, translating unconstrained human directives into verifiable, reconfigurable configurations. Finally, these configurations are dynamically parsed by a Task Orchestrator into MoveIt Task Constructor (MTC) to generate collision-free trajectories. The framework is evaluated across two zero-shot experimental setups: unconstrained open-world sequential manipulation and dense relational spatial reasoning, achieving a 62% end-to-end task success rate across both scenarios, demonstrating its capacity to reliably execute complex physical actions without domain-specific training or manual coordinate programming.

</details>


### [561] [Lessons from the Field: A Case Study of Robotic Intervention in an Industrial Emergency](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23246)
*Jonathan Lichtenfeld,Frederik Bark,Robert Grafe,Oskar von Stryk*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文报道了一次机器人任务小组在化工厂火灾事故后，成功解除爆炸性气体危险的实地部署，为实际救援展示了机器人系统的必要性及现实挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 化工厂事故环境恶劣且风险高，一些区域由于污染或爆炸隐患无法安置人类，亟需能在危险环境下作业的机器人来替代人类完成关键操作。

Method: 研究团队部署了一辆配备定制操作工具的无人地面车辆（UGV）进入危险区域，具体任务是在危险环境下开启一个关键阀门以排除大规模爆炸风险。过程中记录了设备在现场的表现和面临的实际挑战。

Result: 机器人成功打开了关键阀门，有效消除了爆炸威胁，并实现了无人进入场所的应急响应。同时任务也暴露了研究型机器人平台在真实环境应用的通信不畅及操作辅助不足等局限。

Conclusion: 此次实地部署证明了救援机器人在高风险环境下的应用价值，但也强调了当前技术尚需在通信能力与操作人机交互等方面改进，以提升机器人系统在真实紧急状况下的实用性和效率。

Abstract: Incidents in chemical plants can pose a high level of risk and harsh environments for first responders. Contamination and explosion hazards can deny human access to the affected infrastructure, underscoring the need for capable robot systems. This field report documents the successful deployment of a robotic task force to neutralize an explosive gas hazard at a chemical plant after a fire incident. An Unmanned Ground Vehicle (UGV) with a custom manipulation tool opened a critical valve under hazardous conditions, averting the threat of a large-scale explosion. We provide insights into robot deployment and use the mission results to highlight both the importance of rescue robotics and limitations of using research platforms in real emergency deployments, such as communication constraints and the need for enhanced operator-assistance functions.

</details>


### [562] [LP-NavOA: Integrated Local Navigation and Obstacle Avoidance for Humanoid Robots under Limited Perception](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23249)
*Yukun Luo,Jianjun Ma,Yuyao Min,Jinzhe Li,Kaihong Huang,Peng Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了LP-NavOA框架，实现了仿人机器人在复杂环境下的自主本地导航与避障，无需全局地图和外部规划器，提升了导航效率和目标恢复能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 仿人机器人在复杂、障碍物密集且感知有限的环境中导航时，需同时满足避障、目标恢复和全身稳定运动等多重挑战。传统方法分为规划-控制分离易有延迟和不匹配，纯反应式控制器又容易因被障碍物遮挡而丢失目标。因此需要一种新的方法，能可靠、高效应对局部感知导航场景。

Method: 首先用射线检测驱动的PPO训练全身运动策略，融合速度和朝向命令及安全过滤。策略冻结后，用A*和航点导航教师生成训练轨迹，蒸馏生成循环神经网络结构的本地规划器，仅在推理时覆盖朝向命令而保留原本的全身策略。整个流程仅需自身位置、局部短距传感和目标方向输入，无需全局地图、外部路线点或外部规划器。

Result: 在MuJoCo仿真中，该方法能更好地完成避障和目标恢复，导航准时到达率由38-40%提升到85-97%，且有效减少与障碍物的摩擦和接触。消融实验说明动态路径调整、教师主动数据采集和圆形命令接口对提升导航效率和训练速度至关重要。实机（Unitree G1）测试证明无需持续遥控即可执行。

Conclusion: LP-NavOA兼具高效避障和目标恢复能力，在局部感知场景下提升了仿人机器人导航的鲁棒性和硬件可执行性，有望应用于实际复杂环境导航任务。

Abstract: Humanoid local navigation in cluttered environments must jointly resolve obstacle avoidance, sparse-goal recovery, and stable whole-body locomotion under short-range and partially observable sensing. Explicit planner-control decompositions introduce latency and can mismatch agile humanoid command-tracking limits, while purely reactive controllers may lose the goal after obstacle occlusion. We present LP-NavOA, a limited-perception navigation and obstacle-avoidance framework for humanoid robots. A raycast-conditioned perception-action proximal policy optimization (PPO) locomotion backbone is first trained with a robot-centered circular heading-speed command and a shared command-side safety filter. With this backbone frozen, A-star and waypoint teachers generate rollouts for distilling a recurrent local planner that overwrites only the heading command at deployment, leaving the whole-body policy intact. At runtime, LP-NavOA uses proprioception, short-range local range sensing, and a body-frame goal direction, requiring no global map, waypoint stream, or external planner. In MuJoCo open-wall and indoor layouts, the distilled planner produces obstacle bypassing and post-avoidance goal recovery, raising teacher-calibrated on-time arrival from 38--40\% to 85--97\% and reducing brush/contact-heavy progress relative to a backbone-only controller. Ablations show that dynamic route shaping, teacher-active data collection, and the circular command interface are important for navigation efficiency and for training the 3.0\,m/s backbone. A Unitree G1 deployment analysis demonstrates hardware executability without continuous joystick steering.

</details>


### [563] [Conceptual Design of an Ecosystem for Real Farm Data Collection toward Agricultural AI Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23258)
*Junsei Tanaka,Yoshihiro Sato*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出一种可持续的数据收集与分发生态系统，以激励农民为农业机器人AI提供真实农场数据，并保证数据真实性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前农业机器人发展面临真实数据稀缺难题，主要由于缺乏激励机制使长期数据收集困难。同时，生成式AI的发展使得验证数据真实性成为新挑战。

Method: 作者设计了一个结合自动定价（基于数据需求和稀缺性）、收益共享（激励农民持续提供数据）、和设备认证上传（确保数据来自真实农场）的生态系统。

Result: 通过经济价值评估，展示该生态系统可以在农民、AI公司、平台三方之间实现经济可持续。

Conclusion: 该方案有望激励农民持续提供数据，并保证数据真实性，为农业AI的长期发展提供坚实的数据基础。

Abstract: Data scarcity is a fundamental challenge in developing AI and foundation models for agricultural robots. Existing open-source data platforms do not provide sufficient incentives for data providers so long-term data collection remains difficult. Furthermore, advances in generative AI have introduced a new challenge of verifying that collected data genuinely originates from real farm environments. We propose an ecosystem for the sustainable collection and distribution of real farm data, integrating automatic pricing driven by demand and rarity, revenue sharing that distributes earnings to farmers as an incentive to keep providing data, and data authenticity guarantees through authenticated device uploads. To demonstrate the economic sustainability for all three parties among farmers, AI companies, and the platform, we estimate the economic value that agricultural robots stand to generate.

</details>


### [564] [Causal Reward World Models: Zero-shot Reward Design for Automated Skill Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23280)
*Yang Yang,Yuchuang Tong,Zhengtao Zhang,Xu Ding,Ning Yang,Yifan Zhang,Haipeng Li,Kehu Yang,Miao Xin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的自动化奖励设计（ARD）方法，即因果奖励世界模型（CRWM），能高效且可解释地自动生成强化学习中的奖励函数，实现零样本奖励设计，并在复杂场景下超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于大模型的奖励生成易受伪因果分量影响，且需频繁环境反馈迭代，导致效率低且优化无效。作者希望让奖励设计过程更高效、因果、可解释。

Method: 提出CRWM，通过离线对多任务交互数据进行粗到细的因果结构建模，结合机制解耦与置信度融合优化奖励组件，并让LLM推理时以CRWM为无关任务的因果先验，直接生成奖励，无需环境反馈迭代。

Result: 在复杂连续控制任务上，CRWM能一次性地生成有效可执行奖励函数，无需额外反馈优化，显著减少新任务奖励设计等待时间，在各项指标上与甚至超过SOTA方法，并能很好泛化到新任务与不同机器人形态。

Conclusion: CRWM开辟了自动奖励设计的新白盒范式，具备效率和可解释性，具有很强实用价值。

Abstract: Automated Reward Design (ARD) aims to replace manual reward engineering in reinforcement learning with language-driven reward function synthesis. However, existing approaches based on large language models (LLMs) remain inherently correlation-driven, relying on iterative environmental feedback to refine reward hypotheses for each specific task. This paradigm not only results in inefficient reasoning but also makes LLMs susceptible to semantically plausible yet causally spurious reward components, leading to ineffective optimization. To address these limitations, we propose the Causal Reward World Model (CRWM), which explicitly models the causal topological relationships between candidate reward components and task-targeted physical variables through offline pre-training on multi-task interaction data. Based on a coarse-to-fine pre-training strategy, we introduce a joint optimization module that integrates Explicit Mechanism Decoupling with Confidence-Aware Soft Fusion to refine coarse structural priors using micro-level trajectories, thereby constructing a robust and interpretable causal skeleton. During inference, LLMs leverage CRWM as a task-irrelevant causal prior to constrain the reward generation, enabling zero-shot reward function design. Our work opens up a new white-box paradigm for the ARD problem. Extensive experiments on complex continuous control benchmarks demonstrate that CRWM generates executable reward functions without feedback-driven reward refinement, significantly reducing the design latency for acquiring new robotic skills while matching or surpassing state-of-the-art performance, and further exhibits strong generalization capabilities across unseen tasks and diverse robotic embodiments.

</details>


### [565] [IOI: Decoupling Kinematics and Physics for Interactive World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23296)
*Chengyu Bai,Peidong Jia,Tiecheng Guo,Yukai Wang,Rui Ma,Fangyuan Zhao,Chunkai Fan,Xiaobao Wei,Jintao Chen,Hao Wang,Ying Li,Xiaozhu Ju,Jian Tang,Shanghang Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合解析运动学先验与数据驱动物理建模的混合交互世界模型IOI，实现了更高精度的体感智能体仿真与泛化。IOI通过显式运动学引导与多视图融合，有效提升模拟效果，对政策评估和实际应用均有良好表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有交互式世界模型通常依赖纯数据驱动，难以兼顾物理合理性和动作控制精确性。缺乏结构化先验导致仿真漂移，影响智能体泛化、策略训练和实际部署。

Method: IOI方法将解析的运动学（前向运动学）和学习得到的物理动力学相结合，通过逐步计算动作轨迹并生成多视角正交投影，准确描述目标运动过程。提出多视图运动学融合与注入模块，将解析运动学运动结果作为几何先验，引导视频生成器产生结构一致的仿真反馈，从而兼容确定性与随机相互作用建模。

Result: 在RoboTwin基准验证中，IOI在运动学逼真度、OOD泛化、策略评估等方面均取得领先，具备强健的零样本泛化能力，生成的策略评估结果与真实物理高度一致。

Conclusion: IOI通过引入显式解析运动学约束，为复杂体感智能体的交互世界建模带来了精度与通用性的突破，验证其政策生成和实际训练的可行性与实用价值。

Abstract: Developing generalist embodied agents requires interactive environments providing visually realistic feedback and accurate action-conditioned dynamics. Interactive world models address this by simulating such complex dynamics. However, purely data-driven methods struggle to ensure precise control alignment and physically plausible visual feedback due to a lack of explicit structural constraints. To address this, we propose IOI, a hybrid interactive world model integrating analytical kinematic priors with learned physical dynamics. Unlike data-driven approaches prone to spatiotemporal drift, IOI introduces explicit kinematic guidance, computing forward kinematics from action sequences for accurate motion trajectories. These trajectories are rendered into synchronized front, side, and top orthographic projections, eliminating the need for extrinsic camera calibration. A Multi-view Kinematic Aggregation and Injection module fuses these geometric cues and injects them into the video generator, providing geometry-consistent guidance. Conditioning video generation on these deterministic trajectories establishes a synergy between the analytical simulator and the world model. Decoupling deterministic motion into the kinematic prior frees the generator to model stochastic physical interactions. Experiments on the RoboTwin benchmark validate IOI across kinematic fidelity, out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization, and policy evaluation. IOI achieves state-of-the-art simulation performance and robust zero-shot generalization to unseen OOD tasks. Furthermore, IOI serves as a reliable policy evaluator, yielding success rates closely aligning with ground-truth physics simulators. On real-world platforms, policies trained on IOI-synthesized data match those trained on teleoperation demonstrations, solidifying its practical value for embodied policy learning.

</details>


### [566] [From Pixels to Concepts: Growing Rich 3D Semantic Scene Graph Forests utilizing Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23312)
*David Oberacker,Meike Deitersen,Niklas Spielbauer,Tristan Schnell,Georg Heppner,Arne Roennau*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本论文提出结合基础模型和层次化3D场景图，实现机器人对复杂环境中更丰富语义关系的理解与操作能力提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统3D场景图方法只考虑有限、预设的关系类别，忽视如因果关系、环境语境等更丰富的语义联系，限制了机器人对实际环境的理解与任务执行能力。

Method: 提出一种方法，首先通过视觉语言模型（VLM）识别具体实例的概念节点和关系，随后利用大语言模型（LLM）进行推理，生成更高层次、更抽象的概念节点及其关系。将这些对象节点与概念节点组装成场景图森林（forest），并引入抽象概念节点。

Result: 在uHumans2和ScanNet两个室内数据集上评估了所生成关系的准确性和相关性。此外，通过对象检索任务，验证了场景图森林在机器人实际应用中的有效性，包括在ScanNet数据集和真实环境（使用Boston Dynamics Spot机器人）中的实验。

Conclusion: 结合基础模型与层次化3D场景图的新方法能够更好地捕捉环境的语义和关系深度，提升了机器人对场景的理解及其在复杂任务中的表现潜力。

Abstract: Operating in complex real-world environments requires robots to understand their surroundings on a functional semantic level. This demands a detailed multi-layer world model capturing the complex relations of its surroundings. Hierarchical 3D scene graphs address this challenge by integrating geometric, semantic, and relational data within a unified spatial framework. However, current 3D scene graph approaches often restrict themselves to rigid structures of pre-determined relationship classes, mostly neglecting important semantic connections, like causal connections or environmental contexts. This paper explores the potential of foundation models to build forests of 3D scene graphs with open semantic relationships to improve scene understanding and robotic task execution. We propose a method where instance-specific concept-nodes and relationships are first identified by a VLM and extended upon by a LLM, inferring broader, more abstract concept-nodes and relationships through reasoning. These object-nodes, concept-nodes, and relationships are then assembled into a forest of hierarchical 3D scene graphs, enhanced with concept-nodes to represent abstract concepts. Evaluations were conducted on the uHumans2 and ScanNet indoor dataset, validating the accuracy and relevance of the generated relationships. Downstream suitability of scene-graph forests for robotics applications is demonstrated in an open-vocabulary object-retrieval task utilizing both ScanNet data and a real-world indoor deployment using a Boston Dynamics Spot. This paper leverages foundation models to create more expressive, semantically deep 3D hierarchical scene graphs and demonstrates their potential to advance semantic and environmental understanding in robotics.

</details>


### [567] [When Robots Rate Their Own Interactions: Engagement Validity and the Strangeness Failure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23339)
*Victor Lockwood,Hasan Mahmud,Mohammad Javad Khojasteh,Prabu David,Jamison Heard*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出用大型语言模型（LLM）赋能的机器人，从自身视角完成HRI（人机交互）评估问卷，并与人类评价进行对比。LLM在互动满意度、参与度上与人类评价中等到高度一致，但在舒适/陌生感维度上表现反向，提示其内在情感体验存在局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前人机交互评价几乎只依赖人类填写问卷，忽视了机器人的主观视角。本研究希望探索从机器人自身角度出发，利用LLM对交互进行自评，检验其评估结果与人类“真实”评价是否一致，为HRI多元评估方法提供理论与实证基础。

Method: 研究1：让五种不同的LLM对HRI-CUES数据集中的25段交互完成三份标准化问卷，并与人类真实评分对比一致性。
研究2：让Nao机器人运行Claude Sonnet 4.5，在真人实时互动中进行回合间自评，复现第一步实验结果。还引入合成控制、真实部署等多种条件检验一致性。

Result: LLM对交互的满意度、趣味性等参与度维度评分与人类评价有较高一致性（如满意度r高达0.65，趣味性r高达0.72，重测信度ICC≥0.82），但在舒适/陌生感维度上与人类评分系统性相反（r为-0.44至-0.67），而且混淆了参与度与舒适度。第二步在机器人现场互动中复现了该现象，多个模型、条件下均有类似结果。

Conclusion: 目前的LLM赋能机器人因缺乏真实的内在情感体验，难以准确评价如“陌生感”等主观情感构念。“反向评估”法需要结合生理、视线、距离等多模态数据提升评估准确性。这一发现明确了LLM在HRI评价应用的边界条件。

Abstract: Human-robot interaction (HRI) evaluation relies almost exclusively on human-completed questionnaires, leaving the robot's perspective unexamined. We propose an \textit{inverted evaluation}, in which LLM-powered robots complete the same standardized instruments from their own perspective, and test whether these ratings agree with human ground truth. In Study~1, five LLMs completed HRI-CUES, Godspeed, and RoSAS questionnaires for 25~interactions ($N = 1{,}522$ evaluations) from the HRI-CUES dataset. LLMs achieved moderate-to-strong agreement on engagement dimensions (satisfaction $r$ up to $.65$ and enjoyment $r$ up to $.72$) with excellent test-retest reliability (ICC $\geq .82$), but \textit{systematically inverted} the comfort/strangeness dimension ($r = -.44$ to $-.67$, all $p < .05$), conflating engagement with comfort. In Study~2, a Nao robot running Claude~Sonnet~4.5 replicated these patterns in live interactions ($N = 4$), including real-time turn-by-turn assessment. The strangeness failure persisted across five models, synthetic controls, and embodied deployment for two participants. We argue that current LLM-based robots lack access to the internal affective states needed to assess constructs like strangeness, and that inverted evaluation requires supplementary modalities (e.g., physiological signals, gaze, proxemics) to move beyond behavioral proxies. These findings establish boundary conditions for using LLMs as interaction evaluators in HRI.

</details>


### [568] [A Relaxed Quadratic-Program-based Framework for Trajectory Tracking of Unicycle Robots with Singularity Avoidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23355)
*Hamza Tariq,Usman Ali,Adeel Akhtar*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于二次规划(QP)的最优控制框架，用于避免传统动态反馈线性化(DFL)在速度为零时的奇异性问题，并在仿真中验证了在移动机器人轨迹跟踪中的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的DFL方法在移动机器人速度为零时会发生数学奇异，使其无法兼容停止与反向等复杂轨迹跟踪任务。为克服此固有限制，研究者需要发展更为鲁棒的控制器。

Method: 作者将DFL约束重构为带松弛变量的等式约束二次规划，使得即便在速度为零等特殊状态下也能保证问题可行性。方法中还引入了可调参数以适应更广泛的参考轨迹。并通过仿真验证方法有效性。

Result: 所提框架在TurtleBot3 Waffle的ROS 2-Gazebo仿真环境下实现了鲁棒的轨迹跟踪，支持位置速度为零等复杂轨迹，验证了消除奇异性的能力。

Conclusion: 基于QP的DFL控制方法有效突破了传统DFL的奇异性问题，实现了对更大类轨迹的跟踪控制，新方法具有良好的实际应用前景。

Abstract: Dynamic feedback linearization (DFL) is a classical technique for trajectory tracking of unicycle-type mobile robots, but the resulting DFL-based controller becomes singular when the linear velocity vanishes, rendering standard DFL-based controllers unsuitable for stop-and-reverse maneuvers. This paper proposes a quadratic-program (QP)-based optimal control framework that avoids this singularity, while establishing local Lipschitz continuity of the resulting feedback law. Our approach reformulates the DFL constraints as an equality-constrained QP with a slack variable, ensuring feasibility for all states and reference signals, including at points where the robot's velocity vanishes. By introducing slack variables and tunable parameters, we demonstrate that the singular configuration can be avoided for a large class of reference trajectories. The effectiveness of the proposed approach for trajectory tracking is demonstrated through ROS 2-Gazebo simulations on a TurtleBot3 Waffle robot. The code is available at https://gradslab.github.io/DFL_QP_Unicycle/

</details>


### [569] [TSD: A Physics-Inspired Trajectory Saliency Detector for Efficient Imitation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23371)
*Yiming Zhao,Gongrui Ma,Qingkai Li,Mingguo Zhao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的轨迹显著性检测方法(TSD)，能够筛选对任务成功至关重要的机器人操作轨迹，有效降低数据收集和训练成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在机器人模仿学习中，优质数据稀缺且收集成本高，许多不重要的数据会浪费资源。研究人员希望通过自动筛选有价值的数据，提升数据利用率和模型训练效率。

Method: 作者观察机器人操作轨迹，将动作分为过渡、精细和敏捷三类，并定义后两者为轨迹显著性。提出无需训练且即插即用的TSD方法，分别利用空间熵和向心加速度两个物理指标来识别重要轨迹。TSD被用于数据集压缩（减少训练成本）和扩展（提升采集效率）策略。

Result: 实验表明，无论在仿真还是现实场景，基于TSD压缩后的数据集训练出的模型性能可与完整数据集媲美，且平均只需75%的数据。

Conclusion: TSD和相关数据筛选策略有效提升了机器人学习过程的数据利用率和成本效率，为构建信息密集型数据集提供了一种可扩展的解决方案。

Abstract: For imitation learning in robotic manipulation, high data collection costs result in the scarcity of high quality data. In this paper, we leverage the inherent heterogeneity of trajectories to address this challenge. Based on our observations of manipulation tasks, we categorize motions into transitional, precise, and agile types, defining the latter two as trajectory saliency due to their criticality to task success in contrast to the prevalent but less relevant transitional motions. Therefore, we propose the Trajectory Saliency Detector (TSD), a training-free and plug-and-play framework to identify trajectory saliency. TSD employs two physically-grounded metrics: spatial entropy to capture fine-grained manipulation and centripetal acceleration to detect agile maneuvering. We further leverage TSD to develop a dataset compression method that reduces training costs and a dataset expansion strategy that improves data collection efficiency. Extensive experiments in both simulation and real-world settings demonstrate that models trained on TSD-condensed datasets achieve comparable or even superior performance with 25% less data on average. These results validate the effectiveness of our dataset compression and expansion strategies, thereby confirming the utility of TSD. Consequently, TSD offers a scalable and cost-effective pathway to synthesize information-dense datasets for efficient robot learning. Project page: https://trajectory-saliency-detector.github.io/trajectory-saliency-detector/

</details>


### [570] [Flowing With Purpose: Latent Action Guided Flow Matching Policies For Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23420)
*Bruno Machado,Alexandre Chapin,Emmanuel Dellandrea,Liming Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的流匹配方法LAFM，用于提升机器人行为克隆性能，并显著超越了现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前主流的流匹配方法采用统一各向同性分布作为源分布，无法适应机器人动作空间的复杂结构，导致模型训练效率低且效果受限。

Method: 提出Latent Action Guided Flow Matching（LAFM）框架。LAFM 利用潜在动作模型将观察映射到离散运动原语，并为每个原语选择一组经过学习的自适应先验分布，替代传统的单一高斯分布，从而实现动态适应和结构对齐。

Result: LAFM在真实机器人任务中的成功率提升了23.4%，在LIBERO-90基准上提升10.4%；其性能超过了大规模预训练的视觉-语言-动作模型，且所用模型规模更小。

Conclusion: LAFM通过与动作空间结构对齐的适应性先验分布，有效提升了流匹配行为克隆的效率和效果，为机器人操控领域树立了新标准。

Abstract: Flow matching has recently become a new standard for behavior cloning in robotic manipulation. However, state-of-the-art flow matching policies suffer from a systematic structural mismatch: they rely on a globally fixed isotropic source distribution despite the strongly fragmented and heteroscedastic structure of robotic action spaces. This agnostic initialization forces the model to learn highly entangled vector fields, bottlenecking training efficiency and limiting overall policy performance. To address this limitation, we introduce Latent Action Guided Flow Matching (LAFM), a novel framework that replaces the monolithic Gaussian with an adaptive library of learned prior distributions. By grounding these distributions using a latent action model, LAFM maps current observations to discrete motion primitives, selecting a specialized base distribution that provides an informed, structurally aligned initialization for the denoising process. This dynamic adaptivity naturally accommodates heteroscedasticity in human demonstrations and makes transport trajectories shorter and less entangled. Empirically, LAFM substantially outperforms standard flow matching formulations, increasing task success rates by 23.4% in real-world robotic deployments and by 10.4% on the LIBERO-90 benchmark. Furthermore, we demonstrate that LAFM achieves state-of-the-art results, surpassing massively pre-trained vision-language-action models while utilizing significantly smaller architectures.

</details>


### [571] [DexTeleop-0: Force-Aware Bimanual Dexterous Teleoperation with Ego-Centric Perception towards Shared Autonomy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23431)
*Haichao Liu,Yuyao Jiang,Hyunsun Park,Yuanjiang Xue,Ziwei Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于触觉驱动的自适应策略，显著提升了双手精细操作机器人的操控精度和效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人双手操作系统在复杂、充满接触的任务中表现不佳，原因在于人机映射存在差距以及缺乏力反馈，导致高精操作数据获取效率低。

Method: 作者提出一种嵌入于DexTeleop-0框架中的触觉驱动自适应策略，通过实时优化循环，将粗略的人类跟踪意图细致转化为带触觉感知的精准机器人操作命令。系统结合接触点估算与基于触觉的指尖力传感，通过任务空间Jacobian动态计算局部修正，实现对关节角度的精细更新。

Result: 在仿真与真实硬件测试中，所提出方法在抓取、抗干扰操作及复杂精细任务上，均较主流基线方法有更高成功率和执行效率。

Conclusion: 基于触觉的自适应策略有效弥合了人机映射差距，为高精细度双手机器人操作提供了新路径。

Abstract: Fine-grained, bimanual dexterous manipulation remains a foundational challenge in robotics. Traditional teleoperation systems often fail in contact-rich tasks because embodiment gaps hinder accurate kinematic mapping, while tactile and force feedback remain absent. Consequently, data collection efficiency for high-precision tasks remains prohibitively low. To address these limitations, we propose a tactile-driven adaptation strategy designed to enable fine-grained manipulation on top of teleoperation pipelines. Instantiated within our bimanual dexterous framework, DexTeleop-0, this strategy introduces a real-time optimization loop that bridges the embodiment gap by translating coarse human tracking intents into precise, force-compliant robotic commands with tactile sensing. By estimating accurate contact points and leveraging a tactile-enabled fingertip force-sensing profile, the system dynamically computes localized corrections using the operational space Jacobian with respect to joint angle updates. We rigorously evaluate this tactile-driven adaptation strategy across both simulated environments and real-world hardware. Compared with representative baselines, the proposed method consistently achieves higher task success rates and improved execution efficiency in robust grasping, disturbance-resilient manipulation, and complex dexterous tasks.

</details>


### [572] [SkyJEPA: Learning Long-Horizon World Models for Zero-Shot Sim-to-Real Control of Quadrotors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23444)
*Pratyaksh Rao,Wancong Zhang,Randall Balestriero,Yann LeCun,Giuseppe Loianno*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于Joint Embedding Predictive Architectures（JEPA）的实时四旋翼无人机控制方法，提升了动态模型的长期预测准确性，并实现了高效的实际控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经网络动力学模型虽然能够捕捉复杂的非线性，但在长时域预测中易积累误差，难以满足无人机等敏捷机器人在不确定环境下的高频控制需求。JEPA虽然可在潜在空间建模动力学，但之前主要应用于运动学规划，对高频控制的研究不足。

Method: 作者提出了将JEPA与一种基于物理启发的prober结合，通过将固定潜变量映射为可解释的物理状态，从而进行长期、物理一致的预测。同时，结合采样优化控制器，将该模型应用到实际的嵌入式无人机硬件中。此外，还提出了自动化数据集生成管道，减少对昂贵且不安全的实地采集的需求。

Result: 通过大量开环实验和户外闭环实验，验证了该模型对四旋翼无人机轨迹的高精度预测能力、强健的零样本仿真到现实迁移能力以及在多种不同工作环境下的强泛化性。

Conclusion: 所提方法在实时、高频机器人控制任务中表现突出，有助于动力学模型在实际机器人系统中更好地结合预测、控制与泛化能力。

Abstract: Accurate dynamics models are critical for informed decision-making in robotic systems, particularly for agile aerial vehicles operating under uncertainty. Neural network dynamics models are attractive for capturing complex nonlinear effects, but existing predictive approaches struggle with long-horizon forecasting because their autoregressive rollout mechanism amplifies errors over time. Joint Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs) offer a compelling alternative by modeling dynamics in latent space, yet prior JEPA-style methods for robot navigation have been studied primarily for kinematic-level planning, with limited investigation in high-frequency control. In this work, we introduce the JEPA-style model for real-time quadrotor control. The proposed approach combines a latent dynamics model with a novel physics-inspired prober that maps frozen latents to interpretable state, enabling physically grounded long-horizon prediction. Additionally, we combine the learned model with a sampling-based optimal control solution to take advantage of its predictive capabilities for real-time control on embedded hardware. Finally, to reduce the dependence on expensive and unsafe real-world data collection, we develop a structured pipeline for automated dataset generation. Extensive open-loop and outdoor closed-loop experiments demonstrate accurate prediction, robust zero-shot sim-to-real transfer, and strong generalization across diverse operating conditions.

</details>


### [573] [DVL-DeepONet: A Physics-Guided Operator Learning for Resilient Underwater Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23502)
*Arup Kumar Sahoo,Itzik Klein*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为DVL-DeepONet的深度神经算子框架，针对自主水下航行器（AUVs）在多种传感器退化情形下的速度估计问题，显著提升了导航系统的稳健性和准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在实际应用中，AUV常依赖惯性传感器和多普勒测速仪（DVL）进行导航。然而，DVL测量数据因海洋环境干扰常出现噪声或缺失，部分低成本平台甚至没有惯性传感器，导致速度估计和导航精度下降。解决这些问题对于提升AUV自主作业能力至关重要。

Method: 提出DVL-DeepONet物理引导深度神经算子框架及其三种变体，可以在不同操作场景下实现：（1）惯性/DVL耦合下的抗噪速度估计、（2）仅DVL观测下的学习、（3）DVL波束测量补全。模型通过引入DVL物理一致性约束，实现了对退化观测条件下速度的鲁棒估计。

Result: 在累计1万米真实AUV实验证据下，DVL-DeepONet及其变体在速度估计方面相较传统的基于模型和现有学习算法的方案提升了40%。

Conclusion: DVL-DeepONet框架能够有效实现AUV在多传感器退化和噪声影响下的高准确度速度估计，提升了水下自主导航系统的可靠性和实用性。

Abstract: Autonomous Underwater Vehicles (AUVs) rely heavily on the fusion of inertial sensors and Doppler velocity logs (DVLs) for navigation. In standard autonomous navigation systems, the DVL measures four beam velocities, thereby enabling the estimation of the AUV velocity vector. However, during real-world missions, the DVL may receive noisy or incomplete beam measurements due to marine obstacles, seabed reflections, or environmental disturbances. Furthermore, some low-cost underwater platforms operate without inertial sensors to reduce system complexity and cost. In such cases, reliable estimation of the AUV velocity vector in real-world missing beam scenarios becomes challenging, leading to degraded navigation solutions. To circumvent these challenges and enable resilient underwater navigation, we propose DVL-DeepONet, a physics-guided deep neural operator framework along with three variants. The proposed models are designed to estimate DVL-based velocity information under multiple operational scenarios, including (i) noise-resilient estimation in coupled inertial/DVL measurements, (ii) DVL-only learning, and (iii) beam measurement recovery. By learning a nonlinear operator that maps temporal inertial/DVL observations directly to vehicle velocity while enforcing DVL measurement physics through a consistency constraint, the proposed approach enables robust velocity estimation even under degraded sensing conditions. The proposed framework is validated using real-world AUV experiments, comprising a cumulative path length of approximately 10,000 m. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed DVL-DeepONet architectures outperform baseline model-based approaches and learning-based algorithms by 40%.

</details>


### [574] [BiliVLA: Scene-Aware Vision-Language-Action Model with Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Biliary Endoscopic Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23531)
*Jinsong Lin,Chi kit Ng,Zhiyong Xiong,Zikang Pan,Yihan Hu,Tabassum Tamima,Ziyi Hao,Eddie Cheung,Jiewen Lai,Huxin Gao,Hongliang Ren*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向胆道镜导航的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）框架BiliVLA, 能够实现更可靠和安全的自主内镜导航。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 内镜逆行胰胆管造影（ERCP）操作空间狭小，充满视觉复杂性和解剖变异，现有机器人及视觉辅助方法在实际操作中表现有限，影响自主导航的实用性和安全性。需要开发更智能的辅助/自主导航方案，提高操作精度和鲁棒性。

Method: BiliVLA将胆道内镜导航建模为一个基于指令的视觉-动作学习问题，实现对目标类别、包围框以及3自由度运动指令的联合预测。引入场景感知监督与安全恢复机制，并采用两阶段训练策略（包含语义定位增强的监督微调和相对策略优化GRPO）以提升模型的鲁棒性和一致性。

Result: 在现实仿真实验的3个ERCP子任务上，BiliVLA动作精度达91.96%，总成功率为84.85%。

Conclusion: BiliVLA通过集成语义感知、场景学习和奖励引导优化，有效提升了内镜导航的一致性、精度和安全性，为自主胆道镜导航提供了可靠技术基础。

Abstract: Endoscopic retrograde cholangiopancreatography (ERCP) demands precise endoscopic navigation and stable biliary cannulation within a narrow monocular field characterized by specular reflections, partial occlusions, and frequent tissue contact. Although recent robotic systems and vision-based assistance techniques improve operator ergonomics and provide perceptual cues, their performance degrades under pronounced anatomical variability and safety-critical visual artifacts, which hinders reliable autonomy in cannulation-grade procedures. Here, we present BiliVLA, a scene-aware Vision-Language-Action (VLA) framework that formulates biliary endoscopic navigation as an instruction-conditioned visuomotor learning problem. Given an endoscopic observation and a stage-specific language instruction, BiliVLA jointly predicts the target category, a grounded bounding box, and a discrete three degrees of freedom (DoF) motor command for a continuum endoscope. The proposed framework incorporates scene-aware supervision to enhance semantic target consistency and safety-aware recovery supervision to induce conservative retreat behaviors under luminal wall contact. A key component of BiliVLA is a two-stage training paradigm that combines grounding-enhanced supervised fine-tuning (SFT) with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), which significantly improves action reliability and decision consistency during closed-loop navigation. Across three ERCP subtasks, BiliVLA achieves an average action precision of 91.96\% and an overall success rate (SR) of 84.85\% in real-world phantom experiments. These results indicate that integrating semantic grounding, scene-aware learning, and reward-guided optimization improves perception-action alignment and enables robust autonomous endoscopic navigation.

</details>


### [575] [HoloAgent-0: A Unified Embodied Agent Framework with 3D Spatial Memory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23565)
*Xiaolin Zhou,Liu Liu,Tingyang Xiao,Wei Feng,Fa Fu,Xinrui Meng,Xinjie Wang,Jialiang Han,Boyang Yu,Yun Du,Wei Sui,Zhizhong Su*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了HoloAgent-0，一个面向机器人真实世界部署的统一化具身智能体框架，实现了将大模型语言能力与多种物理机器人闭环控制融合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大模型智能体在数字环境中表现优异，但难以迁移到物理机器人，主要因为物理执行的连续性、不确定性和安全约束等挑战。现有具身AI各优势模块（如操作、导航等）较为割裂，亟需统一的闭环系统。

Method: 提出了HoloAgent-0框架，包括三大耦合层：（1）Embodied AgentOS将语言指令转换为可执行技能图，并进行资源调度和执行监控；（2）三维空间记忆保证物理世界的感知与定位；（3）机器人具身技能层支撑群体异构硬件的具体执行。

Result: HoloAgent-0部署在真实机器人硬件上，实现在空间记忆、长时序导航、运动生成、目标搜索、跨机器人协作及移动操作等任务中的有效闭环执行。

Conclusion: 统一的HoloAgent-0框架能让多样化机器人在真实物理世界下通过大模型具身智能体实现高效、安全和可靠的闭环任务控制，为人机协作和自动化推进提供了新途径。

Abstract: LLM agents follow a practical execution loop in digital environments: they reason over structured states, invoke tools, inspect feedback, and revise actions. Extending this loop to physical robots is difficult because physical execution is continuous, embodiment-dependent, uncertain, and constrained by safety. Existing embodied-AI systems have advanced manipulation, spatial understanding, navigation, and humanoid control, but these capabilities often remain specialized modules or loosely coupled decision loops. In this work, we introduce HoloAgent-0, a unified embodied agent framework for real-world robot deployment. Embodied AgentOS converts language instructions into executable skill graphs, schedules robot resources, monitors execution, and triggers clarification or re-planning from runtime feedback. HoloAgent-0 organizes heterogeneous robot models and controllers through three coupled layers: Embodied AgentOS for closed-loop execution, 3D spatial memory for physical world grounding, and embodied skills for robot action. We deploy HoloAgent-0 on real hardware and evaluate its spatial memory, long-horizon navigation, and closed-loop execution across motion generation, object search, cross-robot coordination, and mobile manipulation.

</details>


### [576] [A Generative Model for Closed-Loop Microsimulation of Signalized Intersections](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23588)
*Yash Ranjan,Rahul Sengupta,Anand Rangarajan,Sanjay Ranka*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了Enactor，一个基于actor-centric生成模型的闭环路口交通微观仿真工具。该方法专注于捕捉车辆间的复杂交互，并在多个基准测试中优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有微观交通模拟器依赖于手工设计的行为模型，能再现总体流量但忽略了信号路口车辆间的异质性互动。现有的学习型轨迹预测模型可挖掘更多互动信息，但只适合短时预测，闭环运行时不稳定。因此需要新的方法提升精准度和稳定性。

Method: Enactor对动态交通参与者和道路几何进行极坐标编码，使用空间与时间注意力分离的Transformer预测每个车辆的下一步运动分布。训练时采用闭环课程学习，使模型熟悉自身预测带来的输入分布偏移。将行人视作影响但不直接预测的环境上下文。

Result: 在两个路口4000秒的仿真闭环测试中，Enactor对全部车辆控制，重现了实际交通生成器的速度和行驶时间分布，其KL散度比最新Transformer基线低一个数量级以上。相较同行基线，红灯违规次数减少一个数量级以上，并且隔离分析确定后车保险杠特征对安全指标影响最大。在真实世界数据上，Enactor多时域预测性能优于常速基线。

Conclusion: Enactor能有效模拟信号路口车辆复杂互动，闭环性能稳定优于其他学习型方法，在合成与真实场景下均表现出色，对交通安全和高保真仿真具有潜在应用价值。

Abstract: Traffic microsimulators rely on hand-crafted behavior models that reproduce aggregate flow but miss the heterogeneous interactions between vehicles at signalized intersections. Learned trajectory predictors capture richer interactions but are short-horizon and tend to be unstable when run in closed loop. We present Enactor, an actor-centric generative model for closed-loop intersection microsimulation. The model focuses on vehicles; pedestrians are included as context that can influence vehicle decisions but not predicted. Dynamic actors and lane polylines are encoded in polar coordinates referenced to the intersection center. A transformer with separate spatial and temporal attention blocks predicts a distribution over each actor's next-step motion ($s$, $α$). Training uses a closed-loop curriculum so the model is exposed to its own predictions. We evaluate Enactor in two regimes. In a 4000-second simulation-in-the-loop test at two intersection geometries, Enactor controls every dynamic vehicle against a continuously refreshing actor set rather than the fixed cohort that learned trajectory predictors are usually evaluated against. It recovers the SUMO data generator's speed and travel-time distributions with KL divergence over an order of magnitude lower than a recent transformer baseline on travel time, and substantially lower on speed (roughly $5\times$ lower at Site 1), and reduces red-light violations relative to the same baseline by more than an order of magnitude. An ablation isolates the leader rear-bumper feature as the change with the largest effect on intersection-aware safety metrics. We also evaluate on real-world field data and apply the same architecture to naturalistic vehicle trajectories from a fish-eye camera at a signalized intersection and evaluate it on multi-horizon predictive tasks. Enactor outperforms a constant-velocity baseline at every horizon evaluated.

</details>


### [577] [KEMO: Event-Driven Keyframe Memory for Long-Horizon Robot Manipulation with VLA Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23589)
*Yihan Zeng,Minghao Ye,Yiyuan Chen,Yide Shentu,Philipp Wu,Zike Yan,Zhongyu Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出一种轻量化插件式记忆框架KEMO，用于长时序机器人操作任务，通过自动选取与任务相关关键事件的关键帧，有效提升多步操作的成功率与阶段完成率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在长时序机器人操作中，由于相似观测在不同阶段重复出现，导致仅凭当前或近期观测难以做出准确决策，需要记忆机制来辅助推断任务进展。现有方法要么保留过多历史信息，需压缩处理；要么主要依赖近期上下文，容易丢失早期重要信息。

Method: KEMO通过结合机器人运动学与视觉过滤，检测与任务相关的关键帧，并将其序列化编码为紧凑的记忆token。主模型利用交叉注意力和门控残差融合，将历史关键帧与当前视觉特征结合参与决策训练。此外，关键事件附近的样本在训练中被赋予更高权重。

Result: 在真实双臂机器人涉及2~6子任务、轨迹长度830~2846步的任务上，KEMO相较无记忆基线，任务成功率提升23.6%，阶段完成率提升34.1%。消融实验表明，基于事件的关键帧选择优于均匀采样和最近帧法，同时门控融合与关键帧对齐损失加权带来互补性提升。

Conclusion: KEMO可插拔、高效地保留和利用与任务相关的记忆，显著提升了长时序复杂机器人操作的表现，为记忆增强型机器人控制提供了新途径。

Abstract: Long-horizon robot manipulation remains challenging because similar observations may occur at different execution stages, while the appropriate action depends on previously completed operations. Memory can address this ambiguity by enabling policies to infer task progress from execution history. However, existing memory-augmented approaches often either retain dense histories that require compression or rely primarily on recent context that may discard earlier task-relevant events. In this work, we propose propose KEMO, a lightweight plug-in memory framework that automatically selectively preserves keyframes associated with task-relevant state changes for VLA policies. KEMO combines robot kinematics with visual filtering to detect events, encodes the selected keyframes as compact temporally ordered memory tokens, and integrates them with current visual features through cross-attention and gated residual fusion for VLA training. The detected events also define higher-weight training samples near critical transitions. We evaluate KEMO on various real-world dual-arm manipulation tasks spanning 2 to 6 scored subtasks, and trajectory length ranging from 830 steps to 2846 execution steps (durations from 28 to 95 seconds). Compared with the memory-free baseline (e.g., $π_{0.5}$), KEMO improves aggregate Task Success Rate by 23.6\% and Stage Completion Rate by 34.1\%. Ablations show that event-driven keyframe selection outperforms uniform sampling and recent-frame retention, while the proposed gated fusion and keyframe-aligned loss weighting provide complementary gains.

</details>


### [578] [Real-Time Multimodal Activity-Aware Error Detection in Robot-Assisted Surgery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23593)
*Seyed Hamid Reza Roodabeh,Zongyu Li,Homa Alemzadeh*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个统一的多模态执行性错误检测框架，通过融合视频、运动学和文本提示，提高了机器人辅助手术中的错误检测精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人辅助手术虽然提升了精准度，但也带来了新复杂性，使技术错误检测成为保障病人安全的关键。现有基于视频的方法忽略了手术层次结构下的细粒度活动和错误类型描述，也没有充分利用多模态信息。

Method: 作者提出融合多模态（视频、运动学、文本提示）的执行性错误检测框架。通过活动提示，将描述性语言融入手势级活动、器械-对象交互及错误定义。引入基于手术活动标签预训练视觉编码器的activity-aware视觉嵌入，并比较其与传统视觉嵌入在错误检测上的效果。同时，运动学数据与视频、文本进行集成优化。

Result: 在JIGSAWS和SAR-RARP50数据集上，所提方法比现有先进方法的F1得分分别提升5%和16.6%。

Conclusion: 通过结合精心设计的文本提示与多模态数据，能够显著提升手术错误检测的准确性，验证了多模态融合及活动感知视觉嵌入的有效性。

Abstract: Robot-assisted minimally invasive surgery improves surgical precision but introduces complexity, making technical error detection essential for ensuring patient safety. Current executional error detection methods using video data often overlook fine-grained contextual descriptions of activities and error types within the hierarchical structure of surgical procedures. They also under-utilize complementary multimodal information. We propose a unified framework for executional error detection that leverages multimodal input, including video, kinematics, and descriptive textual prompts. Through activity prompting, we integrate descriptive language in gesture-level activities, instrument-object interactions, and error definitions. We also introduce activity-aware visual embeddings derived from vision encoders pretrained on surgical activity labels to compare the effectiveness of contrastive language-image embeddings with traditional image-based embeddings for error detection. By seamlessly integrating kinematic data with video and textual modalities, our framework significantly improves error detection performance. Achieving up to 5\% and 16.6\% F1 score improvements over state-of-the-art baselines on the JIGSAWS and SAR-RARP50 datasets, respectively, we demonstrate the value of combining curated textual prompts with multimodal data for accurate error detection.

</details>


### [579] [Autonomous Subsea Cable Search and Tracking with Graph-Optimised Priors and Visual Tracking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23606)
*Ibrahim Fadhil Djauhari,Adrian Bodenmann,Samuel Simmons,Cailei Liang,David White,Susan Gourvenec,Tom Bennetts,Darryl Newborough,Blair Thornton*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本论文提出一种基于图优化的新方法，使自主水下航行器（AUV）在先验路线不确定的情况下高效搜索和跟踪海底电缆，实现了对部分掩埋及细小电缆的持续自动检测和路线修正，并在实际测试中取得良好效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统海底电缆巡检受限于路线图不准、部分掩埋、小直径电缆难以检测等问题，现有方法跟踪断失率高，难以应对复杂环境，急需更高效、鲁棒的自动化巡检技术。

Method: 该方法结合不确定性先验路线地图和实时视觉观测，采用基于图的优化算法，利用物理学悬链线模型（考虑铺设深度、直径、密度）限制搜索空间，提升搜索效率。电缆检测采用半监督分类器，实时分析AUV摄像头数据；搜索空间受限后即使追踪中断也能高效恢复。

Result: 在南安普顿大学Smarty200 AUV的实地试验中，该系统能自动修正存在初始误差的电缆路线图，实现对120米测试电缆59%的自动视觉巡检并多次成功恢复失去跟踪，验证了方法有效性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 所提方法能显著提升海底电缆巡检的准确性和效率，对于传统方法难以应对的路线不准、掩埋、追踪中断等问题具有明显优势，具有应用推广前景。

Abstract: Global communications rely on subsea cable infrastructure that remains vulnerable to damage from natural hazards and human activity. Autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) offer an efficient means to inspect long sections of exposed cable, but uncertainty in cable route maps, small cable diameters and partial burial makes continuous tracking a challenge. This paper presents a novel cable search and tracking method that leverages uncertain prior cable route maps. Graph-based optimisation continuously update the cable route to remain consistent with visual observations. Route uncertainty is constrained as a function of distance from observations using physics-based catenary models that account for cable parameters (i.e., lay depth, diameter, and density), bounding the search space to physically feasible regions and improving search efficiency. Cable detection is performed using a semi-supervised classifier running in real-time on-board a camera-equipped AUV. These detections both update the graph-based optimisation and enable visual cable tracking. When tracking is lost due to misclassification, burial or imperfect control, the bounded search space enables efficient recovery. The approach was demonstrated in field trials using the University of Southampton's Smarty200 AUV. The system successfully located the cable despite deliberate errors in it initial cable route map, updating this to be consistent with observations and using visual tracking to inspect up to 59% of a 120m test cable, with successful recovered after tracking loss.

</details>


### [580] [RECALL: Recovery Experience Collection for Active Lifelong Learning in Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23617)
*Ulas Berk Karli,Tesca Fitzgerald*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于主动不确定性引导的数据采集方法用于视觉-语言-动作模型（VLA）的持续学习，以提升微调效率并分析其优缺点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的VLA模型微调大多采用被动模仿学习，需机器人先失败、再收集数据，效率低且资源浪费。作者希望通过主动学习优化微调过程，解决现有方法的局限。

Method: 提出主动、持续学习范式，利用不确定性引导数据采集，结合多种持续学习技术（如混合重放、弹性权重固化）进行实验分析，比较与被动采集数据的微调效率及遗忘问题。

Result: 主动不确定性引导的数据采集相较被动采集，使微调更高效。但若仅用主动采集的数据进行微调，会导致灾难性遗忘。不同持续学习策略之间，在新数据适应性和旧知识保留间存在权衡。

Conclusion: 主动持续学习的VLA策略能提升适应效率，但将新数据引入大规模机器人策略时，仍存在灾难性遗忘等挑战，需权衡模型的可塑性与遗忘能力。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are commonly fine-tuned through passive imitation learning, where additional demonstrations are collected for tasks where the policy performs poorly. This approach incurs several downsides: it requires the robot to fail before data collection is triggered, provides little guidance about which states require supervision, and wastes demonstrator effort on redundant parts of the task where the policy already performs well. In this paper, we propose an active, continual learning paradigm for VLAs. We demonstrate that active, uncertainty-guided data collection leads to more efficient fine-tuning than when using passively-collected demonstrations. However, we also find that fine-tuning only on actively-collected recovery data leads to catastrophic forgetting. We evaluate techniques for continual learning, including replay-based data mixing and elastic weight consolidation, and identify tradeoffs between plasticity to uncertainty-guided recovery data and retention of previously learned behaviors. Overall, our work contributes an empirical study of active continual learning for autoregressive VLAs, establishing that uncertainty-guided recovery demonstrations can improve adaptation efficiency while also revealing open challenges when targeted new data is incorporated into large robot policies.

</details>


### [581] [dVLA-RL: Reinforcement Learning over Denoising Trajectories for Discrete Diffusion Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23623)
*Yuhao Wu,Yitian Liu,Weijie Shen,Mishuo Han,Wenjie Xu,Haotian Liang,Zhongshan Liu,Yinan Mao,Lei Xu,Xinping Guan,Ru Ying,Ran Zheng,Wei Sui,Xiaokang Yang,Wenbo Ding,Yao Mu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合离散扩散模型和强化学习的新型视觉-语言-动作（VLA）系统，显著提升了多任务机器人操作的成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型在动作生成上常采用连续扩散或离散自回归方式，但近期的离散扩散VLA（dVLA）虽统一了表达形式，却主要依赖有监督微调（SFT），未能充分发挥强化学习（RL）的潜力。而dVLA中最终动作的边缘概率不可得，给RL带来挑战。

Method: 作者提出dVLA-RL方法，将学习目标从边缘动作概率转为生成路径的联合概率。通过将去噪过程建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），将轨迹级目标作为优化对象，并引入自适应步数调度机制，自动为不同任务复杂度分配有效的去噪步数。

Result: 在LIBERO基准上取得99.7%的成功率；在RoboTwin 2.0基准上，相较于SFT基线提升30.6%，并与强势世界-动作模型方法在性能上持平。

Conclusion: dVLA-RL不仅有效拓展了dVLA的能力，使其支持强化学习，还通过统一建模和灵活步数调度大幅提升了机器人多任务执行的准确率和效率，具有很强的应用前景。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have established a powerful paradigm for generalist robotic manipulation by grounding control into the semantic reasoning of VLMs. Prevailing architectures typically model actions continuously via diffusion or flow processes, or discretely through either autoregressive generation or parallel decoding. Recently, Discrete Diffusion VLAs (dVLAs) have emerged as a distinct alternative, unifying vision, language, and action into a single discrete token space via masked generative modeling. While combining iterative refinement with unified representations, its training has thus far been restricted to Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT), leaving the potential of Reinforcement Learning (RL) for further policy refinement largely unexplored. A fundamental challenge in RL for dVLAs is that the marginal probability of the final action generated by dVLAs remains intractable. To solve this problem, we propose \textbf{dVLA-RL}, shifting the learning objective from the marginal action probability to the joint probability of the sampled generation path. Specifically, by modeling the denoising process as a Markov Decision Process (MDP), we mathematically formulate this path probability as a product of step-wise transitions. This trajectory-level objective provides a unified formulation that natively accommodates variable denoising steps. Leveraging this intrinsic fexibility, we introduce a unified step scheduling approach for complex multi-task learning, tailoring denoising steps to specific task complexities to maximize both success rates and computational effciency. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that our approach achieves a success rate of \textbf{99.7\%} on LIBERO. Furthermore, it establishes strong VLA-based results on RoboTwin 2.0 by delivering a \textbf{30.6\%} improvement over the SFT baseline, remaining competitive with strong World-Action Model baselines.

</details>


### [582] [Learning to See While Learning to Act: Diffusion Models for Active Perception in Robot Imitation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23625)
*Kuancheng Wang,Vaibhav Saxena,Shuo Cheng,Yotto Koga,Danfei Xu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了See2Act方法，使机器人在存在严重遮挡的情况下，通过主动推理观察视角并结合行为学习，更好地完成模仿学习任务。方法在Ravens和RLBench等平台上显著优于以往方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大多数模仿学习假设机器人可以完全观测环境，但实际中物体常被遮挡，机器人需要合理搜索视角与执行动作。而从有限演示中同时学习“寻找”与“操作”的耦合行为极具挑战性。

Method: 提出See2Act方法，结合动作去噪和视角优化。训练时输入用演示中的关键帧相机位姿作为锚点，从而隐式学习“在哪里观察”与“如何行动”的策略。测试时根据主动推理的观察序列决定动作。

Result: 实验表明，在Ravens平台下该策略能在严重遮挡环境下恢复有效视角；在RLBench平台上较现有方法性能提升高达34%。在真实机器人实验中，方法实现了零样本仿真到现实迁移，能够有效完成抓取任务。

Conclusion: 所提出方法能够在部分可观测条件下学习合理的视角推理和操作策略，显著提升机器人在复杂遮挡环境下的任务鲁棒性和成功率。

Abstract: Most imitation learning methods assume full observability in table-top settings. In practice, objects are often occluded, requiring robots to both search and act, and learning this coupled behavior from limited demonstrations remains challenging. We propose See2Act, an imitation learning approach that conditions action prediction on a sequence of actively-inferred viewpoints at test time, by coupling action denoising with viewpoint refinement. The policy is trained using camera poses anchored to keyframe actions from offline demonstrations, enabling implicit learning of where to see, while learning how to act. We empirically demonstrate that in Ravens the policy recovers informative viewpoints under severe occlusions, and on RLBench tasks it improves performance by up to 34% over prior methods. In the real world, we collect 50 demonstrations in a digital twin and achieve zero-shot sim-to-real transfer on pick-and-place tasks using depth observations. The policy handles significant occlusions, showing that learned viewpoint reasoning enables robust manipulation under partial observability.

</details>


### [583] [Flatness Preserves Instruction Following in Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23641)
*Haochen Zhang,Yonatan Bisk*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本论文通过在微调过程中引入平坦性优化，有效提升了视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型对指令的遵循能力，显著缓解了指令盲失效问题，无需额外数据或结构改动即可提升60%以上性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预训练的VLA模型具备跨领域泛化潜力，但用有限机器人数据微调时，模型往往丢失对语言指令的敏感度，变得只依赖视觉捷径，导致表现脆弱。作者提出此现象源自标准微调导致的损失函数高曲率极小值，因此希望通过优化方案提升模型鲁棒性。

Method: 本文采用sharpness-aware minimization（SAM）方法，在微调VLA模型时通过平坦性优化，使模型参数位于损失曲面更平坦的区域，从而提升对语言指令的遵循能力。整个过程不引入新数据、新架构或额外训练，仅改变优化细节。

Result: 在多个仿真与真实世界基准测试中，采用SAM优化的VLA模型指令遵循能力提升60%以上，显著优于传统微调方法。同时，作者分析了选择性锐度的影响，并量化了鲁棒性提升。方法还可与现有引导技术兼容。

Conclusion: 采用平坦性优化可在不改变大规模预训练模型结构与数据的前提下，大幅提升VLA模型对指令的遵循能力和泛化鲁棒性。

Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have the potential for open-world generalization by leveraging pretrained vision-language representations, yet downstream finetuning on limited robot data often degrades these representations, leading to brittle policies that ignore language instructions in favor of visual shortcuts, a failure mode we term instruction blindness. We hypothesize that standard finetuning with limited data applies gradients to a sparse set of points, which manifests as a sharp loss landscape with high-curvature minima. We propose to address this directly through flatness-preserving optimization while finetuning on the exact same data, where learning a flatter landscape results in a model more robust to perturbations in the weight space. Specifically, we demonstrate that simply applying sharpness-aware minimization during VLA finetuning significantly improves instruction following by over 60% across multiple simulation and real-world benchmarks without additional data, architectural modification, or retraining. We further analyze the effect of selective sharpness, quantify its effects, and show that our approach is complementary to existing guidance techniques. Project page can be found at https://haochenz11.github.io/papers/flatness-vla/.

</details>


### [584] [A Reduced Order Model for Emergent Mechanics in Woven Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23658)
*Anvay A. Pradhan,Evgueni T. Filipov,Talia Y. Moore*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种简化的机织结构力学模型，兼顾准确性与计算效率，用于分析和设计具可编程机械响应的机织材料。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机织结构的独特力学行为（如各向异性刚度、剪切致锁、网纹交换等）主要源于其几何排列，不是材料本身。但现有模型要么忽略细节（均质化），要么计算成本极高，缺乏高效且精准的方法。

Method: 研究提出一种降阶模型，通过节点和四类物理可解释的刚度元件（轴向变形、面内去卷曲、编织间剪切、摩擦滑移）来表征单根纱线互作。通过单元体的特征值分析，明确各刚度元件在描述关键结构行为中的作用。利用三点弯曲和剪切实验数据标定元件参数，保证模型准确性。

Result: 模型在不同纱线宽度、间距下预测结果与实验数据吻合度达95%以上。成功模拟了传统连续体方法无法捕捉的力学响应，如卷曲交换带来的泊松比效应、逐步拉出下力/位移突降、不同撕裂情景下的应力集中、以及通过刚度分布实现的力学各向异性可编程性。

Conclusion: 该方法具物理透明性和高效性，可作为机织结构材料分析与力学性能可编程设计的实用工具。

Abstract: Woven structures exhibit rich mechanical behaviors including anisotropic stiffness, shear-induced locking, and crimp interchange that emerge purely from the geometric arrangement of individual weavers rather than from constituent material properties. Existing models either homogenize these interactions or resolve them at prohibitive computational cost. We introduce a reduced-order model that bridges this gap by representing individual weaver interactions through a system of nodes and four physically interpretable stiffness elements capturing axial deformation, in-plane uncrimping, inter-weaver shear, and frictional slip. Eigenvalue analysis of the unit cell confirms that the lowest-energy deformation modes correspond directly to known weave-specific phenomena, and that each element is necessary for a complete kinematic and mechanistic description.
